```text
Perfect! I have captured the comprehensive information about the sales pipeline page. Let me compile a detailed feature list for your onboarding guide.

## Sales Pipeline Page - Comprehensive Feature Documentation

Based on my thorough analysis of `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`, here is a complete feature list for your onboarding guide:

---

### 1. TABS & NAVIGATION
- **Overall Tab** - Collapsible view of Outreach, Pipeline, and Orbit sections (state: outreach/pipeline/orbit can be collapsed)
- **Actions Tab** - Prioritized action items organized by phase and sortable
- **Outreach Tab** - Cold DM stage opportunities with pagination and filtering
- **Pipeline Tab** - All active opportunities in Kanban or Table view
- **Orbit Tab** - Shelved opportunities grouped by orbit reason
- **Templates Tab** - Sales message templates for each stage and bump number

---

### 2. NEW OPPORTUNITY DIALOG FIELDS
When creating or editing an opportunity:
- **Name** (required) - Company or contact name
- **POC Platform** - Select from Instagram, Twitter/X, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, etc.
- **POC Handle/ID** - @handle or contact identifier
- **Owner** - Assigned team member
- **Source** - Cold Outreach, Referral, Inbound, Event, Twitter, LinkedIn, Telegram, Website
- **Referrer** (conditional on Referral source) - Who referred them?
- **Affiliate** (conditional on non-cold-outreach sources) - Can create new affiliate on the fly
- **Notes** - Additional context
- **Path** (in edit mode) - Closer (Path A) or SDR (Path B)
- **Bucket** (in edit mode) - A (High), B (Medium), C (Low)
- **Temperature Score** (0-100 slider)
- **Deal Value** - Numeric amount
- **Currency** - USD, USDT, USDC, ETH, BTC
- **Meeting Date & Time** - Date picker + 24-hour/minute scrollers
- **Meeting Type** - Discovery, Proposal, Follow-up, Closing Call
- **TG Handle** - Telegram handle (gets prompted when moving to TG Intro stage)

---

### 3. ACTION SYSTEM - PRIORITY-DRIVEN WORKFLOW

#### Action Types Appear Per Stage:

**Cold DM:**
- "Send First DM" (bump #0, no contact yet)
- "Bump #N" (if 3+ days since last bump)
- "Wait N days" (if less than 3 days since last bump)
- "Review → Orbit" (after 4 bumps with no reply)

**Warm:**
- "Get TG Handle" (if replied but no TG yet)
- "Follow Up" (if silent since reply)

**TG Intro:**
- "Booked!" (send Calendly to schedule meeting)
- "Re-engage or Orbit" (if 7+ days no contact)

**Booked:**
- "Schedule Meeting" (if no meeting date set)
- "Prep for Meeting" (if meeting is in future)
- "Discovery Done" (if meeting is in past)

**Discovery Done:**
- "Book Proposal Call" (if no proposal sent)

**Proposal Call:**
- "Send Proposal" (if meeting logged but proposal not sent)
- "To Contract" (if proposal was sent)

**Contract:**
- "Chase Signature" (main action: bump them)
- "Signed!" (quick alternative to close won)

**Orbit:**
- "Resurrect" (after 90+ days in orbit)
- "In Orbit" (waiting state, no action needed)

#### Action Priority Levels:
- **Urgent** (red) - Immediate attention needed (BAMFAM violations, past meetings)
- **High** (amber) - Should do today
- **Medium/Low** (gray) - Can wait
- **Wait** (gray) - Cooling period (bump cooldown, nurturing)

#### Action Guidance:
Each action shows a hint bar in the slide-over with contextual guidance when opened from the Actions tab.

---

### 4. BUMP SYSTEM & 3-DAY COOLDOWN

- **Bump Counter**: Displays visually as 1-4 filled circles (cold_dm stage only)
- **Bump Tracking**: Records bump_number and last_bump_date
- **3-Day Cooldown Rule**: Cannot send another bump within 3 days of the last bump
  - After 3 days: "Bump #N" action appears as actionable
  - Before 3 days: "Wait X days" action (non-actionable)
- **Maximum Bumps**: 4 bumps (after 4 with no reply, moves to "Review → Orbit")
- **Bump Reduction**: Can manually reduce bump count via minus button in slide-over
- **Bulk Bumping**: Select multiple cold DMs and "Bump All" from outreach tab
- **Bulk Bump Record**: In outreach table, each row has inline bump button with tooltip

---

### 5. SLIDE-OVER PANEL (Right-Side Detail View)

Opens when clicking any opportunity.

#### Header Section:
- Opportunity name (or "Edit Opportunity" in edit mode)
- Stage badge (color-coded)
- Bucket badge (if assigned)
- Path badge (Closer/SDR)
- Deal value in large bold text with currency

#### View Mode (default):
- **Edit Button** (pencil icon) - Opens edit mode inline
- **Close Button** (X) - Closes panel

#### Edit Mode:
- Scrollable form with all create/edit fields listed above
- Cancel and Update buttons
- Accessible from slide-over (inline) or as separate dialog

#### Details Card:
- Temperature (visual bar + percentage)
- Owner name
- POC (platform badge + handle)
- TG Handle
- Source
- Next Meeting date/time (if set)
- Referrer (if applicable)
- Affiliate badge
- Last Contacted (relative time)

#### Notes Section:
- Displays markdown-style notes

#### Bump Progress Section (cold_dm only):
- Visual 4-dot progress tracker
- "N / 4 bumps" label
- Minus button (reduce bump count)
- Plus "Bump" button (increment and record bump)
- Last bump timing

#### Quick Actions:
- "Move to Orbit" (orange button)
- "Delete" (red button)

#### Stage Move Dropdown:
- Select from all available stages to immediately move opportunity

#### Activity Timeline:
- Add Activity Form:
  - Type selector (Note, Call, Message, Meeting, Proposal)
  - Title input
  - Description textarea
  - Outcome field
  - Next Step field
  - Next Step Date picker (calendar popover)
  - Meeting Date picker (calendar + scrollable hours/minutes for meeting type only)
  - Meeting Time picker (if type = meeting)
  - "Add" button

- Activity List:
  - Timeline view with icons per activity type (call, message, meeting, proposal, note, bump)
  - Activity title + type badge
  - Description (if provided)
  - Outcome (if logged)
  - Next Step with due date link
  - Created timestamp (relative time, e.g., "2 hours ago")

---

### 6. KANBAN vs TABLE VIEW

#### Table View:
- Grouped by stage (collapsible headers)
- Stage header shows: icon, stage name, count badge, total deal value
- Each row is drag-and-drop sortable within stage (grip handle)
- Inline edit for Name and Deal Value (click to edit)
- Columns: Name, Bucket, Path, Temperature (bar), Value, Owner, TG Handle, [Stage-specific], BAMFAM status, Actions menu

#### Kanban View:
- Vertical columns per stage (collapsible)
- Drag cards between stages or reorder within stage
- Card shows: Name, deal value, bucket/path/source badges, bump progress (cold_dm), warm sub-state (warm), temperature bar, BAMFAM warning (red), last contacted
- Collapse/expand columns via chevron
- Sidebar "Orbit" and "Lost" drop zones for moving cards
- Drag overlay shows card shadow during drag

#### Path Filter:
- All Paths, Path A (Closer), Path B (SDR)
- Affects both views

---

### 7. TEMPLATE SYSTEM

#### Create/Edit/Delete/Copy:
- **Create New**: Click "New" button, fills form with stage, sub_type, name, content
- **Edit**: Click three-dot menu → Edit, opens dialog with populated form
- **Delete**: Three-dot menu → Delete (no confirmation, immediate removal)
- **Copy Content**: Click copy icon next to template content (clipboard)

#### Template Fields:
- **Name** - Label for the template
- **Stage** - cold_dm, warm, tg_intro, booked, discovery_done, proposal_call, v2_contract, or bump
- **Sub Type**:
  - For non-bump: general, initial, follow_up
  - For bump: bump_1, bump_2, bump_3
- **Content** - Message/email body text (supports markdown)
- **Variables** - Auto-extracted placeholders like {{name}}, {{company}}

#### Stage Filter Pills:
- All, Cold DM, Warm, TG Intro, Booked, Discovery Done, Proposal Call, Contract, Bumps
- Click to filter templates by stage

#### Template Display:
- Grid cards showing: Stage color badge, Name, Sub Type label, Preview of content (truncated)
- Copy button (copies content to clipboard)
- Edit and Delete buttons in each card

---

### 8. PROMPTS & DIALOGS

#### Orbit Reason Prompt:
- Triggers when moving opportunity to orbit stage
- Dropdown selector for orbit reason: no_response, not_ready, budget_constrained, no_budget, timing_issue, competitor, no_fit, other
- Confirm button → moves to orbit and opens activity log

#### Closed Lost Reason Prompt:
- Triggers when moving to closed_lost stage
- Text input for reason (optional)
- "Close Lost" button (destructive style)

#### TG Handle Prompt:
- Triggers when advancing to tg_intro stage
- Input field for @telegram_handle
- Confirm button → saves handle and moves stage

#### Bucket Assignment Prompt:
- Triggers after discovery call (moving to discovery_done stage)
- Three-button selector: A (Hot), B (Warm), C (Low)
- Shows descriptions ("Hot", "Warm", "Low")
- Confirm button → assigns bucket and opens activity log

#### Activity Log Prompt:
- Pops up after action execution (bump, stage change, proposal sent)
- Shows activity type badge (colored)
- Editable title field
- Description textarea (optional)
- Outcome field (optional)
- Next Step field (optional)
- Next Step Date picker (optional)
- Meeting Date/Time pickers (only if showMeetingPicker=true)
- Log Activity button

---

### 9. DASHBOARD METRICS CARDS (Top Row)

Five manager attention cards with traffic light colors:
1. **Booking Needed** (BAMFAM violations) - Red if > 0
   - Shows post-discovery deals with no future meeting scheduled
2. **Overdue** (past meeting date) - Orange if > 0
   - Meetings that already happened but outcome not logged
3. **Stale (7d+)** - Amber if > 0
   - Active pipeline deals with no contact in 7+ days
4. **At Risk** - Rose if > 0
   - Closing-stage deals with temperature < 40
5. **Meetings** - Blue if today has meetings
   - Shows today's count or week count

---

### 10. SALES DASHBOARD (Collapsible)

Click "Sales Dashboard" header to toggle detailed analytics:

#### Pipeline Health Metrics:
- Pipeline Value (active stage total)
- Weighted Pipeline (deal_value × stage probability)
- Active Deals (count)
- Revenue (Won)
- Deals Won
- In Orbit

#### Conversion Funnel:
- Visual bar chart: DMs → Replied → Meetings → Discovery → Proposals → Won → Lost
- Shows absolute counts and percentages of DMs sent

#### Key Rates:
- Response Rate (% who replied to DM)
- Close Rate (won / (won + lost))
- Avg Deal Size (mean of closed won values)
- Avg Close Time (days from created to closed)
- Qualified % (bucket A + B / total)
- Bucket A %

#### Bottleneck Analysis:
- **Biggest Drop-off** - Stage with lowest conversion rate (min 3 opps entering)
- **Slowest Stage** - Stage where deals sit longest (min 2 opps)
- Stage Conversion Table:
  - Columns: Stage, In, Out, Conversion %, Drop-off, Avg Days in Stage, Progress bar
  - Highlights worst and slowest with colored dots

#### Bucket Breakdown:
- Bucket A: High-value, high-intent
- Bucket B: Standard follow-up
- Bucket C: Lower priority

#### Recalc Scores Button:
- Recalculates all temperature scores based on formula:
  - Base: Bucket A=40, B=25, C=10, none=20
  - Recency: +30 minus days since last contact
  - Engagement: +4 per activity (max +20)
  - Meeting booked: +15
  - Stage bonuses: warm +5, booked/tg_intro +10, discovery+ +15
  - Warm interested: +10
  - Stale cold DM (30d+): −15
  - Bump exhaustion (3+): −10
  - Warm silent: −5
  - Orbit: 5, Closed Lost: 0

---

### 11. BULK OPERATIONS (Outreach Tab)

#### Selection:
- Checkbox in first column
- "Select All on Page" button
- "Deselect All" button
- Shows count: "N selected"

#### Bulk Actions Toolbar (appears when selected):
1. **Bump All** - Records bump for all selected (sky blue button)
2. **Move to Warm** - Advances all to warm stage (amber button)
3. **Delete** - Removes all selected (with confirmation prompt)

---

### 12. DnD (DRAG AND DROP) FUNCTIONALITY

#### Kanban Drag:
- Drag card to another stage column → triggers stage change with prompts if applicable
- Drag card to another card in same stage → reorders within stage
- Drag card to another card in different stage → stage change
- Visual feedback: dragging card shows 50% opacity, drop zone highlights with blue ring

#### Table Drag:
- Grip handle on left side of each row
- Drag to reorder within stage
- SortableContext handles vertical reordering
- Maintains position via position field on opportunities

#### Drag Overlay:
- Shows floating card/row during drag with shadow effect
- Card displays: name, building icon, stage badge (kanban)
- Row displays: grip handle, building icon, name, stage badge (table)

---

### 13. OUTREACH TAB FILTERS & FEATURES

#### Owner Sub-tabs:
- "My Outreach" - Filter to current user
- "All Owners" - Show all cold DMs across team
- Individual owner buttons (users list) - Filter by specific team member
- Shows total count for "All Owners"

#### Search:
- Debounced search input (400ms delay)
- Searches by opportunity name

#### Filter Dropdowns:
1. **DM Account Path** - All Paths, Closer, SDR
2. **Bucket** - All Buckets, A, B, C
3. **Bump Status** - All Bump Status, No Bumps, 1-2 Bumps, 3+ Bumps

#### Bulk Actions:
- Bump All, Move to Warm, Delete

#### Outreach Table Columns:
- Row number (shows on hover, replaced by checkbox on selection)
- Name (with building icon)
- POC (platform badge + handle)
- Bumps (visual counter)
- TG Handle
- Source (capitalized tag)
- Owner
- Created (short date format)
- Last Bump (relative time + inline bump button with tooltip)
- Menu (edit, record bump, move to warm, delete)

#### Pagination:
- Previous/Next buttons
- Page number buttons (shows 5 page window)
- "Showing X-Y of Z" text
- 50 items per page (OUTREACH_PAGE_SIZE)

---

### 14. ACTIONS TAB FEATURES

#### Owner Filters:
- "All Actions" - All actionable opps
- "My Actions" - Only owned by current user
- "Urgent Only" - Only urgent priority items

#### Phase Tabs (with counts):
- All (all actionable opps)
- Outreach (cold_dm, warm, tg_intro, booked)
- Closing (discovery_done, proposal_call, v2_contract)
- Orbit (orbit only)
- Waiting (non-actionable opps in cooling/waiting state)

#### Sort Dropdown:
- Priority (default, persisted to localStorage per user)
- Stage (in pipeline order)
- Temperature (highest first)
- Deal Value (highest first)
- Name (A-Z)
- Newest First (by created_at)
- Oldest First

#### Action Item Buttons:
- **Primary Action Button** - Colored by priority:
  - Urgent: red/destructive
  - High: teal (#3e8692)
  - Other: outline
- **Quick Alternative Button** - Green (emerald) for common next actions (e.g., "Interested", "Signed!", "Replied!")
- **Dropdown Menu** - Additional alternatives (max 3-4 options)

#### Table Columns:
- Name (building icon)
- Stage (colored badge)
- Bucket (colored pill)
- Next Action (priority icon + label + hint)
- Timing (shows relative time info: bumped Nd ago, meeting in Nd, etc.)
- Temperature (visual bar + %)
- Owner
- Action buttons + dropdown

#### Timing Column Logic:
- Cold DM: "Bumped Nd ago" or "Not bumped"
- Stages with next_meeting_at: "Meeting today" / "Meeting in Nd" / "Meeting Nd ago"
- Proposal Call: "Sent Nd ago"
- Orbit: "Nd in orbit"
- Default: "Nd silent"

#### Timing Color Coding:
- Red: Urgent (past due, 7+ days silent, 3+ days since bump in cold_dm)
- Amber: Attention needed (3+ days in cold_dm, 5+ days proposal sent)
- Blue: Upcoming meeting (0-2 days away)
- Gray: Normal

---

### 15. ORBIT TAB

#### Grouping:
- Opportunities grouped by orbit_reason
- Each group is collapsible with chevron

#### Group Headers:
- Icon (from ORBIT_REASONS)
- Reason label (e.g., "No Response", "Not Ready", "Budget Constrained")
- Count badge
- Total deal value (if > 0)

#### Table per Group:
- Columns: Name, Bucket, DM Account (C/S), Temperature, Value, Owner, Time in Orbit (days since updated_at), Last Contacted, Menu

#### Menu Options:
- Edit
- Resurrect (moves back to cold_dm, clears orbit_reason)
- Delete

---

### 16. OVERVIEW TAB (Overall Tab)

#### Collapsible Sections:
Three expandable sections showing the same renders as their respective tabs:
1. **Outreach** (blue header) - Full outreach table
2. **Pipeline** (emerald header) - Full pipeline table
3. **Orbit** (amber header) - Full orbit sections

Each shows count badge and can be toggled open/closed via chevron button.

---

### 17. DASHBOARD INSIGHTS

#### Key Computations:
- **Response Rate**: (opportunities past cold_dm) / (total opportunities) × 100
- **Close Rate**: (won) / (won + lost) × 100
- **Avg Deal Size**: mean of deal_values for closed won
- **Avg Close Time**: mean of (closed_at - created_at) in days for closed won
- **Qualified %**: (bucket A + B) / total × 100
- **Stage Conversion Rates**: (opps reaching next stage) / (opps entering stage) × 100
- **Weighted Pipeline**: sum of (deal_value × stage_probability) where probabilities are:
  - cold_dm: 0.05, warm: 0.1, tg_intro: 0.15, booked: 0.25
  - discovery_done: 0.4, proposal_call: 0.7, v2_contract: 0.9
- **BAMFAM Violations**: post-discovery deals (discovery_done, proposal_call, v2_contract) with no future next_meeting_at

---

### 18. INLINE EDITING

#### Table Cells:
- **Name Column**: Click to edit, shows input field, blur/Enter to save
- **Deal Value Column**: Click to edit, number input, blur/Enter to save
- Other fields edit via slide-over

---

### 19. COLOR CODING & VISUAL SYSTEM

#### Stage Colors:
- Cold DM: Sky blue background
- Warm: Amber
- TG Intro: Green
- Booked: Blue
- Discovery Done: Indigo
- Proposal Call: Violet
- Contract: Purple
- Orbit: Orange
- Closed Won: Emerald
- Closed Lost: Red

#### Bucket Colors:
- Bucket A: Emerald/green
- Bucket B: Amber/orange
- Bucket C: Gray

#### Temperature Visualization:
- 70+: Green
- 40-69: Amber
- 0-39: Red
- Shows as progress bar (width = score %)

#### Priority Icons:
- Urgent: Red triangle (AlertTriangle)
- High: Amber lightning (Zap)
- Medium: Blue clock (Clock)
- Low: Gray clock

---

### 20. LOADING & EMPTY STATES

#### Loading:
- Skeleton screens for header, stats, tabs
- Animated skeletons while data loads

#### Empty States:
- "No opportunities in this stage"
- "No actions needed right now" (Actions tab)
- "No opportunities in waiting state" (Waiting sub-tab)
- "No activities yet" (Activity timeline)

---

This comprehensive feature list covers all major functionality in the sales pipeline page. Use it to build your onboarding guide with sections for each feature, screenshots, and workflows!
```

```text
    82→function DroppableColumn({ id, children, className }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string }) {
    83→  const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id });
    84→  return (
    85→    <div ref={setNodeRef} className={`${className} ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2' : ''}`}>
    86→      {children}
    87→    </div>
    88→  );
    89→}
    90→
    91→function SortableCard({ id, children }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
    92→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
    93→  const style = {
    94→    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    95→    transition,
    96→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
    97→  };
    98→  return (
    99→    <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
   100→      {children}
   101→    </div>
   102→  );
   103→}
   104→
   105→function SortableTableRow({ id, children, className, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string; onClick?: () => void }) {
   106→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
   107→  const style: React.CSSProperties = {
   108→    transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
   109→    transition,
   110→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   111→    position: 'relative' as const,
   112→    zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
   113→  };
   114→  return (
   115→    <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`${className || ''} ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`} onClick={onClick}>
   116→      <TableCell className="w-10">
   117→        <div
   118→          {...attributes}
   119→          {...listeners}
   120→          className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
   121→          onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   122→        >
   123→          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   124→        </div>
   125→      </TableCell>
   126→      {children}
   127→    </TableRow>
   128→  );
   129→}
   130→
```

```text
   235→  // Templates tab state
   236→  const [templates, setTemplates] = useState<SalesDmTemplate[]>([]);
   237→  const [templateStageFilter, setTemplateStageFilter] = useState<string>('all');

   259→  }>({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '' });

   263→  const sensors = useSensors(

   267→
   268→  // ============================================
   269→  // Dashboard Metrics (computed from opportunities)
   270→  // ============================================
   271→
   272→  const dashboardMetrics = useMemo(() => {
   273→    const all = opportunities;
   274→    const pipelineActive = all.filter(o => PIPELINE_STAGES.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   275→    const closedWon = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_won');
   276→    const closedLost = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost');
   277→    const inOrbit = all.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   278→
   279→    // Stages past cold_dm = responded
   280→    const pastColdDm = all.filter(o => o.stage !== 'cold_dm');
   281→    const coldDmCount = outreachTotal > 0 ? outreachTotal : all.filter(o => o.stage === 'cold_dm').length;
   282→    const totalDmsSent = all.length; // every opp started as a DM
   283→    const responseRate = totalDmsSent > 0 ? (pastColdDm.length / totalDmsSent) * 100 : 0;
   284→
   285→    // Meetings booked = in booked or any stage after it
   286→    const bookedAndBeyond = ['booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   287→    const meetingsBooked = all.filter(o => bookedAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   288→
   289→    // Discovery calls = in discovery_done or later
   290→    const discoveryAndBeyond = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   291→    const discoveryCalls = all.filter(o => discoveryAndBeyond.includes(o.stage)).length;
   292→
   293→    // Close rate = won / (won + lost)
   294→    const totalClosed = closedWon.length + closedLost.length;
   295→    const closeRate = totalClosed > 0 ? (closedWon.length / totalClosed) * 100 : 0;
   296→
   297→    // Avg deal size (closed won)
   298→    const wonValues = closedWon.map(o => o.deal_value || 0).filter(v => v > 0);
   299→    const avgDealSize = wonValues.length > 0 ? wonValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / wonValues.length : 0;
   300→
   301→    // Avg close time (days from created_at to closed_at for won deals)
   302→    const closeTimes = closedWon
   303→      .filter(o => o.created_at && o.closed_at)
   304→      .map(o => (new Date(o.closed_at!).getTime() - new Date(o.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   305→    const avgCloseTime = closeTimes.length > 0 ? closeTimes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / closeTimes.length : 0;
   306→
   307→    // Qualified % = bucket A + B / total
   308→    const qualifiedCount = all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A' || o.bucket === 'B').length;
   309→    const qualifiedPct = all.length > 0 ? (qualifiedCount / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   310→
   311→    // Bucket A %
   312→    const bucketAPct = all.length > 0 ? (all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   313→
   314→    // Pipeline value (active)
   315→    const pipelineValue = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   316→
   317→    // Overdue follow-ups
   318→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   319→    const overdueFollowups = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   320→      o.next_meeting_at && o.next_meeting_at < now
   321→    ).length;
   322→
   323→    // Proposals sent
   324→    const proposalsSent = all.filter(o =>
   325→      ['proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'].includes(o.stage)
   326→    ).length;
   327→
   328→    // Alert metrics for manager cards
   329→    const nowDate = new Date();
   330→    const todayStart = new Date(nowDate.getFullYear(), nowDate.getMonth(), nowDate.getDate());
   331→    const weekEnd = new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
   332→    const meetingsThisWeek = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   333→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < weekEnd
   334→    ).length;
   335→    const meetingsToday = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   336→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
   337→    ).length;
   338→
   339→    // Stale deals: active pipeline deals with no contact in 7+ days
   340→    const staleDeals = pipelineActive.filter(o => {
   341→      const lastDate = o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date || o.created_at;
   342→      if (!lastDate) return true;
   343→      const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   344→      return daysSince >= 7;
   345→    }).length;
   346→
   347→    // Deals at risk: closing-stage deals (post-discovery) with temp < 40
   348→    const dealsAtRisk = all.filter(o =>
   349→      ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'].includes(o.stage) && o.temperature_score < 40
   350→    ).length;
   351→
   352→    // Total revenue (closed won value)
   353→    const totalRevenue = closedWon.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   354→
   355→    // Weighted pipeline = sum of (deal_value * stage_probability)
   356→    const stageProbability: Record<string, number> = {
   357→      cold_dm: 0.05, warm: 0.1, tg_intro: 0.15, booked: 0.25,
   358→      discovery_done: 0.4, proposal_call: 0.7, v2_contract: 0.9,
   359→    };
   360→    const weightedPipeline = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0) * (stageProbability[o.stage] || 0.1), 0);
   361→
   362→    // Bottleneck analysis
   363→    const funnelStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   364→    const stageOrder: Record<string, number> = {};
   365→    funnelStages.forEach((s, i) => { stageOrder[s] = i; });
   366→
   367→    // Count how many opps ever reached each stage (current stage or beyond)
   368→    const reachedStage = funnelStages.map(stage => {
   369→      const idx = stageOrder[stage];
   370→      // Opps currently at this stage or later (including orbit/lost which came from somewhere)
   371→      return all.filter(o => {
   372→        const oIdx = stageOrder[o.stage];
   373→        if (oIdx !== undefined) return oIdx >= idx;
   374→        // Orbit/lost — estimate their furthest stage from timestamps
   375→        if (o.stage === 'orbit' || o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost') {
   376→          if (o.proposal_sent_at && idx <= stageOrder['proposal_call']) return true;
   377→          if (o.discovery_call_at && idx <= stageOrder['discovery_done']) return true;
   378→          if (o.calendly_booked_date && idx <= stageOrder['booked']) return true;
   379→          if (o.tg_handle && idx <= stageOrder['tg_intro']) return true;
   380→          if ((o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date) && idx <= stageOrder['warm']) return true;
   381→          return idx <= stageOrder['cold_dm'];
   382→        }
   383→        return false;
   384→      }).length;
   385→    });
   386→
   387→    // Stage conversion rates (from one stage to the next)
   388→    const stageConversions = funnelStages.slice(0, -1).map((stage, i) => {
   389→      const from = reachedStage[i];
   390→      const to = reachedStage[i + 1];
   391→      const rate = from > 0 ? (to / from) * 100 : 0;
   392→      const dropoff = from - to;
   393→      return { stage, nextStage: funnelStages[i + 1], from, to, rate, dropoff };
   394→    });
   395→
   396→    // Avg days in current stage (for active pipeline deals)
   397→    const avgDaysInStage = funnelStages.slice(0, -1).map(stage => {
   398→      const oppsInStage = pipelineActive.filter(o => o.stage === stage);
   399→      if (oppsInStage.length === 0) return { stage, avgDays: 0, count: 0 };
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
   407→    // Identify the biggest bottleneck: stage with lowest conversion rate (min 3 opps entering)
   408→    const significantConversions = stageConversions.filter(c => c.from >= 3);
   409→    const worstConversion = significantConversions.length > 0
   410→      ? significantConversions.reduce((worst, c) => c.rate < worst.rate ? c : worst)
   411→      : null;

   415→    const slowestStage = significantStages.length > 0
   416→      ? significantStages.reduce((slowest, s) => s.avgDays > slowest.avgDays ? s : slowest)
   417→      : null;
```

```text
   809→
   810→  // ============================================
   811→  // DnD Handlers
   812→  // ============================================
   813→
   814→  const handleDragStart = (event: DragStartEvent) => {
   815→    const id = event.active.id as string;
   816→    setActiveId(id);
   817→    setActiveOpportunity(opportunities.find(o => o.id === id) || null);
   818→  };
   819→
   820→  const handleDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   821→    const { active, over } = event;
   822→    setActiveId(null);
   823→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
   824→
   825→    if (!over) return;
   826→
   827→    const oppId = active.id as string;
   828→    const overId = over.id as string;
   829→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === oppId);
   830→    if (!opp) return;
   831→
   832→    // Check if dropped on a stage column
   833→    const isStageColumn = ALL_V2_STAGES.includes(overId as SalesPipelineStage);
   834→
   835→    if (isStageColumn) {
   836→      const newStage = overId as SalesPipelineStage;
   837→      if (opp.stage !== newStage) {
   838→        await handleStageChange(oppId, newStage, opp.stage);
   839→      }
   840→    } else {
   841→      // Dropped on another card — reorder within same stage
   842→      const targetOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === overId);
   843→      if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage === opp.stage) {
   844→        const stageOpps = getStageOpps(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage);
   845→        const oldIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === oppId);
   846→        const newIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === overId);
   847→        if (oldIndex !== -1 && newIndex !== -1) {
   848→          const reordered = arrayMove(stageOpps, oldIndex, newIndex);
   849→          const positions = reordered.map((o, i) => ({ id: o.id, position: i }));
   850→          await SalesPipelineService.updatePositions(positions);
   851→          await fetchData();
   852→        }
   853→      } else if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage !== opp.stage) {
   854→        // Dropped on card in different stage
   855→        await handleStageChange(oppId, targetOpp.stage as SalesPipelineStage, opp.stage);
   856→      }
   857→    }
   858→  };
   859→
   860→  // ============================================
   861→  // Open slide-over
   862→  // ============================================
   863→
   864→  const openSlideOver = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity, guidance?: { label: string; hint: string }) => {
   865→    setSlideOverOpp(opp);
   866→    setSlideOverMode('view');
   867→    setActionGuidance(guidance || null);
   868→    fetchActivities(opp.id);
   869→    setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: opp.id, type: 'note', title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '', next_step_date: undefined });
   870→    setActivityMeetingDate(undefined);
   871→    setActivityMeetingTime(undefined);
   872→  };
   873→
   874→  const populateForm = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   875→    setForm({
   876→      name: opp.name,
   877→      dm_account: opp.dm_account,
   878→      bucket: opp.bucket || undefined,
   879→      temperature_score: opp.temperature_score,
   880→      source: opp.source || undefined,
   881→      tg_handle: opp.tg_handle || undefined,
   882→      poc_platform: opp.poc_platform || undefined,
   883→      poc_handle: opp.poc_handle || undefined,
   884→      owner_id: opp.owner_id || undefined,
   885→      referrer: opp.referrer || undefined,
   886→      affiliate_id: opp.affiliate_id || undefined,
   887→      deal_value: opp.deal_value || undefined,
   888→      currency: opp.currency,
   889→      next_meeting_at: opp.next_meeting_at || undefined,
   890→      next_meeting_type: opp.next_meeting_type || undefined,
   891→      notes: opp.notes || undefined,
   892→    });
   893→  };
   894→
   895→  const openEditDialog = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   896→    populateForm(opp);
   897→    if (slideOverOpp?.id === opp.id) {
   898→      // Editing from slide-over — switch to edit mode inline
   899→      setEditingOpp(opp);
   900→      setSlideOverMode('edit');
   901→    } else {
   902→      // Editing from table/kanban — open dialog
   903→      setEditingOpp(opp);
   904→    }
   905→  };
   906→
   907→  const toggleKanbanCollapse = (stage: string) => {
   908→    setCollapsedKanbanStages(prev => {
   909→      const next = new Set(prev);
   910→      next.has(stage) ? next.delete(stage) : next.add(stage);
   911→      return next;
   912→    });
   913→  };
   914→
   915→  // ============================================
   916→  // BAMFAM check
   917→  // ============================================
   918→
   919→  const isBAMFAM = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   920→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   921→    if (!postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) return false;
   922→    if (!opp.next_meeting_at) return true;
   923→    return new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) < new Date();
   924→  };
   925→
   926→  // ============================================
   927→  // Actions Tab: getNextAction helper
   928→  // ============================================
   929→
   930→  type ActionPriority = 'urgent' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low' | 'wait';
   931→  type ActionExecutionType = 'bump' | 'stage_change' | 'open_detail' | 'none';
   932→
   933→  type ActionAlternative = { label: string; actionType: ActionExecutionType; targetStage?: SalesPipelineStage; variant: 'default' | 'warn' | 'danger'; quick?: boolean };
   934→
   935→  const getNextAction = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): {
   936→    label: string;
   937→    hint: string;
   938→    priority: ActionPriority;
   939→    actionType: ActionExecutionType;
   940→    targetStage?: SalesPipelineStage;
   941→    isActionable: boolean;
   942→    sortScore: number;
   943→    alternatives: ActionAlternative[];
   944→  } => {
   945→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   946→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
   947→
   948→    // Past meeting check — if there's a meeting in the past and deal is still active, prompt to log outcome
   949→    // Skip if the opp was already updated after the meeting (rep likely already took action)
   950→    // Skip proposal_call when proposal not sent — let the switch case handle Send Proposal flow
   951→    const skipGlobalChecks = opp.stage === 'proposal_call' && !opp.proposal_sent_at;
   952→    if (!skipGlobalChecks && !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage) && opp.stage !== 'orbit' && opp.next_meeting_at) {
   953→      const meetingTime = new Date(opp.next_meeting_at);
   954→      const now = new Date();
   955→      const hoursSinceMeeting = (now.getTime() - meetingTime.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
   956→      const lastContactAfterMeeting = opp.last_contacted_at && new Date(opp.last_contacted_at) > meetingTime;
   957→      // Meeting was in the past (within 7 days), not yet logged
   958→      if (hoursSinceMeeting > 0 && hoursSinceMeeting <= 168 && !lastContactAfterMeeting) {
   959→        // For booked stage, the existing "Discovery Done" action handles this
   960→        if (opp.stage !== 'booked') {
   961→          return { label: 'Log Meeting Outcome', hint: `Meeting was ${hoursSinceMeeting < 24 ? 'today' : `${Math.floor(hoursSinceMeeting / 24)}d ago`} — record what happened`, priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 0, alternatives: [
   962→            { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   963→            { label: 'No Show', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'warn' },
   964→          ]};
   965→        }
   966→      }
   967→    }
   968→
   969→    // BAMFAM violation — any post-discovery stage with no future meeting
   970→    // Skip proposal_call when proposal not sent — handled by switch case
   971→    if (!skipGlobalChecks && postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) {
   972→      const hasFutureMeeting = opp.next_meeting_at && new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date();
   973→      if (!hasFutureMeeting) {
   974→        // Fix #4: discovery_done without proposal — show Send Proposal as primary, BAMFAM as hint
   975→        if (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && !opp.proposal_sent_at) {
   976→          return { label: 'Book Proposal Call', hint: 'Schedule a proposal call. Also book a follow-up meeting (BAMFAM).', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', isActionable: true, sortScore: 1, alternatives: [
   977→            { label: 'Book Meeting', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   978→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   979→          ]};
   980→        }
   981→        return { label: 'Book Next Meeting!', hint: 'No future meeting set — DM to schedule', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 1, alternatives: [
   982→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
   983→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   984→        ]};
   985→      }
   986→    }
   987→
   988→    switch (opp.stage) {
   989→      // Fix #2: v2_contract — "Chase Signature" as primary (open_detail), "Signed!" as quick alt
   990→      case 'v2_contract':
   991→        return { label: 'Chase Signature', hint: 'Follow up on the contract — get it signed', priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 2, alternatives: [
   992→          { label: 'Signed!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_won', variant: 'default', quick: true },
   993→          { label: 'Schedule Call', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
   994→          { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
   995→        ]};
   996→
   997→      case 'proposal_call': {
   998→        // After meeting is logged and proposal sent → move to contract
   999→        if (opp.proposal_sent_at) {
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
  1062→            { label: 'Booked!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', variant: 'default', quick: true },

  1106→        ]};
  1107→

  1110→        if (daysSinceUpdated > 90) {
  1111→          return { label: 'Resurrect', hint: '90+ days — re-engage or mark lost', priority: 'low', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 70, alternatives: [

  1113→            { label: 'Book Meeting', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', variant: 'default' },

  1119→
  1120→      case 'nurture': {

  1124→        })();
  1125→        if (daysSinceNurtureContact >= 30) {
  1126→          return { label: 'Check In', hint: `${daysSinceNurtureContact}d since last contact — send a periodic check-in`, priority: 'medium', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 65, alternatives: [
  1127→            { label: 'Back to Warm', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1128→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
  1129→          ]};

  1133→
  1134→      default:

  1136→    }
  1137→  };
  1138→
  1139→  // ============================================
  1140→  // Actions Tab: Derived action items
  1141→  // ============================================
  1142→
  1143→  const PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked'];
  1144→  const POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
  1145→
  1146→  const allActionItems = useMemo(() => {
  1147→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  1148→    return opportunities
  1149→      .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
  1150→      .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
  1151→      .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
  1152→      .sort((a, b) => {
  1153→        if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;
  1154→        return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
  1155→      });
  1156→  }, [opportunities]);
  1157→
  1158→  const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
  1159→    return allActionItems.filter(({ opp, action }) => {
  1160→      if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
  1161→      if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
  1162→      return true;
  1163→    });
  1164→  }, [allActionItems, actionFilter, user?.id]);
  1165→
  1166→  const outreachActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
  1167→  const closingActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
  1168→  const orbitActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit'), [actionItems]);
  1169→  const allOutreachCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
  1170→  const allClosingCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
  1171→  const allOrbitCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit').length, [allActionItems]);
  1172→
  1173→  // Non-urgent: all non-terminal opps that are NOT actionable (waiting state) — shows their next step
  1174→  const nonUrgentItems = useMemo(() => {
  1175→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  1176→    return opportunities
  1177→      .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
  1178→      .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
  1179→      .filter(({ action }) => !action.isActionable)
  1180→      .sort((a, b) => (a.opp.name || '').localeCompare(b.opp.name || ''));
  1181→  }, [opportunities]);
  1182→  const allNonUrgentCount = nonUrgentItems.length;
  1183→
  1184→  const displayedActions = useMemo(() => {
  1185→    let items = actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? outreachActions
  1186→      : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? closingActions
  1187→      : actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? orbitActions
  1188→      : actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? nonUrgentItems
  1189→      : actionItems;
  1190→
  1191→    if (actionSort === 'priority' && actionPhaseFilter !== 'non_urgent') return items;
  1192→    const stageIdx: Record<string, number> = {};
  1193→    [...PIPELINE_STAGES, 'orbit', 'nurture', 'v2_closed_lost'].forEach((s, i) => { stageIdx[s] = i; });
  1194→
  1195→    return [...items].sort((a, b) => {
  1196→      switch (actionSort) {
  1197→        case 'stage': return (stageIdx[a.opp.stage] ?? 99) - (stageIdx[b.opp.stage] ?? 99);
  1198→        case 'temperature': return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
  1199→        case 'value': return (b.opp.deal_value || 0) - (a.opp.deal_value || 0);
```

```text
  1200→        case 'name': return (a.opp.name || '').localeCompare(b.opp.name || '');
  1201→        case 'newest': return new Date(b.opp.created_at).getTime() - new Date(a.opp.created_at).getTime();
  1202→        case 'oldest': return new Date(a.opp.created_at).getTime() - new Date(b.opp.created_at).getTime();
  1203→        default: return 0;
  1204→      }
  1205→    });
  1206→  }, [actionPhaseFilter, outreachActions, closingActions, orbitActions, actionItems, nonUrgentItems, actionSort]);
  1207→
  1208→  // ============================================
  1209→  // Actions Tab: Execute handler
  1210→  // ============================================
  1211→
  1212→  const ACTION_GUIDANCE: Record<string, { label: string; hint: string }> = {
  1213→    'Book Next Meeting!': { label: 'Book Next Meeting', hint: 'Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field. No deal should exist without a future meeting (BAMFAM).' },
  1214→    'Book Meeting': { label: 'Book Meeting', hint: 'Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field to stay BAMFAM-compliant.' },
  1215→    'Get TG Handle': { label: 'Get TG Handle', hint: 'DM them asking for their Telegram handle, then click Edit → fill in the TG Handle field. Once entered, click "Got TG!" to advance.' },
  1216→    'Follow Up': { label: 'Follow Up', hint: 'Send a follow-up DM. After messaging, log it as an activity below so the team knows.' },
  1217→    'Schedule Meeting': { label: 'Schedule Meeting', hint: 'Send Calendly or propose a time. Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field once confirmed.' },
  1218→    'Prep for Meeting': { label: 'Prep for Meeting', hint: 'Review their notes, bucket, and past activity below. Update Notes with talking points before the call.' },
  1219→    'Follow Up Proposal': { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Message them to check if they reviewed the proposal. Log their response as an activity below.' },
  1220→    'Send Proposal': { label: 'Send Proposal', hint: 'Draft & send the pricing proposal based on discovery call notes. This will mark the proposal as sent.' },
  1221→    'Need More Info': { label: 'Need More Info', hint: 'They need more details before a proposal. Add notes on what they need, then follow up.' },
  1222→    'Resurrect': { label: 'Resurrect Check', hint: 'It\'s been 90+ days. Review their notes — DM to re-engage, or move to Lost if no longer viable.' },
  1223→    'Chase Signature': { label: 'Chase Signature', hint: 'Follow up on the contract. Once they sign, use the "Signed!" button to close the deal.' },
  1224→    'Schedule Call': { label: 'Schedule Call', hint: 'Book a call to discuss the contract. Click Edit → set the Next Meeting date field.' },
  1225→    'Log Meeting Outcome': { label: 'Log Meeting Outcome', hint: 'A meeting just happened — add an activity below with the outcome, key takeaways, and next steps. Update the Next Meeting date if another was scheduled.' },
  1226→    'Reschedule': { label: 'Reschedule Meeting', hint: 'Meeting needs rescheduling. Click the pencil icon (Edit) → update the Next Meeting date field.' },
  1227→    'No Show': { label: 'No Show', hint: 'They didn\'t show up. Log a "No Show" activity below and decide whether to reschedule or orbit.' },
  1228→    'Keep Bumping': { label: 'Keep Bumping', hint: 'Override the orbit suggestion — review notes and continue follow-up DMs.' },
  1229→    'Re-engage or Orbit': { label: 'Re-engage', hint: 'It\'s been 7+ days with no progress on TG. Send them a nudge — if still no reply, consider orbiting.' },
  1230→    'Update Stage': { label: 'Fix Stage', hint: 'Proposal was already sent but this deal is still in Discovery Done. Move it to the correct stage.' },
  1231→    'Check In': { label: 'Nurture Check-In', hint: 'It\'s been 30+ days. Send a light touch — share content, ask how things are going, or see if timing is better now.' },
  1232→  };
  1233→
  1234→  const openActivityLogPrompt = (oppId: string, oppName: string, type: ActivityType, title: string, showMeetingPicker?: boolean) => {
  1235→    setActivityLogPrompt({ oppId, oppName, type, title, showMeetingPicker });
  1236→    setActivityLogForm({ title, description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '', meeting_date: undefined, meeting_time: undefined, next_step_date: undefined });
  1237→  };
  1238→
  1239→  const handleActionExecute = async (oppId: string, action: ReturnType<typeof getNextAction>, opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
  1240→    setExecutingAction(oppId);
  1241→    try {
  1242→      if (action.actionType === 'bump') {
  1243→        await handleRecordBump(oppId);
  1244→        // Show activity log popup after bump
  1245→        const bumpTitle = action.label === 'Send First DM' ? 'First DM sent' : `${action.label} sent`;
  1246→        openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'message', bumpTitle);
  1247→      } else if (action.actionType === 'stage_change' && action.targetStage) {
  1248→        await handleStageChange(oppId, action.targetStage, opp.stage);
  1249→        // Skip activity log for stages that have their own prompts (orbit, closed_lost, tg_intro, discovery_done)
  1250→        const stagesWithOwnPrompts = ['orbit', 'v2_closed_lost', 'tg_intro', 'discovery_done'];
  1251→        if (!stagesWithOwnPrompts.includes(action.targetStage)) {
  1252→          const stageActivityMap: Record<string, { type: ActivityType; title: string; showMeetingPicker?: boolean }> = {
  1253→            'warm': { type: 'message', title: 'KOL replied' },
  1254→            'booked': { type: 'meeting', title: 'Meeting booked', showMeetingPicker: true },
  1255→            'proposal_call': { type: 'call', title: 'Proposal call set', showMeetingPicker: true },
  1256→            'v2_contract': { type: 'call', title: 'Moving to contract' },
  1257→            'v2_closed_won': { type: 'note', title: 'Deal closed won!' },
  1258→          };
  1259→          const mapping = stageActivityMap[action.targetStage];
  1260→          if (mapping) {
  1261→            openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, mapping.type, mapping.title, mapping.showMeetingPicker);
  1262→          }
  1263→        }
  1264→      } else {
  1265→        // open_detail actions
  1266→        if (action.label === 'Book Next Meeting!' || action.label === 'Schedule Meeting') {
  1267→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'meeting', 'Meeting scheduled', true);
  1268→        } else if (action.label === 'Log Meeting Outcome') {
  1269→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'meeting', 'Meeting outcome', false);
  1270→        } else if (action.label === 'Send Proposal') {
  1271→          // Mark proposal as sent, then show activity log
  1272→          await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, { proposal_sent_at: new Date().toISOString() } as any);
  1273→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'proposal', 'Proposal sent');
  1274→          await fetchData();
  1275→        } else {
  1276→          const guidance = ACTION_GUIDANCE[action.label];
  1277→          openSlideOver(opp, guidance);
  1278→        }
  1279→      }
  1280→    } finally {
  1281→      setExecutingAction(null);
  1282→    }
  1283→  };
  1284→
  1285→  const confirmActivityLog = async () => {
  1286→    if (!activityLogPrompt) return;
  1287→    setIsActivityLogSubmitting(true);
  1288→    try {
  1289→      // Create the activity
  1290→      await SalesPipelineService.createActivity({
  1291→        opportunity_id: activityLogPrompt.oppId,
  1292→        type: activityLogPrompt.type,
  1293→        title: activityLogForm.title || activityLogPrompt.title,
  1294→        description: activityLogForm.description || undefined,
  1295→        outcome: activityLogForm.outcome || undefined,
  1296→        next_step: activityLogForm.next_step || undefined,
  1297→        next_step_date: activityLogForm.next_step_date || undefined,
  1298→      });
  1299→      // Always update last_contacted_at so past-meeting checks know the outcome was handled
  1300→      const activityUpdate: any = { last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString() };
  1301→      // If meeting picker was shown and a date was set, also update next_meeting_at
  1302→      if (activityLogPrompt.showMeetingPicker && activityLogForm.meeting_date) {
  1303→        const meetingDate = new Date(activityLogForm.meeting_date);
  1304→        if (activityLogForm.meeting_time) {
  1305→          const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':').map(Number);
  1306→          meetingDate.setHours(h, m, 0, 0);
  1307→        }
  1308→        activityUpdate.next_meeting_at = meetingDate.toISOString();
  1309→      }
  1310→      await SalesPipelineService.update(activityLogPrompt.oppId, activityUpdate);
  1311→      setActivityLogPrompt(null);
  1312→      setActivityLogForm({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '', meeting_date: undefined, meeting_time: undefined, next_step_date: undefined });
  1313→      await fetchData();
  1314→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
  1315→    } catch (err) {
  1316→      console.error('Error logging activity:', err);
  1317→    } finally {
  1318→      setIsActivityLogSubmitting(false);
  1319→    }
  1320→  };
  1321→
  1322→  // ============================================
  1323→  // Helpers
  1324→  // ============================================
  1325→
  1326→  const getUserName = (userId: string | null) => {
  1327→    if (!userId) return '—';
  1328→    const u = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
  1329→    return u?.name || u?.email || '—';
  1330→  };
  1331→
  1332→  const activityIcon = (type: ActivityType) => {
  1333→    switch (type) {
  1334→      case 'call': return <Phone className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1335→      case 'message': return <MessageSquare className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1336→      case 'meeting': return <Calendar className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1337→      case 'proposal': return <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1338→      case 'note': return <StickyNote className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1339→      case 'bump': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
  1340→    }
  1341→  };
  1342→
  1343→  // ============================================
  1344→  // RENDER: Opportunity Card (Kanban)
  1345→  // ============================================
  1346→
  1347→  const renderCard = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity, isDragging: boolean = false) => {
  1348→    const colors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  1349→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
  1350→
  1351→    return (
  1352→      <Card
  1353→        className={`group hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 border-l-4 ${colors.border} ${isDragging ? 'shadow-lg ring-2 ring-blue-400 opacity-90' : ''} ${bamfam ? 'bg-red-50/30' : ''}`}
  1354→        onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  1355→      >
  1356→        <CardContent className="p-4">
  1357→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
  1358→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
  1359→              {/* Name with drag handle */}
  1360→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1361→                <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing" />
  1362→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
  1363→                <p className="font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{opp.name}</p>
  1364→              </div>
  1365→
  1366→              {/* Deal Value */}
  1367→              {opp.deal_value && (
  1368→                <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-600 mt-2">
  1369→                  ${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()}
  1370→                </p>
  1371→              )}
  1372→
  1373→              {/* Badges */}
  1374→              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-2">
  1375→                {opp.bucket && (
  1376→                  <Badge className={`text-xs ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
  1377→                    Bucket {opp.bucket}
  1378→                  </Badge>
  1379→                )}
  1380→                {opp.dm_account === 'closer' && (
  1381→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white border-blue-300 text-blue-600">Closer</Badge>
  1382→                )}
  1383→                {opp.dm_account === 'sdr' && (
  1384→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white border-green-300 text-green-600">SDR</Badge>
  1385→                )}
  1386→                {opp.source && (
  1387→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white capitalize">
  1388→                    {opp.source.replace('_', ' ')}
  1389→                  </Badge>
  1390→                )}
  1391→              </div>
  1392→
  1393→              {/* Details */}
  1394→              <div className="mt-3 space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
  1395→                {/* Bump progress (cold_dm only) */}
  1396→                {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
  1397→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1398→                    <Zap className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 text-sky-500" />
  1399→                    <span>Bump {opp.bump_number}/4</span>
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
  1482→
  1483→  const renderKanban = () => (

  1485→      <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 h-full">
  1486→        {visiblePipelineStages.map(stage => {

  1488→          const colors = STAGE_COLORS[stage];
  1489→          const isCollapsed = collapsedKanbanStages.has(stage);

  1491→
  1492→          return (
  1493→            <div
  1494→              key={stage}
  1495→              className={`${isCollapsed ? 'w-12' : 'flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]'} flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200`}
  1496→            >
  1497→              {/* Column Header */}
  1498→              <div
  1499→                className={`${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none`}
  1500→                onClick={() => toggleKanbanCollapse(stage)}
  1501→              >
  1502→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  1503→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1504→                    {isCollapsed ? (
  1505→                      <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1506→                    ) : (
  1507→                      <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1508→                    )}
  1509→                    {!isCollapsed && (
  1510→                      <>
  1511→                        <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{STAGE_LABELS[stage]}</h4>
  1512→                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
  1513→                      </>
  1514→                    )}
  1515→                  </div>
  1516→                </div>
  1517→                {!isCollapsed && stageValue > 0 && (
  1518→                  <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 mt-1">
  1519→                    ${stageValue.toLocaleString()}
  1520→                  </p>
  1521→                )}
  1522→                {isCollapsed && (
  1523→                  <div className="mt-2 flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
  1524→                    <span className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`} style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
  1525→                      {STAGE_LABELS[stage]}
  1526→                    </span>
  1527→                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
  1528→                  </div>
  1529→                )}
  1530→              </div>
  1531→
  1532→              {/* Column Content - Droppable Area */}
  1533→              {!isCollapsed && (
  1534→                <DroppableColumn id={stage} className={`flex-1 bg-gray-50/50 border border-gray-200 border-t-0 rounded-b-lg p-3 space-y-3 overflow-y-auto transition-colors`}>
  1535→                  <SortableContext items={stageOpps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
  1536→                    {stageOpps.length === 0 ? (
  1537→                      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-24 text-sm text-gray-400">
  1538→                        No opportunities
  1539→                      </div>
  1540→                    ) : (

  1544→                        </SortableCard>

  1546→                    )}
  1547→                  </SortableContext>
  1548→                </DroppableColumn>
  1549→              )}
  1550→            </div>
  1551→          );
  1552→        })}
  1553→
  1554→        {/* Orbit drop zone */}
  1555→        <div className="w-12 flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200">
  1556→          <DroppableColumn id="orbit" className="rounded-lg px-4 py-3 bg-orange-50 border border-orange-200 flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none">
  1557→            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">

  1559→              <span className="font-semibold text-orange-700 mt-2" style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
  1560→                Orbit
  1561→              </span>
  1562→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">{orbitOpps.length}</Badge>
  1563→            </div>

  1565→        </div>
  1566→

  1569→          <DroppableColumn id="v2_closed_lost" className="rounded-lg px-4 py-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none">
  1570→            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
  1571→              <X className="w-4 h-4 text-red-700" />
  1572→              <span className="font-semibold text-red-700 mt-2" style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
  1573→                Lost
  1574→              </span>

  1577→              </Badge>
  1578→            </div>
  1579→          </DroppableColumn>
  1580→        </div>
  1581→      </div>
  1582→
  1583→      <DragOverlay>
  1584→        {activeOpportunity ? (
  1585→          <div className="w-[280px]">
  1586→            {renderCard(activeOpportunity, true)}
  1587→          </div>
  1588→        ) : null}
  1589→      </DragOverlay>
  1590→    </DndContext>
  1591→  );
  1592→

  1595→  // ============================================
  1596→
  1597→  const renderTable = () => (
  1598→    <div className="pb-8">
  1599→      <DndContext sensors={sensors} collisionDetection={closestCenter} onDragStart={handleDragStart} onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}>
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
  1818→  // ============================================
  1819→  // RENDER: Outreach Tab
  1820→  // ============================================
  1821→
  1822→  const outreachTotalPages = Math.ceil(outreachTotal / OUTREACH_PAGE_SIZE);
  1823→  const outreachStart = (outreachPage - 1) * OUTREACH_PAGE_SIZE + 1;
  1824→  const outreachEnd = Math.min(outreachPage * OUTREACH_PAGE_SIZE, outreachTotal);
  1825→
  1826→  const handleOutreachSearch = (value: string) => {
  1827→    if (outreachSearchTimeout.current) clearTimeout(outreachSearchTimeout.current);
  1828→    outreachSearchTimeout.current = setTimeout(() => {
  1829→      setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, searchTerm: value }));
  1830→      setOutreachPage(1);
  1831→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1832→    }, 400);
  1833→  };
  1834→
  1835→  const handleBulkBump = async () => {
  1836→    if (selectedOutreach.length === 0 || isBulkBumping) return;
  1837→    setIsBulkBumping(true);
  1838→    try {
  1839→      await SalesPipelineService.bulkRecordBump(selectedOutreach);
  1840→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1841→      await fetchOutreach();
  1842→      await fetchData();
  1843→    } catch (err: any) {
  1844→      console.error('Error bulk bumping:', err);
  1845→      alert(err.message || 'Error bumping selected opportunities');
  1846→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1847→    } finally {
  1848→      setIsBulkBumping(false);
  1849→    }
  1850→  };
  1851→
  1852→  const handleBulkMoveToWarm = async () => {
  1853→    if (selectedOutreach.length === 0 || isBulkMoving) return;
  1854→    setIsBulkMoving(true);
  1855→    try {
  1856→      await SalesPipelineService.bulkUpdateStage(selectedOutreach, 'warm');
  1857→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1858→      await fetchOutreach();
  1859→      await fetchData();
  1860→    } catch (err: any) {
  1861→      console.error('Error bulk moving to warm:', err);
  1862→      alert(err.message || 'Error moving selected opportunities to warm');
  1863→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1864→    } finally {
  1865→      setIsBulkMoving(false);
  1866→    }
  1867→  };
  1868→
  1869→  const handleBulkDelete = async () => {
  1870→    if (selectedOutreach.length === 0) return;
  1871→    if (!confirm(`Delete ${selectedOutreach.length} selected opportunities? This cannot be undone.`)) return;
  1872→    try {
  1873→      await SalesPipelineService.bulkDelete(selectedOutreach);
  1874→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1875→      await fetchOutreach();
  1876→      await fetchData();
  1877→    } catch (err: any) {
  1878→      console.error('Error bulk deleting:', err);
  1879→      alert(err.message || 'Error deleting selected opportunities');
  1880→      setSelectedOutreach([]);
  1881→    }
  1882→  };
  1883→
  1884→  const toggleOutreachSelect = (id: string) => {
  1885→    setSelectedOutreach(prev =>
  1886→      prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(x => x !== id) : [...prev, id]
  1887→    );
  1888→  };
  1889→
  1890→  const selectAllOnPage = () => {
  1891→    setSelectedOutreach(outreachOpps.map(o => o.id));
  1892→  };
  1893→
  1894→  const renderOutreachTab = () => (
  1895→    <div className="pb-8">
  1896→      {/* Owner sub-tabs */}
  1897→      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-4">
  1898→        <button
  1899→          onClick={() => { setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, owner_id: 'mine' })); setOutreachPage(1); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1900→          className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  1901→            outreachFilters.owner_id === 'mine'
  1902→              ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'

  1904→          }`}
  1905→        >
  1906→          My Outreach
  1907→        </button>
  1908→        <button
  1909→          onClick={() => { setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, owner_id: undefined })); setOutreachPage(1); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}

  1911→            !outreachFilters.owner_id
  1912→              ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  1913→              : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  1914→          }`}
  1915→        >
  1916→          All Owners
  1917→          <span className="ml-1.5 text-[10px] font-semibold opacity-70">{outreachAllTotal}</span>
  1918→        </button>
  1919→        {users.filter(u => u.id !== user?.id).map(u => (
  1920→          <button
  1921→            key={u.id}
  1922→            onClick={() => { setOutreachFilters(prev => ({ ...prev, owner_id: u.id })); setOutreachPage(1); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  1923→            className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  1924→              outreachFilters.owner_id === u.id
  1925→                ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  1926→                : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  1927→            }`}
  1928→          >
  1929→            {u.name || u.email}
  1930→          </button>
  1931→        ))}
  1932→      </div>
  1933→
  1934→      {/* Filters */}
  1935→      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 flex-wrap">
  1936→        <div className="relative flex-1 min-w-[200px] max-w-xs">
  1937→          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1938→          <Input
  1939→            placeholder="Search cold DMs..."
  1940→            defaultValue={outreachFilters.searchTerm}
  1941→            onChange={e => handleOutreachSearch(e.target.value)}
  1942→            className="pl-9 h-9 text-sm auth-input"
  1943→          />

  1945→        <Select

  1949→          <SelectTrigger className="h-9 w-auto text-sm auth-input [&>span]:truncate-none [&>span]:line-clamp-none">
  1950→            <SelectValue />

  1957→        </Select>
  1958→        <Select
  1959→          value={outreachFilters.bucket || 'all'}
```

```text
  2020→            className="h-7 text-xs text-red-600 border-red-200 hover:bg-red-50"
  2021→            onClick={handleBulkDelete}
  2022→          >
  2023→            <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Delete
  2024→          </Button>
  2025→        </div>
  2026→      )}
  2027→
  2028→      {/* Stage Header — matching pipeline table section headers */}
  2029→      <div className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-sky-50 rounded-t-lg border border-sky-200 border-b-0`}>
  2030→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2031→          <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4 text-sky-700" />
  2032→          <h4 className="font-semibold text-sky-700">Cold DM</h4>
  2033→          <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{outreachTotal}</Badge>
  2034→        </div>
  2035→        {outreachTotalPages > 1 && (
  2036→          <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
  2037→            Page {outreachPage} of {outreachTotalPages}
  2038→          </span>
  2039→        )}
  2040→      </div>
  2041→
  2042→      {/* Table */}
  2043→      {outreachLoading ? (
  2044→        <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0 p-4 space-y-2">
  2045→          {Array.from({ length: 10 }).map((_, i) => (
  2046→            <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full" />
  2047→          ))}
  2048→        </div>
  2049→      ) : (
  2050→        <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
  2051→          <Table>
  2052→            <TableHeader>
  2053→              <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  2054→                <TableHead className="w-10"></TableHead>
  2055→                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  2056→                <TableHead className="w-[150px]">POC</TableHead>
  2057→                <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Bumps</TableHead>
  2058→                <TableHead className="w-[150px]">TG Handle</TableHead>
  2059→                <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Source</TableHead>
  2060→                <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
  2061→                <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Created</TableHead>
  2062→                <TableHead className="w-[130px]">Last Bump</TableHead>
  2063→                <TableHead className="w-[50px]"></TableHead>
  2064→              </TableRow>
  2065→            </TableHeader>
  2066→            <TableBody>
  2067→              {outreachOpps.length === 0 ? (
  2068→                <TableRow>
  2069→                  <TableCell colSpan={10} className="text-center text-sm text-gray-400 py-8">
  2070→                    No opportunities in this stage
  2071→                  </TableCell>
  2072→                </TableRow>
  2073→              ) : outreachOpps.map((opp, index) => {
  2074→                const isChecked = selectedOutreach.includes(opp.id);
  2075→                const rowNum = outreachStart + index;
  2076→                return (
  2077→                  <TableRow
  2078→                    key={opp.id}
  2079→                    className="group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer"
  2080→                    onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  2081→                  >
  2082→                    <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-sm w-10" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  2083→                      <div className="flex items-center justify-center">
  2084→                        {isChecked ? (
  2085→                          <Checkbox
  2086→                            checked={true}
  2087→                            onCheckedChange={() => toggleOutreachSelect(opp.id)}
  2088→                          />
  2089→                        ) : (
  2090→                          <>
  2091→                            <span className="block group-hover:hidden text-xs">{rowNum}</span>
  2092→                            <span className="hidden group-hover:flex">
  2093→                              <Checkbox
  2094→                                checked={false}
  2095→                                onCheckedChange={() => toggleOutreachSelect(opp.id)}
  2096→                              />
  2097→                            </span>
  2098→                          </>
  2099→                        )}
  2100→                      </div>
  2101→                    </TableCell>
  2102→                    <TableCell>
  2103→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1">
  2104→                        <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  2105→                        <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  2106→                      </div>
  2107→                    </TableCell>
  2108→                    <TableCell className="whitespace-nowrap">
  2109→                      {opp.poc_handle ? (
  2110→                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  2111→                          <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 capitalize">{opp.poc_platform || 'other'}</Badge>
  2112→                          <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">{opp.poc_handle}</span>
  2113→                        </div>
  2114→                      ) : (
  2115→                        <span className="text-gray-400">—</span>
  2116→                      )}
  2117→                    </TableCell>
  2118→                    <TableCell>
  2119→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2120→                        <span className="text-sm">{opp.bump_number}/4</span>
  2121→                        <div className="flex gap-0.5">
  2122→                          {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
  2123→                            <div key={i} className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`} />
  2124→                          ))}
  2125→                        </div>
  2126→                      </div>
  2127→                    </TableCell>
  2128→                    <TableCell className="text-gray-500 whitespace-nowrap">{opp.tg_handle || '—'}</TableCell>
  2129→                    <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-xs capitalize">{opp.source?.replace('_', ' ') || '—'}</TableCell>
  2130→                    <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
  2131→                    <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-xs">
  2132→                      {opp.created_at ? format(new Date(opp.created_at), 'MMM d') : '—'}
  2133→                    </TableCell>
  2134→                    <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-xs" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  2135→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  2136→                        <span>{opp.last_bump_date ? formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_bump_date), { addSuffix: true }) : '—'}</span>
  2137→                        <div className="relative group/bump inline-flex">
  2138→                          <Button
  2139→                            variant="ghost"
  2140→                            size="sm"
  2141→                            className="h-6 px-1.5 text-sky-600 hover:text-sky-700 hover:bg-sky-50"
  2142→                            onClick={() => handleRecordBump(opp.id)}
  2143→                            disabled={isBumping}
  2144→                          >
  2145→                            <Zap className="h-3 w-3" />
  2146→                          </Button>
  2147→                          <div className="absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 text-white text-[11px] rounded-md whitespace-nowrap opacity-0 pointer-events-none group-hover/bump:opacity-100 transition-opacity z-50" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }}>
  2148→                            Record bump #{opp.bump_number + 1}
  2149→                            <div className="absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 border-4 border-transparent" style={{ borderTopColor: '#3e8692' }} />
  2150→                          </div>
  2151→                        </div>
  2152→                      </div>
  2153→                    </TableCell>
  2154→                    <TableCell onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  2155→                      <DropdownMenu>
  2156→                        <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  2157→                          <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
  2158→                            <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
  2159→                          </Button>
  2160→                        </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  2161→                        <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48 z-[80]">
  2162→                          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleRecordBump(opp.id); }}>
  2163→                            <Zap className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Record Bump
  2164→                          </DropdownMenuItem>
  2165→                          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleStageChange(opp.id, 'warm', opp.stage); }}>
  2166→                            <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Move to Warm
  2167→                          </DropdownMenuItem>
  2168→                          <DropdownMenuSeparator />
  2169→                          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditDialog(opp); }}>
  2170→                            <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Edit
  2171→                          </DropdownMenuItem>
  2172→                          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDelete(opp.id); }} className="text-red-600">
  2173→                            <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Delete
  2174→                          </DropdownMenuItem>
  2175→                        </DropdownMenuContent>
  2176→                      </DropdownMenu>
  2177→                    </TableCell>
  2178→                  </TableRow>
  2179→                );
  2180→              })}
  2181→            </TableBody>
  2182→          </Table>
  2183→        </div>
  2184→      )}
  2185→
  2186→      {/* Pagination */}
  2187→      {outreachTotalPages > 1 && (
  2188→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-4 px-1">
  2189→          <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
  2190→            Showing {outreachStart}-{outreachEnd} of {outreachTotal}
  2191→          </div>
  2192→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2193→            <Button
  2194→              variant="outline"
  2195→              size="sm"
  2196→              onClick={() => { setOutreachPage(p => Math.max(1, p - 1)); setSelectedOutreach([]); }}
  2197→              disabled={outreachPage === 1}
  2198→              className="flex items-center gap-1"
  2199→            >
```
</details></tool-use>
