  2245→  // ============================================
  2246→  // RENDER: Actions Tab
  2247→  // ============================================
  2248→
  2249→  const renderActionsTab = () => {
  2250→    const getPriorityIcon = (priority: ActionPriority) => {
  2251→      switch (priority) {
  2252→        case 'urgent': return <AlertTriangle className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />;
  2253→        case 'high': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-amber-500" />;
  2254→        case 'medium': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-500" />;
  2255→        case 'low': return <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400" />;
  2256→        default: return null;
  2257→      }
  2258→    };
  2259→
  2260→    const getButtonVariant = (priority: ActionPriority): 'destructive' | 'default' | 'outline' => {
  2261→      if (priority === 'urgent') return 'destructive';
  2262→      if (priority === 'high') return 'default';
  2263→      return 'outline';
  2264→    };
  2265→
  2266→    const getTimingInfo = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity): { text: string; color: string } => {
  2267→      const daysAgo = (date: string | null) => {
  2268→        if (!date) return null;
  2269→        return Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  2270→      };
  2271→      const daysUntil = (date: string | null) => {
  2272→        if (!date) return null;
  2273→        return Math.ceil((new Date(date).getTime() - Date.now()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  2274→      };
  2275→
  2276→      // Cold DM — show last bump timing
  2277→      if (opp.stage === 'cold_dm') {
  2278→        if (opp.bump_number === 0) return { text: 'Not bumped', color: 'text-gray-500' };
  2279→        const d = daysAgo(opp.last_bump_date);
  2280→        if (d === null) return { text: `${opp.bump_number}/4 bumps`, color: 'text-gray-500' };
  2281→        return {
  2282→          text: `Bumped ${d}d ago`,
  2283→          color: d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  2284→        };
  2285→      }
  2286→
  2287→      // Stages with next_meeting — show meeting timing
  2288→      if (opp.next_meeting_at) {
  2289→        const d = daysUntil(opp.next_meeting_at);
  2290→        if (d !== null) {
  2291→          if (d < 0) return { text: `Meeting ${Math.abs(d)}d ago`, color: 'text-red-500 font-medium' };
  2292→          if (d === 0) return { text: 'Meeting today', color: 'text-blue-600 font-medium' };
  2293→          return { text: `Meeting in ${d}d`, color: d <= 2 ? 'text-blue-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  2294→        }
  2295→      }
  2296→
  2297→      // Proposal sent — show how long ago
  2298→      if (opp.stage === 'proposal_call' || (opp.stage === 'discovery_done' && opp.proposal_sent_at)) {
  2299→        const d = daysAgo(opp.proposal_sent_at);
  2300→        if (d !== null) return {
  2301→          text: `Sent ${d}d ago`,
  2302→          color: d >= 5 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500',
  2303→        };
  2304→      }
  2305→
  2306→      // Orbit — show time in orbit
  2307→      if (opp.stage === 'orbit') {
  2308→        const d = daysAgo(opp.updated_at);
  2309→        if (d !== null) return { text: `${d}d in orbit`, color: d > 90 ? 'text-amber-500 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500' };
  2310→      }
  2311→
  2312→      // Default — days since last contact
  2313→      const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
  2314→      const d = daysAgo(lastDate);
  2315→      if (d === null) return { text: '—', color: 'text-gray-400' };
  2316→      return {
  2317→        text: `${d}d silent`,
  2318→        color: d >= 7 ? 'text-red-500 font-medium' : d >= 3 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-500',
  2319→      };
  2320→    };
  2321→
  2322→    const currentItems = displayedActions;
  2323→    const emptyLabel = actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? 'No outreach actions needed' :
  2324→      actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? 'No closing actions needed' :
  2325→      actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? 'No orbit actions needed' :
  2326→      actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? 'No opportunities in waiting state' :
  2327→      'No actions needed right now';
  2328→
  2329→    return (
  2330→      <div className="pb-8">
  2331→        {/* Top row: Owner filter + Phase tabs */}
  2332→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
  2333→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2334→            {([
  2335→              { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All Actions' },
  2336→              { key: 'mine' as const, label: 'My Actions' },
  2337→              { key: 'urgent' as const, label: 'Urgent Only' },
  2338→            ]).map(f => (
  2339→              <button
  2340→                key={f.key}
  2341→                onClick={() => setActionFilter(f.key)}
  2342→                className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  2343→                  actionFilter === f.key
  2344→                    ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
  2345→                    : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
  2346→                }`}
  2347→              >
  2348→                {f.label}
  2349→              </button>
  2350→            ))}
  2351→          </div>
  2352→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-0.5">
  2353→            {([
  2354→              { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All', count: allActionItems.length },
  2355→              { key: 'outreach' as const, label: 'Outreach', count: allOutreachCount },
  2356→              { key: 'closing' as const, label: 'Closing', count: allClosingCount },
  2357→              { key: 'orbit' as const, label: 'Orbit', count: allOrbitCount },
  2358→              { key: 'non_urgent' as const, label: 'Waiting', count: allNonUrgentCount },
  2359→            ]).map(p => (
  2360→              <button
  2361→                key={p.key}
  2362→                onClick={() => setActionPhaseFilter(p.key)}
  2363→                className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
  2364→                  actionPhaseFilter === p.key
  2365→                    ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm'
  2366→                    : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
  2367→                }`}
  2368→              >
  2369→                {p.key === 'outreach' && <Send className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2370→                {p.key === 'closing' && <Target className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2371→                {p.key === 'orbit' && <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2372→                {p.key === 'all' && <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2373→                {p.key === 'non_urgent' && <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
  2374→                {p.label}
  2375→                <span className={`ml-0.5 text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 rounded-full ${
  2376→                  actionPhaseFilter === p.key ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700' : 'bg-transparent text-gray-400'
  2377→                }`}>{p.count}</span>
  2378→              </button>
  2379→            ))}
  2380→          </div>
  2381→        </div>
  2382→
  2383→        {/* Section Header */}
  2384→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-violet-50 rounded-t-lg border border-violet-200 border-b-0">
  2385→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2386→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? <Send className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? <Target className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? <RotateCcw className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" /> : <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-violet-700" />}
  2387→            <h4 className="font-semibold text-violet-700">
  2388→              {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? 'Outreach Actions' : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? 'Closing Actions' : actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? 'Orbit Actions' : actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? 'Waiting — Next Steps' : 'All Action Items'}
  2389→            </h4>
  2390→            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? allNonUrgentCount : allActionItems.length}</Badge>
  2391→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' && (

  2394→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' && (

  2397→            {actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' && (

  2399→            )}

  2429→            </DropdownMenuContent>
  2430→          </DropdownMenu>
  2431→        </div>
  2432→
  2433→        {/* Table */}
  2434→        <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
  2435→          <Table>
  2436→            <TableHeader>
  2437→              <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  2438→                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  2439→                <TableHead className="w-[140px]">Stage</TableHead>
  2440→                <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
  2441→                <TableHead className="w-[260px]">Next Action</TableHead>
  2442→                <TableHead className="w-[120px]">Timing</TableHead>
  2443→                <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
  2444→                <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
  2445→                <TableHead className="w-[150px]"></TableHead>
  2446→              </TableRow>
  2447→            </TableHeader>
  2448→            <TableBody>
  2449→              {currentItems.length === 0 ? (
  2450→                <TableRow>
  2451→                  <TableCell colSpan={8} className="text-center py-12">
  2452→                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-gray-400">
  2453→                      <Zap className="h-8 w-8" />
  2454→                      <p className="text-sm font-medium">{emptyLabel}</p>
  2455→                      <p className="text-xs">All caught up — check back later</p>
  2456→                    </div>
  2457→                  </TableCell>
  2458→                </TableRow>
  2459→              ) : currentItems.map(({ opp, action }) => {
  2460→                const timing = getTimingInfo(opp);
  2461→                const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  2462→                return (
  2463→                  <TableRow
  2464→                    key={opp.id}
  2465→                    className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer ${action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'bg-red-50/40' : ''}`}
  2466→                    onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
  2467→                  >
  2468→                    <TableCell>
  2469→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2470→                        <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  2471→                        <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  2472→                      </div>
  2473→                    </TableCell>
  2474→                    <TableCell>
  2475→                      <span className={`inline-flex items-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} ${stageColors.border}`}>
  2476→                        {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
  2477→                      </span>
  2478→                    </TableCell>
  2479→                    <TableCell>
  2480→                      {opp.bucket && (
  2481→                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text}`}>
  2482→                          {opp.bucket}
  2483→                        </span>
  2484→                      )}
  2485→                    </TableCell>
  2486→                    <TableCell>
  2487→                      <div>
  2488→                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  2489→                          {getPriorityIcon(action.priority)}
  2490→                          <span className={`text-sm font-medium ${
  2491→                            action.priority === 'urgent' ? 'text-red-700' :
  2492→                            action.priority === 'high' ? 'text-amber-700' :
  2493→                            'text-gray-600'
  2494→                          }`}>
  2495→                            {action.label}
  2496→                          </span>
  2497→                        </div>
  2498→                        {action.hint && (
  2499→                          <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5 ml-5">{action.hint}</p>
  2500→                        )}
  2501→                      </div>
  2502→                    </TableCell>
  2503→                    <TableCell>
  2504→                      <span className={`text-xs ${timing.color}`}>{timing.text}</span>
  2505→                    </TableCell>
  2506→                    <TableCell>
  2507→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2508→                        <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  2509→                          <div
  2510→                            className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
  2511→                            style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  2512→                          />
  2513→                        </div>
  2514→                        <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
  2515→                      </div>
  2516→                    </TableCell>
  2517→                    <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
  2518→                    <TableCell onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
  2519→                      {(() => {
  2520→                        const quickAlt = action.alternatives.find(a => a.quick);
  2521→                        const dropdownAlts = action.alternatives.filter(a => !a.quick);
  2522→                        return (
  2523→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  2524→                            <Button
  2525→                              variant={getButtonVariant(action.priority)}
  2526→                              size="sm"
  2527→                              className="h-7 text-xs"
  2528→                              disabled={executingAction === opp.id}
  2529→                              onClick={() => handleActionExecute(opp.id, action, opp)}
  2530→                              style={action.priority === 'high' ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : undefined}
  2531→                            >
  2532→                              {executingAction === opp.id ? (
  2533→                                <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin mr-1" />
  2534→                              ) : null}
  2535→                              {action.label}
  2536→                            </Button>
  2537→                            {quickAlt && (
  2538→                              <Button
  2539→                                variant="outline"
  2540→                                size="sm"
  2541→                                className="h-7 text-xs border-emerald-300 text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50"
  2542→                                onClick={async () => {
  2543→                                  if (quickAlt.label === 'Interested') {
  2544→                                    await SalesPipelineService.update(opp.id, { warm_sub_state: 'interested' });
  2545→                                    setOpportunities(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === opp.id ? { ...o, warm_sub_state: 'interested' } : o));
  2546→                                  } else if (quickAlt.actionType === 'stage_change' && quickAlt.targetStage) {
  2547→                                    handleStageChange(opp.id, quickAlt.targetStage, opp.stage);
  2548→                                  } else {
  2549→                                    openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[quickAlt.label]);
  2550→                                  }
  2551→                                }}
  2552→                              >
  2553→                                {quickAlt.label}
  2554→                              </Button>
  2555→                            )}
  2556→                            {dropdownAlts.length > 0 && (
  2557→                              <DropdownMenu>
  2558→                                <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  2559→                                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0">
  2560→                                    <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  2561→                                  </Button>
  2562→                                </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  2563→                                <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-44 z-[80]">
  2564→                                  {dropdownAlts.map(alt => (
  2565→                                    <DropdownMenuItem
  2566→                                      key={alt.label}
  2567→                                      className={alt.variant === 'danger' ? 'text-red-600' : alt.variant === 'warn' ? 'text-orange-600' : ''}
  2568→                                      onClick={() => {
  2569→                                        if (alt.actionType === 'stage_change' && alt.targetStage) {
  2570→                                          handleStageChange(opp.id, alt.targetStage, opp.stage);
  2571→                                        } else {
  2572→                                          openSlideOver(opp, ACTION_GUIDANCE[alt.label]);
  2573→                                        }
  2574→                                      }}
  2575→                                    >
  2576→                                      {alt.variant === 'danger' ? <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
  2577→                                       alt.variant === 'warn' ? <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> :
  2578→                                       <ArrowRight className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" />}
  2579→                                      {alt.label}
  2580→                                    </DropdownMenuItem>
  2581→                                  ))}
  2582→                                </DropdownMenuContent>
  2583→                              </DropdownMenu>
  2584→                            )}
  2585→                          </div>
  2586→                        );
  2587→                      })()}
  2588→                    </TableCell>
  2589→                  </TableRow>
  2590→                );
  2591→              })}
  2592→            </TableBody>
  2593→          </Table>
  2594→        </div>
  2595→      </div>
  2596→    );
  2597→  };
  2598→
  2599→  // ============================================
```
</details></tool-use>

  2734→  const renderSlideOver = () => {
  2735→    if (!slideOverOpp || typeof document === 'undefined') return null;
  2736→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === slideOverOpp.id) || slideOverOpp;
  2737→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
  2738→    const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  2739→
  2740→    return createPortal(
  2741→      <>
  2742→      {/* Backdrop */}
  2743→      {!orbitPrompt && !closedLostPrompt && !activityLogPrompt && (
  2744→        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/20 z-[60]" onClick={() => {
  2745→          if (slideOverMode === 'edit') {
  2746→            if (!confirm('You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?')) return;
  2747→            setSlideOverMode('view');
  2748→            setEditingOpp(null);
  2749→            setForm({ name: '' });
  2750→          }
  2751→          setSlideOverOpp(null);
  2752→          setActionGuidance(null);
  2753→        }} />
  2754→      )}
  2755→      <div className="fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-[480px] bg-white border-l shadow-xl z-[70] flex flex-col">
  2756→        {/* Header */}
  2757→        <div className="px-6 py-4 border-b bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-50 to-white">
  2758→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
  2759→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
  2760→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2761→                <Building2 className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
  2762→                <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg text-gray-900 truncate">
  2763→                  {slideOverMode === 'edit' ? 'Edit Opportunity' : opp.name}
  2764→                </h3>
  2765→              </div>
  2766→              {slideOverMode === 'view' && (
  2767→                <>
  2768→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
  2769→                    <Badge className={`text-xs ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} border ${stageColors.border}`}>
  2770→                      {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
  2771→                    </Badge>
  2772→                    {opp.bucket && (
  2773→                      <Badge className={`text-xs ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
  2774→                        Bucket {opp.bucket}
  2775→                      </Badge>
  2776→                    )}
  2777→                    {opp.dm_account && (
  2778→                      <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs ${opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'border-blue-300 text-blue-600' : 'border-green-300 text-green-600'}`}>
  2779→                        {opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'Closer' : opp.dm_account === 'sdr' ? 'SDR' : 'Other'}
  2780→                      </Badge>
  2781→                    )}
  2782→                  </div>
  2783→                  {opp.deal_value && (
  2784→                    <p className="text-xl font-bold text-emerald-600 mt-2">${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()} <span className="text-sm font-normal text-gray-400">{opp.currency}</span></p>
  2785→                  )}
  2786→                </>
  2787→              )}
  2788→            </div>
  2789→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 flex-shrink-0">
  2790→              {slideOverMode === 'view' ? (
  2791→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0" onClick={() => openEditDialog(opp)}>
  2792→                  <Edit className="h-4 w-4" />
  2793→                </Button>
  2794→              ) : (

  2796→                  Cancel
  2797→                </Button>

  2799→              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0" onClick={() => { setSlideOverOpp(null); setSlideOverMode('view'); setEditingOpp(null); setForm({ name: '' }); setActionGuidance(null); }}>

  2942→                          selected={form.next_meeting_at ? new Date(form.next_meeting_at) : undefined}
  2943→                          onSelect={date => {

  2945→                              const existing = form.next_meeting_at ? new Date(form.next_meeting_at) : new Date();
  2946→                              date.setHours(existing.getHours(), existing.getMinutes());
  2947→                              setForm(f => ({ ...f, next_meeting_at: date.toISOString() }));
  2948→                            } else {
  2949→                              setForm(f => ({ ...f, next_meeting_at: undefined }));
  2950→                            }
  2951→                          }}
  2952→                          initialFocus
  2953→                          classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
  2954→                          modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
  2955→                        />

  2967→                        >
  2968→                          <Clock className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
  2969→                          {form.next_meeting_at ? format(new Date(form.next_meeting_at), 'h:mm a') : 'Select time'}
  2970→                        </Button>
  2971→                      </PopoverTrigger>
  2972→                      <PopoverContent className="!bg-white border shadow-md p-0 w-auto z-[80]" align="start">
  2973→                        <div className="flex gap-0 divide-x">
  2974→                          {/* Hour column */}
  2975→                          <ScrollArea className="h-[200px] w-[70px]">
  2976→                            <div className="p-1">
  2977→                              {Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, h) => {
  2978→                                const label = `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`;
  2979→                                const isSelected = form.next_meeting_at && new Date(form.next_meeting_at).getHours() === h;
  2980→                                return (
  2981→                                  <Button
  2982→                                    key={h}
  2983→                                    variant="ghost"
  2984→                                    className={`w-full justify-center font-normal text-xs h-7 px-1 ${isSelected ? 'text-white hover:text-white' : ''}`}
  2985→                                    style={isSelected ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
  2986→                                    onClick={() => {
  2987→                                      const d = form.next_meeting_at ? new Date(form.next_meeting_at) : new Date();
  2988→                                      d.setHours(h, d.getMinutes(), 0, 0);
  2989→                                      setForm(f => ({ ...f, next_meeting_at: d.toISOString() }));
  2990→                                    }}
  2991→                                  >
  2992→                                    {label}
  2993→                                  </Button>
  2994→                                );
  2995→                              })}
  2996→                            </div>
  2997→                          </ScrollArea>
  2998→                          {/* Minute column */}
  2999→                          <ScrollArea className="h-[200px] w-[50px]">
```

  3243→              <div className="space-y-3 mb-6 p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
  3244→                <div className="flex gap-2">
  3245→                  <Select
  3246→                    value={activityForm.type}
  3247→                    onValueChange={v => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, type: v as ActivityType }))}
  3248→                  >
  3249→                    <SelectTrigger className="h-9 text-sm w-28 auth-input">
  3250→                      <SelectValue />
  3251→                    </SelectTrigger>
  3252→                    <SelectContent>
  3253→                      <SelectItem value="note">Note</SelectItem>
  3254→                      <SelectItem value="call">Call</SelectItem>
  3255→                      <SelectItem value="message">Message</SelectItem>
  3256→                      <SelectItem value="meeting">Meeting</SelectItem>
  3257→                      <SelectItem value="proposal">Proposal</SelectItem>
  3258→                    </SelectContent>
  3259→                  </Select>
  3260→                  <Input
  3261→                    placeholder="Title..."
  3262→                    value={activityForm.title}
  3263→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, title: e.target.value }))}
  3264→                    className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input"
  3265→                  />
  3266→                </div>
  3267→                <Textarea
  3268→                  placeholder="Description (optional)"
  3269→                  value={activityForm.description || ''}
  3270→                  onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, description: e.target.value }))}
  3271→                  className="text-sm min-h-[60px] auth-input"
  3272→                  rows={2}
  3273→                />
  3274→                <div className="flex gap-2">
  3275→                  <Input

  3285→                    className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input"
  3286→                  />
  3287→                </div>
  3288→                {/* Meeting Date/Time (only for meeting type) */}
  3289→                {activityForm.type === 'meeting' && (
  3290→                  <div className="flex gap-2">

  3292→                      <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  3293→                        <Button
  3294→                          variant="outline"
  3295→                          className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input justify-start font-normal"
  3296→                          style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: activityMeetingDate ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
  3297→                        >
  3298→                          <Calendar className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
  3299→                          {activityMeetingDate ? format(new Date(activityMeetingDate), 'MMM d, yyyy') : 'Meeting date'}
  3300→                        </Button>
  3301→                      </PopoverTrigger>
  3302→                      <PopoverContent className="!bg-white border shadow-md p-0 w-auto z-[80]" align="start">
  3303→                        <CalendarPicker
  3304→                          mode="single"
  3305→                          selected={activityMeetingDate ? new Date(activityMeetingDate) : undefined}
  3306→                          onSelect={date => setActivityMeetingDate(date ? date.toISOString() : undefined)}
  3307→                          initialFocus
  3308→                          classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
  3309→                          modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
  3310→                        />
  3311→                      </PopoverContent>
  3312→                    </Popover>
  3313→                    <Popover>
  3314→                      <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  3315→                        <Button
  3316→                          variant="outline"
  3317→                          className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input justify-start font-normal"
  3318→                          style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: activityMeetingTime ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
  3319→                        >
  3320→                          <Clock className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
  3321→                          {activityMeetingTime
  3322→                            ? (() => { const [h, m] = activityMeetingTime.split(':').map(Number); return `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`; })()
  3323→                            : 'Time'}
  3324→                        </Button>
  3325→                      </PopoverTrigger>
  3326→                      <PopoverContent className="!bg-white border shadow-md p-0 w-auto z-[80]" align="start">
  3327→                        <div className="flex gap-0 divide-x">
  3328→                          <ScrollArea className="h-[200px] w-[70px]">
  3329→                            <div className="p-1">
  3330→                              {Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, h) => {
  3331→                                const label = `${h === 0 ? 12 : h > 12 ? h - 12 : h} ${h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM'}`;
  3332→                                const isSelected = activityMeetingTime && parseInt(activityMeetingTime.split(':')[0]) === h;
  3333→                                return (
  3334→                                  <Button
  3335→                                    key={h}
  3336→                                    variant="ghost"
  3337→                                    className={`w-full justify-center font-normal text-xs h-7 px-1 ${isSelected ? 'text-white hover:text-white' : ''}`}
  3338→                                    style={isSelected ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
  3339→                                    onClick={() => {
  3340→                                      const currentMin = activityMeetingTime ? activityMeetingTime.split(':')[1] : '00';
  3341→                                      setActivityMeetingTime(`${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:${currentMin}`);
  3342→                                    }}
  3343→                                  >
  3344→                                    {label}
  3345→                                  </Button>
  3346→                                );
  3347→                              })}
  3348→                            </div>
  3349→                          </ScrollArea>
  3350→                          <ScrollArea className="h-[200px] w-[50px]">
  3351→                            <div className="p-1">
  3352→                              {Array.from({ length: 60 }, (_, m) => {
  3353→                                const isSelected = activityMeetingTime && parseInt(activityMeetingTime.split(':')[1]) === m;
  3354→                                return (
  3355→                                  <Button
  3356→                                    key={m}
  3357→                                    variant="ghost"
  3358→                                    className={`w-full justify-center font-normal text-xs h-7 px-1 ${isSelected ? 'text-white hover:text-white' : ''}`}
  3359→                                    style={isSelected ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
  3360→                                    onClick={() => {
  3361→                                      const currentHour = activityMeetingTime ? activityMeetingTime.split(':')[0] : '09';
  3362→                                      setActivityMeetingTime(`${currentHour}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}`);
  3363→                                    }}
  3364→                                  >
  3365→                                    {String(m).padStart(2, '0')}
  3366→                                  </Button>
  3367→                                );
  3368→                              })}
  3369→                            </div>
  3370→                          </ScrollArea>
  3371→                        </div>
  3372→                      </PopoverContent>
  3373→                    </Popover>
  3374→                  </div>
  3375→                )}
  3376→                <div className="flex gap-2 items-center">
  3377→                  <Popover>
  3378→                    <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  3379→                      <Button
  3380→                        variant="outline"
  3381→                        className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input justify-start font-normal"
  3382→                        style={{
  3383→                          borderColor: '#e5e7eb',
  3384→                          backgroundColor: 'white',
  3385→                          color: activityForm.next_step_date ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af'
  3386→                        }}
  3387→                      >
  3388→                        <Calendar className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
  3389→                        {activityForm.next_step_date
  3390→                          ? new Date(activityForm.next_step_date).toLocaleDateString()
  3391→                          : 'Next step date'}
  3392→                      </Button>
  3393→                    </PopoverTrigger>
  3394→                    <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
  3395→                      <CalendarPicker
  3396→                        mode="single"
  3397→                        selected={activityForm.next_step_date ? new Date(activityForm.next_step_date) : undefined}
  3398→                        onSelect={(date) => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, next_step_date: date ? date.toISOString() : undefined }))}
  3399→                        initialFocus

  3725→                    </div>
  3726→                    <div className="grid gap-2">
  3727→                      <Label>Currency</Label>
  3728→                      <Select
  3729→                        value={form.currency || 'USD'}

  3731→                      >
  3732→                        <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
  3733→                        <SelectContent>
  3734→                          <SelectItem value="USD">USD</SelectItem>
  3735→                          <SelectItem value="USDT">USDT</SelectItem>
  3736→                          <SelectItem value="USDC">USDC</SelectItem>
  3737→                          <SelectItem value="ETH">ETH</SelectItem>
  3738→                          <SelectItem value="BTC">BTC</SelectItem>

  3744→                  {isEdit && (

  3753→                        className="w-full accent-[#3e8692]"
  3754→                      />
  3755→                    </div>
  3756→                  )}
  3757→                </div>
  3758→              </details>}
  3759→          </div>
  3760→
  3761→            <DialogFooter>
  3762→              <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => { setIsCreateOpen(false); setEditingOpp(null); setForm({ name: '' }); }}>

  4155→                  <Skeleton className="h-10 w-full" />

  4157→                    <Skeleton key={j} className="h-14 w-full" />
  4158→                  ))}
  4159→                </div>
  4160→              </div>
  4161→            ))}
  4162→          </div>
  4163→        </div>
  4164→      </div>
  4165→    );
  4166→  }
  4167→
  4168→  // ============================================
  4169→  // MAIN RENDER
  4170→  // ============================================
  4171→
  4172→  return (
  4173→    <div className="space-y-6">
  4174→      {/* Activity Slide-Over (rendered via portal to document.body) */}
  4175→      {renderSlideOver()}
  4176→
  4177→      {/* Header */}
  4178→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  4179→        <div>
  4180→          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Sales Pipeline</h2>
  4181→          <p className="text-gray-600">Playbook-driven sales pipeline</p>
  4182→        </div>
  4183→        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
  4184→          <div className="relative">
  4185→            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  4186→            <Input
  4187→              placeholder="Search opportunities..."
  4188→              className="pl-10 w-64 auth-input"
  4189→              value={searchTerm}
  4190→              onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
  4191→            />
  4192→          </div>
  4193→          <Button
  4194→            onClick={() => { setForm({ name: '', owner_id: user?.id || undefined }); setIsCreateOpen(true); }}
  4195→            className="hover:opacity-90"
  4196→            style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
  4197→          >
  4198→            <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  4199→            New Opportunity
```
</details></tool-use>

  4279→        >
  4280→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">

  4282→            <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">Sales Dashboard</span>

  4286→                  <Button
  4287→                    variant="ghost"

  4289→                    className="h-6 px-2 text-[11px] text-gray-500 hover:text-[#3e8692] gap-1"

  4292→                  >

  4294→                    {isRecalculating ? 'Recalculating...' : 'Recalc Scores'}

  4298→                  <p className="font-semibold">Auto-calculates temperature (0–100)</p>
  4299→                  <p>• Base: Bucket A=40, B=25, C=10, none=20</p>
  4300→                  <p>• Recency: +30 minus days since last contact</p>
  4301→                  <p>• Engagement: +4 per activity (max +20)</p>
  4302→                  <p>• Meeting booked: +15</p>
  4303→                  <p>• Stage: warm +5, booked/tg_intro +10, discovery+ +15</p>
  4304→                  <p>• Warm interested: +10</p>
  4305→                  <p>• Stale cold DM (&gt;30d): −15</p>
  4306→                  <p>• Bump exhaustion (3+): −10</p>
  4307→                  <p>• Warm silent: −5</p>
  4308→                  <p>• Orbit → 5, Closed Lost → 0</p>
  4309→                </TooltipContent>

  4316→          <CardContent className="pt-0 pb-6 px-5 space-y-6">
  4317→
  4318→            {/* Row 1: Pipeline Health — headline numbers */}

  4321→              <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-3">
  4322→                {[
  4323→                  { label: 'Pipeline Value', value: `$${dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : dashboardMetrics.pipelineValue.toLocaleString()}`, accent: 'border-l-emerald-400', color: 'text-emerald-700' },

  4325→                  { label: 'Active Deals', value: `${dashboardMetrics.activeDeals}`, accent: 'border-l-blue-400', color: 'text-blue-700' },
  4326→                  { label: 'Revenue (Won)', value: `$${dashboardMetrics.totalRevenue >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.totalRevenue / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : dashboardMetrics.totalRevenue.toLocaleString()}`, accent: 'border-l-purple-400', color: 'text-purple-700' },
  4327→                  { label: 'Deals Won', value: `${dashboardMetrics.closedWon}`, accent: 'border-l-gray-300', color: 'text-gray-700' },
  4328→                  { label: 'In Orbit', value: `${dashboardMetrics.inOrbit}`, accent: 'border-l-gray-300', color: 'text-gray-700' },
  4329→                ].map(item => (
  4330→                  <div key={item.label} className={`border-l-[3px] ${item.accent} bg-white rounded-r-lg px-3 py-2.5`}>
  4331→                    <p className={`text-lg font-bold ${item.color}`}>{item.value}</p>
  4332→                    <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">{item.label}</p>
  4333→                  </div>
  4334→                ))}
  4335→              </div>
  4336→            </div>
  4337→
  4338→            {/* Divider */}
  4339→            <div className="border-t border-gray-100" />
  4340→
  4341→            {/* Row 2: Conversion Funnel + Key Rates side by side */}
  4342→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6">
  4343→              {/* Funnel */}
  4344→              <div>
  4345→                <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3">Conversion Funnel</p>
  4346→                <div className="flex items-end gap-1.5">
  4347→                  {[
  4348→                    { label: 'DMs', value: dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent, color: 'bg-sky-400' },
  4349→                    { label: 'Replied', value: dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent - dashboardMetrics.coldDmCount, color: 'bg-sky-500' },
  4350→                    { label: 'Meetings', value: dashboardMetrics.meetingsBooked, color: 'bg-blue-500' },
  4351→                    { label: 'Discovery', value: dashboardMetrics.discoveryCalls, color: 'bg-indigo-500' },
  4352→                    { label: 'Proposals', value: dashboardMetrics.proposalsSent, color: 'bg-violet-500' },
  4353→                    { label: 'Won', value: dashboardMetrics.closedWon, color: 'bg-emerald-500' },
  4354→                    { label: 'Lost', value: dashboardMetrics.closedLost, color: 'bg-gray-300' },
  4355→                  ].map((step, i) => {
  4356→                    const pct = dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent > 0 ? (step.value / dashboardMetrics.totalDmsSent) * 100 : 0;
  4357→                    return (
  4358→                      <div key={step.label} className="flex-1 text-center">
  4359→                        <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 mb-1">{step.value}</p>
  4360→                        <div className="h-20 rounded-md flex items-end justify-center overflow-hidden bg-gray-50">
  4361→                          <div className={`w-full rounded-t-sm ${step.color}`} style={{ height: `${Math.max(pct, 5)}%` }} />
  4362→                        </div>
  4363→                        <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-1.5 leading-tight">{step.label}</p>
  4364→                        {i > 0 && i < 6 && pct > 0 && (
  4365→                          <p className="text-[9px] text-gray-400">{pct.toFixed(0)}%</p>
  4366→                        )}
  4367→                      </div>
  4368→                    );
  4369→                  })}
  4370→                </div>
  4371→              </div>
  4372→
  4373→              {/* Key Rates */}
  4374→              <div>
  4375→                <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3">Key Rates</p>
  4376→                <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-x-4 gap-y-3">
  4377→                  {[
  4378→                    { label: 'Response Rate', value: `${dashboardMetrics.responseRate.toFixed(1)}%` },
  4379→                    { label: 'Close Rate', value: `${dashboardMetrics.closeRate.toFixed(0)}%` },
  4380→                    { label: 'Avg Deal Size', value: `$${dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize > 0 ? (dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize >= 1000 ? `${(dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize / 1000).toFixed(1)}K` : dashboardMetrics.avgDealSize.toFixed(0)) : '0'}` },
  4381→                    { label: 'Avg Close Time', value: dashboardMetrics.avgCloseTime > 0 ? `${dashboardMetrics.avgCloseTime.toFixed(0)}d` : '—' },
  4382→                    { label: 'Qualified (A+B)', value: `${dashboardMetrics.qualifiedPct.toFixed(0)}%` },
  4383→                    { label: 'Bucket A %', value: `${dashboardMetrics.bucketAPct.toFixed(0)}%` },
  4384→                  ].map(item => (
  4385→                    <div key={item.label} className="flex items-baseline justify-between py-1.5 border-b border-gray-100 last:border-b-0">
  4386→                      <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-500">{item.label}</p>
  4387→                      <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800">{item.value}</p>
  4388→                    </div>
  4389→                  ))}
  4390→                </div>
  4391→              </div>
  4392→            </div>
  4393→
  4394→            {/* Divider */}
  4395→            <div className="border-t border-gray-100" />
  4396→
  4397→            {/* Row 3: Bottleneck Analysis */}
  4398→            <div>
  4399→              <p className="text-[11px] font-semibold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3">Bottleneck Analysis</p>
```
</details></tool-use>

  4453→                      const isSlowest = dashboardMetrics.slowestStage?.stage === conv.stage;
  4454→                      const barWidth = Math.max(conv.rate, 3);
  4455→                      const barColor = conv.rate >= 60 ? 'bg-emerald-400' : conv.rate >= 30 ? 'bg-amber-400' : 'bg-red-400';
  4456→                      return (

  4458→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 font-medium text-gray-700">
  4459→                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  4460→                              {STAGE_LABELS[conv.stage as SalesPipelineStage]}
  4461→                              {isWorst && <span className="inline-block w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-red-400" />}
  4462→                              {isSlowest && <span className="inline-block w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-amber-400" />}
  4463→                            </div>
  4464→                          </td>
  4465→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 text-center text-gray-500">{conv.from}</td>
  4466→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 text-center text-gray-500">{conv.to}</td>
  4467→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 text-center">
  4468→                            <span className={`font-semibold ${conv.rate >= 60 ? 'text-emerald-600' : conv.rate >= 30 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-red-500'}`}>
  4469→                              {conv.from > 0 ? `${conv.rate.toFixed(0)}%` : '—'}
  4470→                            </span>
  4471→                          </td>
  4472→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 text-center">
  4473→                            {conv.dropoff > 0 ? (
  4474→                              <span className="text-red-400 font-medium">-{conv.dropoff}</span>
  4475→                            ) : (
  4476→                              <span className="text-gray-300">0</span>
  4477→                            )}
  4478→                          </td>
  4479→                          <td className="py-1.5 px-3 text-center">
  4480→                            {timeData.count > 0 ? (
  4481→                              <span className={`font-medium ${timeData.avgDays >= 14 ? 'text-red-500' : timeData.avgDays >= 7 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-500'}`}>
  4482→                                {timeData.avgDays}d
  4483→                              </span>
  4484→                            ) : (
  4485→                              <span className="text-gray-300">—</span>
  4486→                            )}
  4487→                          </td>

  4489→                            <div className="w-full h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-02 04:28:56Z)**_

Perfect! I have captured the comprehensive information about the sales pipeline page. Let me compile a detailed feature list for your onboarding guide.

## Sales Pipeline Page - Comprehensive Feature Documentation

Based on my thorough analysis of `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`, here is a complete feature list for your onboarding guide:

---

### 1. TABS & NAVIGATION
- **Overall Tab** - Collapsible view of Outreach, Pipeline, and Orbit sections (state: outreach/pipeline/orbit can be collapsed)
- **Actions Tab** - Prioritized action items organized by phase and sortable
- **Outreach Tab** - Cold DM stage opportunities with pagination and filtering
- **Pipeline Tab** - All active opportunities in Kanban or Table view
- **Orbit Tab** - Shelved opportunities grouped by orbit reason
- **Templates Tab** - Sales message templates for each stage and bump number

---

### 2. NEW OPPORTUNITY DIALOG FIELDS
When creating or editing an opportunity:
- **Name** (required) - Company or contact name
- **POC Platform** - Select from Instagram, Twitter/X, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, etc.
- **POC Handle/ID** - @handle or contact identifier
- **Owner** - Assigned team member
- **Source** - Cold Outreach, Referral, Inbound, Event, Twitter, LinkedIn, Telegram, Website
- **Referrer** (conditional on Referral source) - Who referred them?
- **Affiliate** (conditional on non-cold-outreach sources) - Can create new affiliate on the fly
- **Notes** - Additional context
- **Path** (in edit mode) - Closer (Path A) or SDR (Path B)
- **Bucket** (in edit mode) - A (High), B (Medium), C (Low)
- **Temperature Score** (0-100 slider)
- **Deal Value** - Numeric amount
- **Currency** - USD, USDT, USDC, ETH, BTC
- **Meeting Date & Time** - Date picker + 24-hour/minute scrollers
- **Meeting Type** - Discovery, Proposal, Follow-up, Closing Call
- **TG Handle** - Telegram handle (gets prompted when moving to TG Intro stage)

---

### 3. ACTION SYSTEM - PRIORITY-DRIVEN WORKFLOW

#### Action Types Appear Per Stage:

**Cold DM:**
- "Send First DM" (bump #0, no contact yet)
- "Bump #N" (if 3+ days since last bump)
- "Wait N days" (if less than 3 days since last bump)
- "Review → Orbit" (after 4 bumps with no reply)

**Warm:**
- "Get TG Handle" (if replied but no TG yet)
- "Follow Up" (if silent since reply)

**TG Intro:**
- "Booked!" (send Calendly to schedule meeting)
- "Re-engage or Orbit" (if 7+ days no contact)

**Booked:**
- "Schedule Meeting" (if no meeting date set)
- "Prep for Meeting" (if meeting is in future)
- "Discovery Done" (if meeting is in past)

**Discovery Done:**
- "Book Proposal Call" (if no proposal sent)

**Proposal Call:**
- "Send Proposal" (if meeting logged but proposal not sent)
- "To Contract" (if proposal was sent)

**Contract:**
- "Chase Signature" (main action: bump them)
- "Signed!" (quick alternative to close won)

**Orbit:**
- "Resurrect" (after 90+ days in orbit)
- "In Orbit" (waiting state, no action needed)

#### Action Priority Levels:
- **Urgent** (red) - Immediate attention needed (BAMFAM violations, past meetings)
- **High** (amber) - Should do today
- **Medium/Low** (gray) - Can wait
- **Wait** (gray) - Cooling period (bump cooldown, nurturing)

#### Action Guidance:
Each action shows a hint bar in the slide-over with contextual guidance when opened from the Actions tab.

---

### 4. BUMP SYSTEM & 3-DAY COOLDOWN

- **Bump Counter**: Displays visually as 1-4 filled circles (cold_dm stage only)
- **Bump Tracking**: Records bump_number and last_bump_date
- **3-Day Cooldown Rule**: Cannot send another bump within 3 days of the last bump
  - After 3 days: "Bump #N" action appears as actionable
  - Before 3 days: "Wait X days" action (non-actionable)
- **Maximum Bumps**: 4 bumps (after 4 with no reply, moves to "Review → Orbit")
- **Bump Reduction**: Can manually reduce bump count via minus button in slide-over
- **Bulk Bumping**: Select multiple cold DMs and "Bump All" from outreach tab
- **Bulk Bump Record**: In outreach table, each row has inline bump button with tooltip

---

### 5. SLIDE-OVER PANEL (Right-Side Detail View)

Opens when clicking any opportunity.

#### Header Section:
- Opportunity name (or "Edit Opportunity" in edit mode)
- Stage badge (color-coded)
- Bucket badge (if assigned)
- Path badge (Closer/SDR)
- Deal value in large bold text with currency

#### View Mode (default):
- **Edit Button** (pencil icon) - Opens edit mode inline
- **Close Button** (X) - Closes panel

#### Edit Mode:
- Scrollable form with all create/edit fields listed above
- Cancel and Update buttons
- Accessible from slide-over (inline) or as separate dialog

#### Details Card:
- Temperature (visual bar + percentage)
- Owner name
- POC (platform badge + handle)
- TG Handle
- Source
- Next Meeting date/time (if set)
- Referrer (if applicable)
- Affiliate badge
- Last Contacted (relative time)

#### Notes Section:
- Displays markdown-style notes

#### Bump Progress Section (cold_dm only):
- Visual 4-dot progress tracker
- "N / 4 bumps" label
- Minus button (reduce bump count)
- Plus "Bump" button (increment and record bump)
- Last bump timing

#### Quick Actions:
- "Move to Orbit" (orange button)
- "Delete" (red button)

#### Stage Move Dropdown:
- Select from all available stages to immediately move opportunity

#### Activity Timeline:
- Add Activity Form:
  - Type selector (Note, Call, Message, Meeting, Proposal)
  - Title input
  - Description textarea
  - Outcome field
  - Next Step field
  - Next Step Date picker (calendar popover)
  - Meeting Date picker (calendar + scrollable hours/minutes for meeting type only)
  - Meeting Time picker (if type = meeting)
  - "Add" button

- Activity List:
  - Timeline view with icons per activity type (call, message, meeting, proposal, note, bump)
  - Activity title + type badge
  - Description (if provided)
  - Outcome (if logged)
  - Next Step with due date link
  - Created timestamp (relative time, e.g., "2 hours ago")

---

### 6. KANBAN vs TABLE VIEW

#### Table View:
- Grouped by stage (collapsible headers)
- Stage header shows: icon, stage name, count badge, total deal value
- Each row is drag-and-drop sortable within stage (grip handle)
- Inline edit for Name and Deal Value (click to edit)
- Columns: Name, Bucket, Path, Temperature (bar), Value, Owner, TG Handle, [Stage-specific], BAMFAM status, Actions menu

#### Kanban View:
- Vertical columns per stage (collapsible)
- Drag cards between stages or reorder within stage
- Card shows: Name, deal value, bucket/path/source badges, bump progress (cold_dm), warm sub-state (warm), temperature bar, BAMFAM warning (red), last contacted
- Collapse/expand columns via chevron
- Sidebar "Orbit" and "Lost" drop zones for moving cards
- Drag overlay shows card shadow during drag

#### Path Filter:
- All Paths, Path A (Closer), Path B (SDR)
- Affects both views

---

### 7. TEMPLATE SYSTEM

#### Create/Edit/Delete/Copy:
- **Create New**: Click "New" button, fills form with stage, sub_type, name, content
- **Edit**: Click three-dot menu → Edit, opens dialog with populated form
- **Delete**: Three-dot menu → Delete (no confirmation, immediate removal)
- **Copy Content**: Click copy icon next to template content (clipboard)

#### Template Fields:
- **Name** - Label for the template
- **Stage** - cold_dm, warm, tg_intro, booked, discovery_done, proposal_call, v2_contract, or bump
- **Sub Type**:
  - For non-bump: general, initial, follow_up
  - For bump: bump_1, bump_2, bump_3
- **Content** - Message/email body text (supports markdown)
- **Variables** - Auto-extracted placeholders like {{name}}, {{company}}

#### Stage Filter Pills:
- All, Cold DM, Warm, TG Intro, Booked, Discovery Done, Proposal Call, Contract, Bumps
- Click to filter templates by stage

#### Template Display:
- Grid cards showing: Stage color badge, Name, Sub Type label, Preview of content (truncated)
- Copy button (copies content to clipboard)
- Edit and Delete buttons in each card

---

### 8. PROMPTS & DIALOGS

#### Orbit Reason Prompt:
- Triggers when moving opportunity to orbit stage
- Dropdown selector for orbit reason: no_response, not_ready, budget_constrained, no_budget, timing_issue, competitor, no_fit, other
- Confirm button → moves to orbit and opens activity log

#### Closed Lost Reason Prompt:
- Triggers when moving to closed_lost stage
- Text input for reason (optional)
- "Close Lost" button (destructive style)

#### TG Handle Prompt:
- Triggers when advancing to tg_intro stage
- Input field for @telegram_handle
- Confirm button → saves handle and moves stage

#### Bucket Assignment Prompt:
- Triggers after discovery call (moving to discovery_done stage)
- Three-button selector: A (Hot), B (Warm), C (Low)
- Shows descriptions ("Hot", "Warm", "Low")
- Confirm button → assigns bucket and opens activity log

#### Activity Log Prompt:
- Pops up after action execution (bump, stage change, proposal sent)
- Shows activity type badge (colored)
- Editable title field
- Description textarea (optional)
- Outcome field (optional)
- Next Step field (optional)
- Next Step Date picker (optional)
- Meeting Date/Time pickers (only if showMeetingPicker=true)
- Log Activity button

---

### 9. DASHBOARD METRICS CARDS (Top Row)

Five manager attention cards with traffic light colors:
1. **Booking Needed** (BAMFAM violations) - Red if > 0
   - Shows post-discovery deals with no future meeting scheduled
2. **Overdue** (past meeting date) - Orange if > 0
   - Meetings that already happened but outcome not logged
3. **Stale (7d+)** - Amber if > 0
   - Active pipeline deals with no contact in 7+ days
4. **At Risk** - Rose if > 0
   - Closing-stage deals with temperature < 40
5. **Meetings** - Blue if today has meetings
   - Shows today's count or week count

---

### 10. SALES DASHBOARD (Collapsible)

Click "Sales Dashboard" header to toggle detailed analytics:

#### Pipeline Health Metrics:
- Pipeline Value (active stage total)
- Weighted Pipeline (deal_value × stage probability)
- Active Deals (count)
- Revenue (Won)
- Deals Won
- In Orbit

#### Conversion Funnel:
- Visual bar chart: DMs → Replied → Meetings → Discovery → Proposals → Won → Lost
- Shows absolute counts and percentages of DMs sent

#### Key Rates:
- Response Rate (% who replied to DM)
- Close Rate (won / (won + lost))
- Avg Deal Size (mean of closed won values)
- Avg Close Time (days from created to closed)
- Qualified % (bucket A + B / total)
- Bucket A %

#### Bottleneck Analysis:
- **Biggest Drop-off** - Stage with lowest conversion rate (min 3 opps entering)
- **Slowest Stage** - Stage where deals sit longest (min 2 opps)
- Stage Conversion Table:
  - Columns: Stage, In, Out, Conversion %, Drop-off, Avg Days in Stage, Progress bar
  - Highlights worst and slowest with colored dots

#### Bucket Breakdown:
- Bucket A: High-value, high-intent
- Bucket B: Standard follow-up
- Bucket C: Lower priority

#### Recalc Scores Button:
- Recalculates all temperature scores based on formula:
  - Base: Bucket A=40, B=25, C=10, none=20
  - Recency: +30 minus days since last contact
  - Engagement: +4 per activity (max +20)
  - Meeting booked: +15
  - Stage bonuses: warm +5, booked/tg_intro +10, discovery+ +15
  - Warm interested: +10
  - Stale cold DM (30d+): −15
  - Bump exhaustion (3+): −10
  - Warm silent: −5
  - Orbit: 5, Closed Lost: 0

---

### 11. BULK OPERATIONS (Outreach Tab)

#### Selection:
- Checkbox in first column
- "Select All on Page" button
- "Deselect All" button
- Shows count: "N selected"

#### Bulk Actions Toolbar (appears when selected):
1. **Bump All** - Records bump for all selected (sky blue button)
2. **Move to Warm** - Advances all to warm stage (amber button)
3. **Delete** - Removes all selected (with confirmation prompt)

---

### 12. DnD (DRAG AND DROP) FUNCTIONALITY

#### Kanban Drag:
- Drag card to another stage column → triggers stage change with prompts if applicable
- Drag card to another card in same stage → reorders within stage
- Drag card to another card in different stage → stage change
- Visual feedback: dragging card shows 50% opacity, drop zone highlights with blue ring

#### Table Drag:
- Grip handle on left side of each row
- Drag to reorder within stage
- SortableContext handles vertical reordering
- Maintains position via position field on opportunities

#### Drag Overlay:
- Shows floating card/row during drag with shadow effect
- Card displays: name, building icon, stage badge (kanban)
- Row displays: grip handle, building icon, name, stage badge (table)

---

### 13. OUTREACH TAB FILTERS & FEATURES

#### Owner Sub-tabs:
- "My Outreach" - Filter to current user
- "All Owners" - Show all cold DMs across team
- Individual owner buttons (users list) - Filter by specific team member
- Shows total count for "All Owners"

#### Search:
- Debounced search input (400ms delay)
- Searches by opportunity name

#### Filter Dropdowns:
1. **DM Account Path** - All Paths, Closer, SDR
2. **Bucket** - All Buckets, A, B, C
3. **Bump Status** - All Bump Status, No Bumps, 1-2 Bumps, 3+ Bumps

#### Bulk Actions:
- Bump All, Move to Warm, Delete

#### Outreach Table Columns:
- Row number (shows on hover, replaced by checkbox on selection)
- Name (with building icon)
- POC (platform badge + handle)
- Bumps (visual counter)
- TG Handle
- Source (capitalized tag)
- Owner
- Created (short date format)
- Last Bump (relative time + inline bump button with tooltip)
- Menu (edit, record bump, move to warm, delete)

#### Pagination:
- Previous/Next buttons
- Page number buttons (shows 5 page window)
- "Showing X-Y of Z" text
- 50 items per page (OUTREACH_PAGE_SIZE)

---

### 14. ACTIONS TAB FEATURES

#### Owner Filters:
- "All Actions" - All actionable opps
- "My Actions" - Only owned by current user
- "Urgent Only" - Only urgent priority items

#### Phase Tabs (with counts):
- All (all actionable opps)
- Outreach (cold_dm, warm, tg_intro, booked)
- Closing (discovery_done, proposal_call, v2_contract)
- Orbit (orbit only)
- Waiting (non-actionable opps in cooling/waiting state)

#### Sort Dropdown:
- Priority (default, persisted to localStorage per user)
- Stage (in pipeline order)
- Temperature (highest first)
- Deal Value (highest first)
- Name (A-Z)
- Newest First (by created_at)
- Oldest First

#### Action Item Buttons:
- **Primary Action Button** - Colored by priority:
  - Urgent: red/destructive
  - High: teal (#3e8692)
  - Other: outline
- **Quick Alternative Button** - Green (emerald) for common next actions (e.g., "Interested", "Signed!", "Replied!")
- **Dropdown Menu** - Additional alternatives (max 3-4 options)

#### Table Columns:
- Name (building icon)
- Stage (colored badge)
- Bucket (colored pill)
- Next Action (priority icon + label + hint)
- Timing (shows relative time info: bumped Nd ago, meeting in Nd, etc.)
- Temperature (visual bar + %)
- Owner
- Action buttons + dropdown

#### Timing Column Logic:
- Cold DM: "Bumped Nd ago" or "Not bumped"
- Stages with next_meeting_at: "Meeting today" / "Meeting in Nd" / "Meeting Nd ago"
- Proposal Call: "Sent Nd ago"
- Orbit: "Nd in orbit"
- Default: "Nd silent"

#### Timing Color Coding:
- Red: Urgent (past due, 7+ days silent, 3+ days since bump in cold_dm)
- Amber: Attention needed (3+ days in cold_dm, 5+ days proposal sent)
- Blue: Upcoming meeting (0-2 days away)
- Gray: Normal

---

### 15. ORBIT TAB

#### Grouping:
- Opportunities grouped by orbit_reason
- Each group is collapsible with chevron

#### Group Headers:
- Icon (from ORBIT_REASONS)
- Reason label (e.g., "No Response", "Not Ready", "Budget Constrained")
- Count badge
- Total deal value (if > 0)

#### Table per Group:
- Columns: Name, Bucket, DM Account (C/S), Temperature, Value, Owner, Time in Orbit (days since updated_at), Last Contacted, Menu

#### Menu Options:
- Edit
- Resurrect (moves back to cold_dm, clears orbit_reason)
- Delete

---

### 16. OVERVIEW TAB (Overall Tab)

#### Collapsible Sections:
Three expandable sections showing the same renders as their respective tabs:
1. **Outreach** (blue header) - Full outreach table
2. **Pipeline** (emerald header) - Full pipeline table
3. **Orbit** (amber header) - Full orbit sections

Each shows count badge and can be toggled open/closed via chevron button.

---

### 17. DASHBOARD INSIGHTS

#### Key Computations:
- **Response Rate**: (opportunities past cold_dm) / (total opportunities) × 100
- **Close Rate**: (won) / (won + lost) × 100
- **Avg Deal Size**: mean of deal_values for closed won
- **Avg Close Time**: mean of (closed_at - created_at) in days for closed won
- **Qualified %**: (bucket A + B) / total × 100
- **Stage Conversion Rates**: (opps reaching next stage) / (opps entering stage) × 100
- **Weighted Pipeline**: sum of (deal_value × stage_probability) where probabilities are:
  - cold_dm: 0.05, warm: 0.1, tg_intro: 0.15, booked: 0.25
  - discovery_done: 0.4, proposal_call: 0.7, v2_contract: 0.9
- **BAMFAM Violations**: post-discovery deals (discovery_done, proposal_call, v2_contract) with no future next_meeting_at

---

### 18. INLINE EDITING

#### Table Cells:
- **Name Column**: Click to edit, shows input field, blur/Enter to save
- **Deal Value Column**: Click to edit, number input, blur/Enter to save
- Other fields edit via slide-over

---

### 19. COLOR CODING & VISUAL SYSTEM

#### Stage Colors:
- Cold DM: Sky blue background
- Warm: Amber
- TG Intro: Green
- Booked: Blue
- Discovery Done: Indigo
- Proposal Call: Violet
- Contract: Purple
- Orbit: Orange
- Closed Won: Emerald
- Closed Lost: Red

#### Bucket Colors:
- Bucket A: Emerald/green
- Bucket B: Amber/orange
- Bucket C: Gray

#### Temperature Visualization:
- 70+: Green
- 40-69: Amber
- 0-39: Red
- Shows as progress bar (width = score %)

#### Priority Icons:
- Urgent: Red triangle (AlertTriangle)
- High: Amber lightning (Zap)
- Medium: Blue clock (Clock)
- Low: Gray clock

---

### 20. LOADING & EMPTY STATES

#### Loading:
- Skeleton screens for header, stats, tabs
- Animated skeletons while data loads

#### Empty States:
- "No opportunities in this stage"
- "No actions needed right now" (Actions tab)
- "No opportunities in waiting state" (Waiting sub-tab)
- "No activities yet" (Activity timeline)

---

This comprehensive feature list covers all major functionality in the sales pipeline page. Use it to build your onboarding guide with sections for each feature, screenshots, and workflows!
