<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Sales Pipeline — Onboarding Guide | Holo Hive</title>
  <style>
    @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

    :root {
      --teal: #3e8692;
      --teal-light: #e8f4f6;
      --teal-dark: #2d6470;
      --amber: #d97706;
      --amber-light: #fef3c7;
      --red: #dc2626;
      --red-light: #fef2f2;
      --green: #16a34a;
      --green-light: #f0fdf4;
      --blue: #2563eb;
      --blue-light: #eff6ff;
      --gray-50: #f9fafb;
      --gray-100: #f3f4f6;
      --gray-200: #e5e7eb;
      --gray-300: #d1d5db;
      --gray-500: #6b7280;
      --gray-700: #374151;
      --gray-800: #1f2937;
      --gray-900: #111827;
    }

    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

    body {
      font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
      color: var(--gray-800);
      line-height: 1.7;
      background: #fff;
      font-size: 14px;
    }

    /* Cover Page */
    .cover {
      min-height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal) 0%, var(--teal-dark) 100%);
      color: white;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 60px 40px;
      page-break-after: always;
    }

    .cover-logo {
      width: 80px;
      height: 80px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
      border-radius: 20px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 36px;
      font-weight: 800;
      margin-bottom: 40px;
      backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    }

    .cover h1 {
      font-size: 42px;
      font-weight: 800;
      letter-spacing: -1px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .cover .subtitle {
      font-size: 20px;
      font-weight: 300;
      opacity: 0.9;
      margin-bottom: 48px;
    }

    .cover .meta {
      font-size: 13px;
      opacity: 0.7;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
      padding-top: 24px;
      margin-top: auto;
    }

    /* Main Content */
    .content {
      max-width: 800px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 60px 40px;
    }

    /* Table of Contents */
    .toc {
      background: var(--gray-50);
      border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 32px 36px;
      margin-bottom: 48px;
      page-break-after: always;
    }

    .toc h2 {
      font-size: 22px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--teal);
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      padding-bottom: 12px;
      border-bottom: 2px solid var(--teal-light);
    }

    .toc ol {
      list-style: none;
      counter-reset: toc-counter;
    }

    .toc ol li {
      counter-increment: toc-counter;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .toc ol li a {
      text-decoration: none;
      color: var(--gray-700);
      font-size: 15px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 6px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-100);
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }

    .toc ol li a:hover {
      color: var(--teal);
    }

    .toc ol li a::before {
      content: counter(toc-counter, decimal-leading-zero);
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--teal);
      margin-right: 16px;
      font-size: 13px;
      min-width: 24px;
    }

    /* Section Headers */
    .section {
      margin-bottom: 48px;
      page-break-inside: avoid;
    }

    .section-number {
      display: inline-block;
      background: var(--teal);
      color: white;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 700;
      padding: 4px 10px;
      border-radius: 6px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    h2 {
      font-size: 24px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--gray-900);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    }

    h3 {
      font-size: 17px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--teal-dark);
      margin-top: 28px;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    p {
      margin-bottom: 14px;
      color: var(--gray-700);
    }

    strong {
      color: var(--gray-900);
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    /* Flow Diagram */
    .flow-diagram {
      background: var(--gray-50);
      border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
      border-radius: 12px;
      padding: 24px;
      margin: 20px 0;
      overflow-x: auto;
    }

    .flow-stages {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 4px;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }

    .flow-stage {
      padding: 8px 14px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 600;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .flow-arrow {
      color: var(--gray-300);
      font-size: 18px;
      font-weight: 300;
    }

    .fs-cold { background: #dbeafe; color: #1e40af; }
    .fs-warm { background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; }
    .fs-tg { background: #e0e7ff; color: #3730a3; }
    .fs-booked { background: #fce7f3; color: #9d174d; }
    .fs-discovery { background: #d1fae5; color: #065f46; }
    .fs-proposal { background: #ede9fe; color: #5b21b6; }
    .fs-contract { background: #ffedd5; color: #9a3412; }
    .fs-won { background: #dcfce7; color: #166534; border: 2px solid #16a34a; }

    .flow-secondary {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 24px;
      margin-top: 8px;
    }

    .flow-secondary .flow-stage {
      opacity: 0.7;
    }

    .fs-orbit { background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; }
    .fs-lost { background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; }

    /* Tables */
    table {
      width: 100%;
      border-collapse: collapse;
      margin: 16px 0 24px;
      font-size: 13px;
    }

    thead th {
      background: var(--teal);
      color: white;
      padding: 10px 16px;
      text-align: left;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 12px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    }

    thead th:first-child {
      border-radius: 8px 0 0 0;
    }

    thead th:last-child {
      border-radius: 0 8px 0 0;
    }

    tbody td {
      padding: 10px 16px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-100);
      color: var(--gray-700);
    }

    tbody tr:hover {
      background: var(--gray-50);
    }

    tbody tr:last-child td:first-child {
      border-radius: 0 0 0 8px;
    }

    tbody tr:last-child td:last-child {
      border-radius: 0 0 8px 0;
    }

    /* Alert Cards */
    .alert-cards {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 12px;
      margin: 20px 0;
    }

    .alert-card {
      padding: 14px 18px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      border-left: 4px solid;
    }

    .alert-card.red { background: var(--red-light); border-color: var(--red); }
    .alert-card.amber { background: var(--amber-light); border-color: var(--amber); }
    .alert-card.blue { background: var(--blue-light); border-color: var(--blue); }
    .alert-card.green { background: var(--green-light); border-color: var(--green); }

    .alert-card .alert-title {
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 13px;
      margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    .alert-card .alert-desc {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--gray-500);
    }

    .alert-card.red .alert-title { color: var(--red); }
    .alert-card.amber .alert-title { color: var(--amber); }
    .alert-card.blue .alert-title { color: var(--blue); }
    .alert-card.green .alert-title { color: var(--green); }

    /* Priority Icons */
    .priority-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 12px;
      margin: 16px 0;
    }

    .priority-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      gap: 12px;
      padding: 14px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      background: var(--gray-50);
      border: 1px solid var(--gray-100);
    }

    .priority-icon {
      width: 32px;
      height: 32px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 14px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .pi-urgent { background: #fee2e2; }
    .pi-high { background: #fef3c7; }
    .pi-medium { background: #dbeafe; }
    .pi-low { background: var(--gray-100); }

    .priority-label {
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 13px;
      margin-bottom: 2px;
    }

    .priority-desc {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--gray-500);
    }

    /* Lists */
    ul, ol {
      margin: 10px 0 16px 24px;
      color: var(--gray-700);
    }

    li {
      margin-bottom: 6px;
    }

    li em {
      color: var(--gray-500);
    }

    /* Callout / Info boxes */
    .callout {
      padding: 16px 20px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      margin: 20px 0;
      font-size: 13px;
    }

    .callout-info {
      background: var(--blue-light);
      border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
      color: #1e40af;
    }

    .callout-tip {
      background: var(--green-light);
      border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;
      color: #166534;
    }

    .callout-warning {
      background: var(--amber-light);
      border: 1px solid #fde68a;
      color: #92400e;
    }

    .callout-label {
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      font-size: 11px;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    /* Steps */
    .steps {
      counter-reset: step-counter;
      list-style: none;
      margin-left: 0;
      padding-left: 0;
    }

    .steps li {
      counter-increment: step-counter;
      position: relative;
      padding-left: 48px;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      min-height: 32px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: flex-start;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: center;
    }

    .steps li::before {
      content: counter(step-counter);
      position: absolute;
      left: 0;
      top: 0;
      width: 32px;
      height: 32px;
      background: var(--teal);
      color: white;
      border-radius: 50%;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    /* Bump lifecycle */
    .bump-timeline {
      position: relative;
      padding-left: 28px;
      margin: 20px 0;
    }

    .bump-timeline::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 10px;
      top: 8px;
      bottom: 8px;
      width: 2px;
      background: var(--gray-200);
    }

    .bump-step {
      position: relative;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      padding: 10px 16px;
      background: var(--gray-50);
      border-radius: 8px;
      border: 1px solid var(--gray-100);
    }

    .bump-step::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: -22px;
      top: 14px;
      width: 10px;
      height: 10px;
      background: var(--teal);
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 2px solid white;
    }

    .bump-step .bump-label {
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--teal-dark);
    }

    .bump-step .bump-desc {
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--gray-500);
      margin-top: 2px;
    }

    /* Bucket cards */
    .bucket-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 12px;
      margin: 16px 0;
    }

    .bucket-card {
      padding: 16px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      text-align: center;
      border: 2px solid;
    }

    .bucket-a { background: #fef2f2; border-color: #fca5a5; }
    .bucket-b { background: #fef3c7; border-color: #fcd34d; }
    .bucket-c { background: #f3f4f6; border-color: #d1d5db; }

    .bucket-letter {
      font-size: 28px;
      font-weight: 800;
    }

    .bucket-a .bucket-letter { color: var(--red); }
    .bucket-b .bucket-letter { color: var(--amber); }
    .bucket-c .bucket-letter { color: var(--gray-500); }

    .bucket-label {
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 13px;
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    .bucket-desc {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--gray-500);
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    /* Metric cards */
    .metric-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 12px;
      margin: 16px 0;
    }

    .metric-card {
      padding: 16px;
      background: var(--gray-50);
      border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
      border-radius: 10px;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .metric-label {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--gray-500);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    .metric-value {
      font-size: 20px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--teal);
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    .metric-desc {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: var(--gray-500);
      margin-top: 4px;
    }

    /* Keyboard shortcut style for actions */
    .action-tag {
      display: inline-block;
      background: var(--teal-light);
      color: var(--teal-dark);
      padding: 2px 8px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 600;
      font-family: 'Inter', monospace;
    }

    /* HR */
    hr {
      border: none;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
      margin: 40px 0;
    }

    /* Divider with text */
    .divider {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      margin: 48px 0 24px;
    }

    .divider::before, .divider::after {
      content: '';
      flex: 1;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
    }

    .divider span {
      padding: 0 16px;
      font-size: 11px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      color: var(--gray-300);
      font-weight: 600;
    }

    /* Best practices checklist */
    .checklist {
      list-style: none;
      margin-left: 0;
      padding-left: 0;
    }

    .checklist li {
      padding: 10px 16px 10px 40px;
      position: relative;
      background: var(--gray-50);
      border-radius: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      border: 1px solid var(--gray-100);
    }

    .checklist li::before {
      content: '✓';
      position: absolute;
      left: 14px;
      top: 10px;
      color: var(--teal);
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    /* Footer */
    .footer {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 40px;
      color: var(--gray-500);
      font-size: 12px;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
      margin-top: 60px;
    }

    /* Print styles */
    @media print {
      body { font-size: 12px; }
      .cover { min-height: auto; padding: 100px 40px; }
      .content { padding: 40px 20px; }
      .section { page-break-inside: avoid; }
      .alert-cards, .priority-grid, .bucket-grid, .metric-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      }
    }

    /* Code / monospace */
    code {
      background: var(--gray-100);
      padding: 2px 6px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--teal-dark);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <!-- Cover Page -->
  <div class="cover">
    <div class="cover-logo">HH</div>
    <h1>Sales Pipeline</h1>
    <p class="subtitle">Onboarding Guide</p>
    <p style="font-size: 15px; opacity: 0.85; max-width: 500px; line-height: 1.8;">
      Everything you need to know to manage your outreach, close deals, and keep your pipeline healthy.
    </p>
    <p class="meta">Holo Hive &middot; Internal Documentation &middot; 2025</p>
  </div>

  <div class="content">

    <!-- Table of Contents -->
    <div class="toc">
      <h2>Table of Contents</h2>
      <ol>
        <li><a href="#s1">Overview — How the Pipeline Works</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s2">Getting Started — Adding Opportunities</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s3">Understanding Stages</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s4">The Actions Tab — Your Daily To-Do List</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s5">Cold DM Outreach & The Bump System</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s6">Moving Through the Pipeline</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s7">The Opportunity Detail Panel</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s8">Pipeline View — Table & Kanban</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s9">Overall Tab — Your Big Picture View</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s10">Orbit — Managing Shelved Deals</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s11">Templates — Quick Message Copy</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s12">Dashboard & Metrics</a></li>
        <li><a href="#s13">Tips & Best Practices</a></li>
      </ol>
    </div>

    <!-- Section 1 -->
    <div class="section" id="s1">
      <span class="section-number">01</span>
      <h2>Overview — How the Pipeline Works</h2>
      <p>The Sales Pipeline tracks every potential deal from first contact to closed-won. Each opportunity flows through <strong>stages</strong>, and the system tells you exactly what to do next via <strong>actions</strong>.</p>

      <h3>The Stage Flow</h3>
      <div class="flow-diagram">
        <div class="flow-stages">
          <span class="flow-stage fs-cold">Cold DM</span>
          <span class="flow-arrow">→</span>
          <span class="flow-stage fs-warm">Warm</span>
          <span class="flow-arrow">→</span>
          <span class="flow-stage fs-tg">TG Intro</span>
          <span class="flow-arrow">→</span>
          <span class="flow-stage fs-booked">Booked</span>
          <span class="flow-arrow">→</span>
          <span class="flow-stage fs-discovery">Discovery Done</span>
          <span class="flow-arrow">→</span>
          <span class="flow-stage fs-proposal">Proposal Call</span>
          <span class="flow-arrow">→</span>
          <span class="flow-stage fs-contract">Contract</span>
          <span class="flow-arrow">→</span>
          <span class="flow-stage fs-won">Closed Won ✓</span>
        </div>
        <div class="flow-secondary">
          <span class="flow-stage fs-orbit">↳ Orbit (shelved)</span>
          <span class="flow-stage fs-lost">↳ Closed Lost</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <h3>Alert Cards</h3>
      <p>At the top of the page, you'll see alert cards that highlight anything needing immediate attention:</p>

      <div class="alert-cards">
        <div class="alert-card red">
          <div class="alert-title">Booking Needed</div>
          <div class="alert-desc">Deals past discovery with no future meeting set (BAMFAM violation)</div>
        </div>
        <div class="alert-card amber">
          <div class="alert-title">Overdue</div>
          <div class="alert-desc">A meeting happened but you haven't logged the outcome</div>
        </div>
        <div class="alert-card blue">
          <div class="alert-title">Stale (7d+)</div>
          <div class="alert-desc">Deals with no contact in 7+ days</div>
        </div>
        <div class="alert-card amber">
          <div class="alert-title">At Risk</div>
          <div class="alert-desc">Closing-stage deals with a low temperature score</div>
        </div>
        <div class="alert-card green">
          <div class="alert-title">Meetings</div>
          <div class="alert-desc">How many meetings you have today / this week</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 2 -->
    <div class="section" id="s2">
      <span class="section-number">02</span>
      <h2>Getting Started — Adding Opportunities</h2>
      <p>Click the <strong>"+ New"</strong> button at the top right to create an opportunity.</p>

      <h3>Required Fields</h3>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Name</strong> — The company or contact name</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Recommended Fields</h3>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>POC Platform & Handle</strong> — Where you first reached out (Twitter, Instagram, Telegram, etc.) and their handle</li>
        <li><strong>Owner</strong> — Who on the team owns this deal</li>
        <li><strong>Source</strong> — How you found them:
          <ul>
            <li><em>Cold Outreach</em> — You reached out first (affiliate field is hidden for this source)</li>
            <li><em>Referral</em> — Someone introduced you (a "Referrer" field appears)</li>
            <li><em>Inbound, Event, Twitter, LinkedIn, Telegram, Website</em></li>
          </ul>
        </li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Affiliate (for non-cold-outreach sources)</h3>
      <p>If the deal came through an affiliate or partner, use the searchable dropdown to select one. If the affiliate doesn't exist yet, just type their name and click <strong>"Add [name] as new affiliate"</strong> — it's created instantly.</p>

      <h3>Notes</h3>
      <p>Add any context that will help you or your team understand the deal.</p>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 3 -->
    <div class="section" id="s3">
      <span class="section-number">03</span>
      <h2>Understanding Stages</h2>
      <p>Each stage represents where the deal currently sits in your sales process:</p>

      <table>
        <thead>
          <tr><th>Stage</th><th>What's Happening</th></tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr><td><strong>Cold DM</strong></td><td>You've identified a lead and are reaching out via DM</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Warm</strong></td><td>They've responded to your outreach</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>TG Intro</strong></td><td>You've connected on Telegram</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Booked</strong></td><td>A discovery call is scheduled</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Discovery Done</strong></td><td>The discovery call happened, you understand their needs</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Proposal Call</strong></td><td>Time to present your proposal on a call</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Contract</strong></td><td>Proposal accepted, chasing the signature</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Closed Won</strong></td><td>Deal signed!</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Orbit</strong></td><td>Deal shelved — not the right time, but may revisit</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Closed Lost</strong></td><td>Deal didn't work out</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Nurture</strong></td><td>Long-term relationship, periodic check-ins</td></tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>

      <div class="callout callout-info">
        <div class="callout-label">Color Coding</div>
        Each stage has its own color throughout the app — in badges, kanban columns, and table headers — so you can quickly identify where deals are at a glance.
      </div>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 4 -->
    <div class="section" id="s4">
      <span class="section-number">04</span>
      <h2>The Actions Tab — Your Daily To-Do List</h2>
      <p>The <strong>Actions tab</strong> is the heart of the pipeline. It scans all your opportunities and tells you exactly what needs to happen next, ranked by priority.</p>

      <h3>Priority Levels</h3>
      <div class="priority-grid">
        <div class="priority-item">
          <div class="priority-icon pi-urgent">🔺</div>
          <div>
            <div class="priority-label">Urgent</div>
            <div class="priority-desc">Do this now — overdue meetings, BAMFAM violations</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="priority-item">
          <div class="priority-icon pi-high">⚡</div>
          <div>
            <div class="priority-label">High</div>
            <div class="priority-desc">Should do today — bumps due, follow-ups needed</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="priority-item">
          <div class="priority-icon pi-medium">🕐</div>
          <div>
            <div class="priority-label">Medium</div>
            <div class="priority-desc">Can wait a bit — periodic check-ins</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="priority-item">
          <div class="priority-icon pi-low">⏳</div>
          <div>
            <div class="priority-label">Low / Wait</div>
            <div class="priority-desc">No action needed yet — meeting upcoming, cooling period</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <h3>How Actions Work</h3>
      <p>Each opportunity gets <strong>one primary action</strong> based on its stage and status. For example:</p>
      <ul>
        <li>A cold DM with no bumps → <span class="action-tag">Send First DM</span></li>
        <li>A cold DM bumped 4 days ago → <span class="action-tag">Bump #2</span></li>
        <li>A warm/interested deal → <span class="action-tag">Get TG Handle</span></li>
        <li>A booked deal with a past meeting → <span class="action-tag">Discovery Done</span></li>
        <li>A proposal_call deal → <span class="action-tag">Send Proposal</span></li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Quick Actions & Alternatives</h3>
      <p>Next to the primary action button, you'll often see:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Quick action</strong> (green button) — A common shortcut. For example, "Replied!" instantly moves a cold DM to warm.</li>
        <li><strong>Dropdown arrow</strong> — More options like "Orbit", "Lost", or stage-specific alternatives.</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Filtering Actions</h3>
      <p>Use the tabs at the top to focus:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>All</strong> — Everything actionable</li>
        <li><strong>Outreach</strong> — Cold DM, Warm, TG Intro, Booked stages</li>
        <li><strong>Closing</strong> — Discovery Done, Proposal Call, Contract stages</li>
        <li><strong>Orbit</strong> — Deals in orbit that may need attention</li>
        <li><strong>Waiting</strong> — Deals in a cooling period (bump cooldowns, nurturing)</li>
      </ul>

      <p>You can also filter by <strong>My Actions</strong> (only your deals) or <strong>All Actions</strong> (everyone's deals).</p>

      <h3>Sorting</h3>
      <p>Sort your actions by Priority (default), Stage, Temperature, Deal Value, Name, Newest, or Oldest. Your sort preference is saved automatically.</p>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 5 -->
    <div class="section" id="s5">
      <span class="section-number">05</span>
      <h2>Cold DM Outreach & The Bump System</h2>
      <p>The <strong>Outreach tab</strong> is dedicated to your cold DM pipeline with advanced filtering, pagination, and bulk operations.</p>

      <h3>The Bump Lifecycle</h3>
      <p>Bumps track how many times you've reached out to a lead:</p>

      <div class="bump-timeline">
        <div class="bump-step">
          <div class="bump-label">Bump #0</div>
          <div class="bump-desc">Action: "Send First DM"</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bump-step">
          <div class="bump-label">After Sending</div>
          <div class="bump-desc">bump_number becomes 1, 3-day cooldown starts</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bump-step">
          <div class="bump-label">During Cooldown</div>
          <div class="bump-desc">Action: "Wait Xd" (shows days remaining)</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bump-step">
          <div class="bump-label">After 3 Days</div>
          <div class="bump-desc">Action: "Bump #2"</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bump-step">
          <div class="bump-label">Repeat</div>
          <div class="bump-desc">Up to 4 bumps total</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bump-step">
          <div class="bump-label">After 4 Bumps (No Reply)</div>
          <div class="bump-desc">Action: "Review → Orbit"</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="callout callout-tip">
        <div class="callout-label">Tip</div>
        During the "Wait" period, you can still mark a lead as "Replied!" if they respond — the action stays visible with a quick "Replied!" button.
      </div>

      <h3>If They Reply</h3>
      <p>At any point, if a lead replies, click <strong>"Replied!"</strong> to move them to the <strong>Warm</strong> stage.</p>

      <h3>Outreach Filters</h3>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Owner tabs</strong> — Filter by team member or view all</li>
        <li><strong>Search</strong> — Find opportunities by name</li>
        <li><strong>Path</strong> — Closer (Path A) or SDR (Path B)</li>
        <li><strong>Bucket</strong> — A, B, or C priority</li>
        <li><strong>Bump Status</strong> — No bumps, 1-2 bumps, 3+ bumps</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Bulk Operations</h3>
      <p>Select multiple opportunities using the checkboxes, then:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Bump All</strong> — Record a bump for all selected</li>
        <li><strong>Move to Warm</strong> — Advance all to warm (they replied!)</li>
        <li><strong>Delete</strong> — Remove selected opportunities</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 6 -->
    <div class="section" id="s6">
      <span class="section-number">06</span>
      <h2>Moving Through the Pipeline</h2>
      <p>As deals progress, different prompts and actions guide you:</p>

      <h3>Warm → TG Intro: "Got TG!"</h3>
      <p>When you click "Got TG!" (either as a quick action or from the dropdown), a dialog asks you to <strong>enter their Telegram handle</strong>. This saves the handle and moves the deal forward.</p>

      <h3>Booked → Discovery Done: Bucket Assignment</h3>
      <p>After marking a deal as "Discovery Done" (the discovery call happened), you're prompted to <strong>assign a bucket</strong>:</p>

      <div class="bucket-grid">
        <div class="bucket-card bucket-a">
          <div class="bucket-letter">A</div>
          <div class="bucket-label">Hot</div>
          <div class="bucket-desc">High intent, likely to close</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bucket-card bucket-b">
          <div class="bucket-letter">B</div>
          <div class="bucket-label">Warm</div>
          <div class="bucket-desc">Interested but needs nurturing</div>
        </div>
        <div class="bucket-card bucket-c">
          <div class="bucket-letter">C</div>
          <div class="bucket-label">Low</div>
          <div class="bucket-desc">Lower priority, longer timeline</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <p>This helps prioritize your pipeline and shows up in the temperature score calculation.</p>

      <h3>Proposal Call → Send Proposal → Contract</h3>
      <p>The proposal call stage has a two-step flow:</p>
      <ol class="steps">
        <li><strong>"Send Proposal"</strong> — Click this after the call to mark the proposal as sent. An activity log popup lets you record details.</li>
        <li><strong>"To Contract"</strong> — After the proposal is sent, this becomes the next action to move the deal into the contract stage.</li>
      </ol>

      <h3>Contract → Closed Won: "Chase Signature"</h3>
      <p>In the contract stage, <span class="action-tag">Chase Signature</span> is your primary action (records a follow-up activity). Use the <span class="action-tag">Signed!</span> quick action when the deal closes.</p>
      <p>Need to schedule another call? Use <strong>"Schedule Call"</strong> from the dropdown.</p>

      <h3>Moving to Orbit</h3>
      <p>When a deal stalls, you can move it to <strong>Orbit</strong> from any stage. You'll be asked to select a reason:</p>
      <ul>
        <li>No Response</li>
        <li>Bad Timing</li>
        <li>No Budget</li>
        <li>Went with Competitor</li>
        <li>Other</li>
      </ul>
      <p>Deals in orbit for 90+ days will surface a "Resurrect" action to re-engage them.</p>

      <h3>Closing a Deal as Lost</h3>
      <p>Moving to "Closed Lost" prompts you for an optional reason. This helps track why deals don't close.</p>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 7 -->
    <div class="section" id="s7">
      <span class="section-number">07</span>
      <h2>The Opportunity Detail Panel</h2>
      <p>Click any opportunity name to open the <strong>slide-over panel</strong> on the right side. This is your command center for a single deal.</p>

      <h3>What You'll See</h3>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Header</strong> — Name, stage badge, bucket, path, deal value</li>
        <li><strong>Details card</strong> — Temperature score, owner, POC info, TG handle, source, next meeting, last contacted</li>
        <li><strong>Notes</strong> — Any context about the deal</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Editing</h3>
      <p>Click the <strong>pencil icon</strong> to enter edit mode. You can update:</p>
      <ul>
        <li>Name, POC, owner, source, stage</li>
        <li>Deal value, currency</li>
        <li>TG handle, meeting date/time</li>
        <li>Notes and all other fields</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Bump Controls (Cold DM only)</h3>
      <p>A visual progress tracker shows bumps 1-4 as dots. Use the <strong>+</strong> and <strong>-</strong> buttons to manually adjust the bump count.</p>

      <h3>Quick Actions</h3>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Move to Orbit</strong> — Orange button at the bottom</li>
        <li><strong>Delete</strong> — Red button (use carefully!)</li>
        <li><strong>Move to Stage</strong> — Dropdown to manually move to any stage</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Activity Timeline</h3>
      <p>The bottom of the panel shows a chronological timeline of all activities:</p>
      <ul>
        <li>Notes, calls, messages, meetings, proposals, bumps</li>
        <li>Each has a type icon, title, description, outcome, and next steps</li>
      </ul>

      <p><strong>To add an activity</strong>, fill in the form at the top of the timeline section:</p>
      <ol class="steps">
        <li>Select the type (Note, Call, Message, Meeting, Proposal)</li>
        <li>Add a title and optional details</li>
        <li>Set outcome, next step, and dates as needed</li>
        <li>Click "Add"</li>
      </ol>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 8 -->
    <div class="section" id="s8">
      <span class="section-number">08</span>
      <h2>Pipeline View — Table & Kanban</h2>
      <p>The <strong>Pipeline tab</strong> shows all active opportunities (non-orbit, non-closed) in two views:</p>

      <h3>Table View (Default)</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>Opportunities grouped by stage with collapsible headers</li>
        <li>Each header shows the stage name, count, and total deal value</li>
        <li><strong>Drag and drop</strong> rows to reorder within a stage (use the grip handle on the left)</li>
        <li><strong>Click a name or deal value</strong> to edit it inline</li>
        <li><strong>Click a row</strong> to open the detail panel</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Kanban View</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>Vertical columns for each stage</li>
        <li><strong>Drag cards</strong> between columns to change stages</li>
        <li>Cards show key info: name, value, bucket, temperature, bump progress</li>
        <li>Collapsible columns with chevrons</li>
        <li>Drop zones for "Orbit" and "Lost" on the sides</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Path Filter</h3>
      <p>Use the dropdown to filter by:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>All Paths</strong> — See everything</li>
        <li><strong>Path A (Closer)</strong> — Direct closer pipeline</li>
        <li><strong>Path B (SDR)</strong> — SDR-led pipeline</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 9 -->
    <div class="section" id="s9">
      <span class="section-number">09</span>
      <h2>Overall Tab — Your Big Picture View</h2>
      <p>The <strong>Overall tab</strong> gives you a consolidated view with three collapsible sections:</p>

      <ol>
        <li><strong>Outreach</strong> (blue) — Your full cold DM pipeline</li>
        <li><strong>Pipeline</strong> (green) — All active deals in table view</li>
        <li><strong>Orbit</strong> (amber) — Shelved deals</li>
      </ol>

      <p>The tab badge shows the <strong>total count of active opportunities</strong> (excluding closed won and closed lost).</p>

      <div class="callout callout-tip">
        <div class="callout-label">Tip</div>
        Click any section header to expand/collapse it. This is great for a quick daily review without switching between tabs.
      </div>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 10 -->
    <div class="section" id="s10">
      <span class="section-number">10</span>
      <h2>Orbit — Managing Shelved Deals</h2>
      <p>The <strong>Orbit tab</strong> groups shelved deals by their orbit reason (No Response, Bad Timing, No Budget, etc.).</p>

      <p>Each group shows:</p>
      <ul>
        <li>The reason label and count</li>
        <li>A table with deal details, time in orbit, and last contacted date</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>What Happens Over Time</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>Deals in orbit for <strong>90+ days</strong> get a "Resurrect" action in the Actions tab</li>
        <li>You can manually resurrect a deal from the orbit tab's menu → moves it back to Cold DM</li>
        <li>Or mark it as Lost if it's truly dead</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 11 -->
    <div class="section" id="s11">
      <span class="section-number">11</span>
      <h2>Templates — Quick Message Copy</h2>
      <p>The <strong>Templates tab</strong> stores reusable DM and message templates for each pipeline stage.</p>

      <h3>Browsing Templates</h3>
      <p>Use the <strong>stage filter pills</strong> at the top to filter:</p>
      <ul>
        <li>All, Cold DM, Warm, TG Intro, Booked, Discovery Done, Proposal Call, Contract, Bumps</li>
      </ul>

      <p>Each template card shows:</p>
      <ul>
        <li>Name and stage/sub-type badges</li>
        <li>Content preview</li>
        <li>Variable placeholders (e.g., <code>[KOL_NAME]</code>, <code>[PROJECT_NAME]</code>)</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Using a Template</h3>
      <p>Click the <strong>copy icon</strong> on any template card to copy the content to your clipboard. Then paste it into your DM and replace the placeholders.</p>

      <h3>Creating a Template</h3>
      <ol class="steps">
        <li>Click <strong>"+ New Template"</strong></li>
        <li>Fill in: <strong>Name</strong>, <strong>Stage</strong>, <strong>Sub-type</strong>, and <strong>Content</strong> (use <code>[KOL_NAME]</code>, <code>[PROJECT_NAME]</code>, etc. as placeholders)</li>
        <li>Click <strong>"Create Template"</strong></li>
      </ol>

      <h3>Editing & Deleting</h3>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Edit</strong> — Click the pencil icon on a template card</li>
        <li><strong>Delete</strong> — Click the trash icon (immediate, no confirmation)</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Pre-loaded Templates</h3>
      <p>The system comes with default templates:</p>
      <ul>
        <li>Cold DM — Initial Outreach</li>
        <li>Bump 1, 2, 3 — Escalating follow-ups</li>
        <li>Warm — Reply follow-up</li>
        <li>TG Intro — First Telegram message</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 12 -->
    <div class="section" id="s12">
      <span class="section-number">12</span>
      <h2>Dashboard & Metrics</h2>
      <p>Click the <strong>"Sales Dashboard"</strong> header at the top of the page to expand detailed analytics.</p>

      <h3>Pipeline Health</h3>
      <div class="metric-grid">
        <div class="metric-card">
          <div class="metric-label">Pipeline Value</div>
          <div class="metric-value">$—</div>
          <div class="metric-desc">Total value of active opportunities</div>
        </div>
        <div class="metric-card">
          <div class="metric-label">Weighted Pipeline</div>
          <div class="metric-value">$—</div>
          <div class="metric-desc">Values weighted by stage probability</div>
        </div>
        <div class="metric-card">
          <div class="metric-label">Active Deals</div>
          <div class="metric-value">—</div>
          <div class="metric-desc">Non-closed / non-orbit deals</div>
        </div>
        <div class="metric-card">
          <div class="metric-label">Revenue</div>
          <div class="metric-value">$—</div>
          <div class="metric-desc">Total closed-won value</div>
        </div>
        <div class="metric-card">
          <div class="metric-label">Deals Won</div>
          <div class="metric-value">—</div>
          <div class="metric-desc">Number of closed-won deals</div>
        </div>
        <div class="metric-card">
          <div class="metric-label">In Orbit</div>
          <div class="metric-value">—</div>
          <div class="metric-desc">Number of shelved deals</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <h3>Conversion Funnel</h3>
      <p>A visual bar chart showing how many deals pass through each stage — from DMs sent all the way to closed won. Helps identify where deals drop off.</p>

      <h3>Key Rates</h3>
      <table>
        <thead>
          <tr><th>Metric</th><th>Description</th></tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr><td><strong>Response Rate</strong></td><td>% of cold DMs that got a reply</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Close Rate</strong></td><td>Won / (Won + Lost)</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Avg Deal Size</strong></td><td>Mean value of closed-won deals</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Avg Close Time</strong></td><td>Days from created to closed</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Qualified %</strong></td><td>Bucket A + B as % of total</td></tr>
          <tr><td><strong>Bucket A %</strong></td><td>Top-tier deals as % of total</td></tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>

      <h3>Bottleneck Analysis</h3>
      <p>Shows you:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Biggest Drop-off</strong> — The stage where you lose the most deals</li>
        <li><strong>Slowest Stage</strong> — Where deals sit the longest</li>
        <li>A full conversion table with stage-by-stage breakdown</li>
      </ul>

      <h3>Temperature Score</h3>
      <p>Each opportunity has an auto-calculated temperature (0-100) based on:</p>
      <ul>
        <li>Bucket assignment (A = 40 base, B = 25, C = 10)</li>
        <li>How recently you've been in contact</li>
        <li>Number of logged activities</li>
        <li>Whether a meeting is booked</li>
        <li>Stage progression bonuses</li>
        <li>Penalties for stale deals, bump exhaustion, or silent warm leads</li>
      </ul>

      <div class="callout callout-info">
        <div class="callout-label">Refresh</div>
        Use the <strong>"Recalc Scores"</strong> button to refresh all temperature scores.
      </div>
    </div>

    <hr>

    <!-- Section 13 -->
    <div class="section" id="s13">
      <span class="section-number">13</span>
      <h2>Tips & Best Practices</h2>

      <h3>Daily Workflow</h3>
      <ol class="steps">
        <li>Open the <strong>Actions tab</strong> — this is your to-do list</li>
        <li>Work through urgent items first (red), then high (amber)</li>
        <li>Check the <strong>alert cards</strong> at the top for anything critical</li>
        <li>Log activities as you go — the system tracks everything</li>
      </ol>

      <h3>BAMFAM Rule</h3>
      <div class="callout callout-warning">
        <div class="callout-label">BAMFAM</div>
        <strong>B</strong>ook <strong>A</strong> <strong>M</strong>eeting <strong>F</strong>rom <strong>A</strong> <strong>M</strong>eeting. After any call past discovery, always schedule the next meeting before hanging up. The system enforces this — deals without a future meeting get flagged.
      </div>

      <h3>Key Reminders</h3>
      <ul class="checklist">
        <li>Don't let deals sit in a stage for too long without action — the "Stale 7d+" alert catches forgotten deals</li>
        <li>Temperature scores drop when deals go cold — use them as a health check</li>
        <li>Don't write every DM from scratch — copy a template, personalize the placeholders, and send</li>
        <li>Every time you interact with a lead (DM, call, meeting, proposal), log it — this builds a timeline for your whole team</li>
        <li>If a lead goes silent after 3-4 bumps, move them to Orbit rather than clogging your pipeline — they'll resurface in 90 days</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <div class="footer">
      <strong>Holo Hive</strong> &middot; Sales Pipeline Onboarding Guide<br>
      <span style="opacity: 0.7;">Internal documentation &middot; Questions? Reach out to your team lead.</span>
    </div>

  </div>

</body>
</html>

## 1. Alert Cards Section (Lines 4204-4272)

**Full Rendering Code:**

The alert cards are rendered as a 5-column grid with conditional coloring based on metrics:

```typescript

        </p>

          <p className="text-xs text-blue-400">+{dashboardMetrics.meetingsThisWeek - dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday} wk</p>
        )}

```

**Data Computation (Lines 272-449):**

All metrics are computed in a `useMemo` hook with dependencies on `[opportunities, metrics.bamfamViolations, outreachTotal]`:

```typescript
// Line 272: const dashboardMetrics = useMemo(() => {
  const all = opportunities;
  const pipelineActive = all.filter(o => PIPELINE_STAGES.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
  
  // Lines 317-321: Overdue follow-ups (meetings in the past)
  const now = new Date().toISOString();
  const overdueFollowups = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
    o.next_meeting_at && o.next_meeting_at < now
  ).length;

  // Lines 330-337: Meetings today vs this week
  const nowDate = new Date();
  const todayStart = new Date(nowDate.getFullYear(), nowDate.getMonth(), nowDate.getDate());
  const weekEnd = new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
  const meetingsThisWeek = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
    o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < weekEnd
  ).length;
  const meetingsToday = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
    o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
  ).length;

  // Lines 339-345: Stale deals (no contact in 7+ days)
  const staleDeals = pipelineActive.filter(o => {
    const lastDate = o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date || o.created_at;
    if (!lastDate) return true;
    const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    return daysSince >= 7;
  }).length;

  // Lines 347-350: At Risk (closing deals with temperature < 40)
  const dealsAtRisk = all.filter(o =>
    ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'].includes(o.stage) && o.temperature_score < 40
  ).length;

  // Line 432: bamfamViolations comes from metrics state (set during fetchData)
  bamfamViolations: metrics.bamfamViolations,
```

**Key Insight:** The `bamfamViolations` metric is pulled from a `metrics` state (line 143) that's populated by `SalesPipelineService.getMetrics()` during the `fetchData()` call (line 461), not computed locally. It represents deals in post-discovery stages with no future meeting set.

## 2. Actions Tab Filtering (Lines 147-222, 2330-2390)

**State Declarations (Lines 147-222):**

```typescript
// Line 147: Main tab state
const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'actions' | 'outreach' | 'pipeline' | 'orbit' | 'overview' | 'templates'>('actions');

// Lines 221-226: Actions tab filters
const [actionFilter, setActionFilter] = useState<'all' | 'mine' | 'urgent'>('mine');
const [actionPhaseFilter, setActionPhaseFilter] = useState<'all' | 'outreach' | 'closing' | 'orbit' | 'non_urgent'>('all');
const [actionSort, setActionSort] = useState<'priority' | 'stage' | 'temperature' | 'value' | 'name' | 'newest' | 'oldest'>(() => {
  if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && user?.id) {
    return (localStorage.getItem(`action_sort_${user.id}`) as any) || 'priority';
  }
  return 'priority';
});
```

))}

**Phase Filter UI (Lines 2352-2380):**

```typescript
<div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-0.5">

      }`}>{p.count}</span>
    </button>
  ))}
</div>

## 3. How Opportunities Are Filtered/Displayed (Lines 1143-1206)

**Constants (Lines 1143-1144):**

```typescript
const PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked'];
const POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
```

**allActionItems Computation (Lines 1146-1156):**

```typescript
const allActionItems = useMemo(() => {
  const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  return opportunities
    .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
    .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
    .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
    .sort((a, b) => {
      if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;
      return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
    });
}, [opportunities]);
```

**actionItems Computation with Owner/Urgent Filters (Lines 1158-1164):**

```typescript
const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
  return allActionItems.filter(({ opp, action }) => {
    if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
    if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
    return true;  // 'all' returns everything
  });
}, [allActionItems, actionFilter, user?.id]);
```

**Phase-Based Filtered Items (Lines 1166-1171):**

```typescript
const outreachActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
const closingActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
const orbitActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit'), [actionItems]);
const allOutreachCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
const allClosingCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
const allOrbitCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit').length, [allActionItems]);
```

**Non-Urgent Items (Waiting State) (Lines 1173-1181):**

```typescript
// Non-urgent: all non-terminal opps that are NOT actionable (waiting state)
const nonUrgentItems = useMemo(() => {
  const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  return opportunities
    .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
    .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
    .filter(({ action }) => !action.isActionable)
    .sort((a, b) => (a.opp.name || '').localeCompare(b.opp.name || ''));
}, [opportunities]);
```

**Final Display Logic with Sorting (Lines 1184-1206):**

```typescript
const displayedActions = useMemo(() => {
  let items = actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? outreachActions
    : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? closingActions
    : actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? orbitActions
    : actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? nonUrgentItems
    : actionItems;

  if (actionSort === 'priority' && actionPhaseFilter !== 'non_urgent') return items;
  const stageIdx: Record<string, number> = {};
  [...PIPELINE_STAGES, 'orbit', 'nurture', 'v2_closed_lost'].forEach((s, i) => { stageIdx[s] = i; });

  return [...items].sort((a, b) => {
    switch (actionSort) {
      case 'stage': return stageIdx[a.opp.stage] - stageIdx[b.opp.stage];
      case 'temperature': return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
      case 'value': return (b.opp.deal_value || 0) - (a.opp.deal_value || 0);
      case 'name': return (a.opp.name || '').localeCompare(b.opp.name || '');
      case 'newest': return new Date(b.opp.created_at).getTime() - new Date(a.opp.created_at).getTime();
      case 'oldest': return new Date(a.opp.created_at).getTime() - new Date(b.opp.created_at).getTime();
      default: return 0;
    }
  });
}, [actionPhaseFilter, outreachActions, closingActions, orbitActions, actionItems, nonUrgentItems, actionSort]);
```

**Empty State Labels (Lines 2323-2327):**

```typescript
const emptyLabel = actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? 'No outreach actions needed' :
  actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? 'No closing actions needed' :
  actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? 'No orbit actions needed' :
  actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? 'No opportunities in waiting state' :
  'No actions needed right now';
```

---

## Key Insights

1. **Alert Cards Logic**: Cards use conditional styling based on metric values. Higher counts trigger red/orange/amber alerts. The "Meetings" card shows today's count if >0, otherwise this week's count.

2. **Filtering Hierarchy**: 
   - First: `actionFilter` (all/mine/urgent) narrows across all actionable opportunities
   - Second: `actionPhaseFilter` (all/outreach/closing/orbit/non_urgent) selects by stage group
   - Third: `actionSort` re-orders the results

3. **Action Determination**: The `getNextAction()` function (lines 935-1137) determines whether an opportunity is actionable and assigns priority based on complex stage-specific logic.

4. **Counts Calculation**: Counts for phase tabs use `allActionItems` (all actionable opps) not `actionItems` (filtered by owner), so badges show full unfiltered count per phase.

 `./app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`

```text
   300→
   301→    // Avg close time (days from created_at to closed_at for won deals)
   302→    const closeTimes = closedWon
   303→      .filter(o => o.created_at && o.closed_at)
   304→      .map(o => (new Date(o.closed_at!).getTime() - new Date(o.created_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   305→    const avgCloseTime = closeTimes.length > 0 ? closeTimes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / closeTimes.length : 0;
   306→
   307→    // Qualified % = bucket A + B / total
   308→    const qualifiedCount = all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A' || o.bucket === 'B').length;
   309→    const qualifiedPct = all.length > 0 ? (qualifiedCount / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   310→
   311→    // Bucket A %
   312→    const bucketAPct = all.length > 0 ? (all.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length / all.length) * 100 : 0;
   313→
   314→    // Pipeline value (active)
   315→    const pipelineValue = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   316→
   317→    // Overdue follow-ups
   318→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   319→    const overdueFollowups = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   320→      o.next_meeting_at && o.next_meeting_at < now
   321→    ).length;
   322→
   323→    // Proposals sent
   324→    const proposalsSent = all.filter(o =>
   325→      ['proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'].includes(o.stage)
   326→    ).length;
   327→
   328→    // Alert metrics for manager cards
   329→    const nowDate = new Date();
   330→    const todayStart = new Date(nowDate.getFullYear(), nowDate.getMonth(), nowDate.getDate());
   331→    const weekEnd = new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
   332→    const meetingsThisWeek = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   333→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < weekEnd
   334→    ).length;
   335→    const meetingsToday = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
   336→      o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
   337→    ).length;
   338→
   339→    // Stale deals: active pipeline deals with no contact in 7+ days
   340→    const staleDeals = pipelineActive.filter(o => {
   341→      const lastDate = o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date || o.created_at;
   342→      if (!lastDate) return true;
   343→      const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   344→      return daysSince >= 7;
   345→    }).length;
   346→
   347→    // Deals at risk: closing-stage deals (post-discovery) with temp < 40
   348→    const dealsAtRisk = all.filter(o =>
   349→      ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'].includes(o.stage) && o.temperature_score < 40
   350→    ).length;
   351→
   352→    // Total revenue (closed won value)
   353→    const totalRevenue = closedWon.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   354→
   355→    // Weighted pipeline = sum of (deal_value * stage_probability)
   356→    const stageProbability: Record<string, number> = {
   357→      cold_dm: 0.05, warm: 0.1, tg_intro: 0.15, booked: 0.25,
   358→      discovery_done: 0.4, proposal_call: 0.7, v2_contract: 0.9,
   359→    };
   360→    const weightedPipeline = pipelineActive.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0) * (stageProbability[o.stage] || 0.1), 0);
   361→
   362→    // Bottleneck analysis
   363→    const funnelStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won'];
   364→    const stageOrder: Record<string, number> = {};
   365→    funnelStages.forEach((s, i) => { stageOrder[s] = i; });
   366→
   367→    // Count how many opps ever reached each stage (current stage or beyond)
   368→    const reachedStage = funnelStages.map(stage => {
   369→      const idx = stageOrder[stage];
   370→      // Opps currently at this stage or later (including orbit/lost which came from somewhere)
   371→      return all.filter(o => {
   372→        const oIdx = stageOrder[o.stage];
   373→        if (oIdx !== undefined) return oIdx >= idx;
   374→        // Orbit/lost — estimate their furthest stage from timestamps
   375→        if (o.stage === 'orbit' || o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost') {
   376→          if (o.proposal_sent_at && idx <= stageOrder['proposal_call']) return true;
   377→          if (o.discovery_call_at && idx <= stageOrder['discovery_done']) return true;
   378→          if (o.calendly_booked_date && idx <= stageOrder['booked']) return true;
   379→          if (o.tg_handle && idx <= stageOrder['tg_intro']) return true;
   380→          if ((o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date) && idx <= stageOrder['warm']) return true;
   381→          return idx <= stageOrder['cold_dm'];
   382→        }
   383→        return false;
   384→      }).length;
   385→    });
   386→
   387→    // Stage conversion rates (from one stage to the next)
   388→    const stageConversions = funnelStages.slice(0, -1).map((stage, i) => {
   389→      const from = reachedStage[i];
   390→      const to = reachedStage[i + 1];
   391→      const rate = from > 0 ? (to / from) * 100 : 0;
   392→      const dropoff = from - to;
   393→      return { stage, nextStage: funnelStages[i + 1], from, to, rate, dropoff };
   394→    });
   395→
   396→    // Avg days in current stage (for active pipeline deals)
   397→    const avgDaysInStage = funnelStages.slice(0, -1).map(stage => {
   398→      const oppsInStage = pipelineActive.filter(o => o.stage === stage);
   399→      if (oppsInStage.length === 0) return { stage, avgDays: 0, count: 0 };
   400→      const totalDays = oppsInStage.reduce((sum, o) => {
   401→        const days = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(o.updated_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   402→        return sum + days;
   403→      }, 0);
   404→      return { stage, avgDays: Math.round(totalDays / oppsInStage.length), count: oppsInStage.length };
   405→    });
   406→
   407→    // Identify the biggest bottleneck: stage with lowest conversion rate (min 3 opps entering)
   408→    const significantConversions = stageConversions.filter(c => c.from >= 3);
   409→    const worstConversion = significantConversions.length > 0
   410→      ? significantConversions.reduce((worst, c) => c.rate < worst.rate ? c : worst)
   411→      : null;
   412→
   413→    // Identify the slowest stage: where deals sit the longest
   414→    const significantStages = avgDaysInStage.filter(s => s.count >= 2);
   415→    const slowestStage = significantStages.length > 0
   416→      ? significantStages.reduce((slowest, s) => s.avgDays > slowest.avgDays ? s : slowest)
   417→      : null;
   418→
   419→    return {
   420→      totalDmsSent,
   421→      responseRate,
   422→      meetingsBooked,
   423→      discoveryCalls,
   424→      closeRate,
   425→      avgDealSize,
   426→      avgCloseTime,
   427→      qualifiedPct,
   428→      bucketAPct,
   429→      pipelineValue,
   430→      activeDeals: pipelineActive.length,
   431→      overdueFollowups,
   432→      bamfamViolations: metrics.bamfamViolations,
   433→      closedWon: closedWon.length,
   434→      closedLost: closedLost.length,
   435→      inOrbit: inOrbit.length,
   436→      proposalsSent,
   437→      coldDmCount,
   438→      meetingsThisWeek,
   439→      meetingsToday,
   440→      staleDeals,
   441→      dealsAtRisk,
   442→      totalRevenue,
   443→      weightedPipeline,
   444→      stageConversions,
   445→      avgDaysInStage,
   446→      worstConversion,
   447→      slowestStage,
   448→    };
   449→  }, [opportunities, metrics.bamfamViolations, outreachTotal]);
```
</details></tool-use>

  1033→          }

  1043→      // Fix #3: warm/interested — open detail to enter TG handle first, "Got TG!" is quick alt after

  1048→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1049→          ]};
  1050→        }
  1051→        return { label: 'Follow Up', hint: 'No reply yet — send another message on DM', priority: 'high', actionType: 'bump', isActionable: true, sortScore: 20, alternatives: [
  1052→          { label: 'Interested', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1053→          { label: 'Got TG!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'tg_intro', variant: 'default' },
  1054→          { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1055→        ]};
  1056→
  1057→      case 'tg_intro': {
  1058→        const lastDate = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.last_bump_date || opp.created_at;
  1059→        const daysSinceContact = lastDate ? Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) : 999;
  1060→        if (daysSinceContact >= 7) {
  1061→          return { label: 'Re-engage or Orbit', hint: `${daysSinceContact}d since last contact — nudge them on TG or shelve`, priority: 'urgent', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 5, alternatives: [
  1062→            { label: 'Booked!', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1063→            { label: 'Orbit', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'orbit', variant: 'warn' },
  1064→          ]};
  1065→        }
  1066→        return { label: 'Booked!', hint: 'Send Calendly link on TG to schedule', priority: 'high', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'booked', isActionable: true, sortScore: 18, alternatives: [

  1078→        }
  1079→        const meetingInFuture = new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) > new Date();

  1084→          ]};
  1085→        }
  1086→        // Meeting is in the past — call should have happened
  1087→        const hoursSinceBookedMeeting = (Date.now() - new Date(opp.next_meeting_at).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
  1088→        const bookedPriority: ActionPriority = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24 ? 'urgent' : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72 ? 'high' : 'urgent';
  1089→        const bookedHint = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24
  1090→          ? 'Meeting just happened — mark discovery complete'
  1091→          : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72
  1092→            ? `Meeting was ${Math.floor(hoursSinceBookedMeeting / 24)}d ago — log outcome now`
  1093→            : `Meeting was ${Math.floor(hoursSinceBookedMeeting / 24)}d ago — overdue! Log outcome immediately`;
  1094→        const bookedScore = hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 24 ? 2 : hoursSinceBookedMeeting <= 72 ? 8 : 1;
  1095→        return { label: 'Discovery Done', hint: bookedHint, priority: bookedPriority, actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'discovery_done', isActionable: true, sortScore: bookedScore, alternatives: [
  1096→          { label: 'Reschedule', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'default' },
  1097→          { label: 'No Show', actionType: 'open_detail', variant: 'warn' },
  1098→        ]};
  1099→      }
  1100→
  1101→      case 'discovery_done':
  1102→        return { label: 'Book Proposal Call', hint: 'Schedule a call to present the proposal', priority: 'high', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'proposal_call', isActionable: true, sortScore: 14, alternatives: [

  1106→        ]};
  1107→
  1108→      case 'orbit': {

  1120→      case 'nurture': {

  1122→          const d = opp.last_contacted_at || opp.updated_at;
  1123→          return d ? Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(d).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) : 999;
  1124→        })();
  1125→        if (daysSinceNurtureContact >= 30) {
  1126→          return { label: 'Check In', hint: `${daysSinceNurtureContact}d since last contact — send a periodic check-in`, priority: 'medium', actionType: 'open_detail', isActionable: true, sortScore: 65, alternatives: [
  1127→            { label: 'Back to Warm', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'warm', variant: 'default', quick: true },
  1128→            { label: 'Lost', actionType: 'stage_change', targetStage: 'v2_closed_lost', variant: 'danger' },
  1129→          ]};
  1130→        }

  1136→    }
  1137→  };
  1138→
  1139→  // ============================================
  1140→  // Actions Tab: Derived action items
  1141→  // ============================================
  1142→
  1143→  const PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked'];
  1144→  const POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
  1145→
  1146→  const allActionItems = useMemo(() => {
  1147→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  1148→    return opportunities
  1149→      .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
  1150→      .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
  1151→      .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
  1152→      .sort((a, b) => {
  1153→        if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;
  1154→        return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
  1155→      });
  1156→  }, [opportunities]);
  1157→
  1158→  const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
  1159→    return allActionItems.filter(({ opp, action }) => {
  1160→      if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
  1161→      if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
  1162→      return true;
  1163→    });
  1164→  }, [allActionItems, actionFilter, user?.id]);
  1165→
  1166→  const outreachActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
  1167→  const closingActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
  1168→  const orbitActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit'), [actionItems]);
  1169→  const allOutreachCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
  1170→  const allClosingCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
  1171→  const allOrbitCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit').length, [allActionItems]);
  1172→
  1173→  // Non-urgent: all non-terminal opps that are NOT actionable (waiting state) — shows their next step
  1174→  const nonUrgentItems = useMemo(() => {
  1175→    const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  1176→    return opportunities
  1177→      .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
  1178→      .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
  1179→      .filter(({ action }) => !action.isActionable)

## Summary Report: Sales Pipeline Page Analysis

I've thoroughly analyzed `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx` and found all the sections you requested. Here are the findings:
