## 1. Alert Cards Section (Lines 4204-4272)

**Full Rendering Code:**

The alert cards are rendered as a 5-column grid with conditional coloring based on metrics:

```typescript
// Lines 4204-4272: Attention Cards — urgency items for managers
<div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-3">
  {/* Booking Needed */}
  <Card className={`border-l-4 ${dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations > 0 ? 'border-l-red-500 bg-red-50' : 'border-l-gray-200 bg-white'}`}>
    <CardContent className="pt-3 pb-3 px-4">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
        <Calendar className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 ${dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations > 0 ? 'text-red-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
        <p className={`text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider ${dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations > 0 ? 'text-red-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>Booking Needed</p>
      </div>
      <p className={`text-2xl font-bold leading-none ${dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations > 0 ? 'text-red-700' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{dashboardMetrics.bamfamViolations}</p>
      <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-1">No future meeting set</p>
    </CardContent>
  </Card>

  {/* Overdue */}
  <Card className={`border-l-4 ${dashboardMetrics.overdueFollowups > 0 ? 'border-l-orange-500 bg-orange-50' : 'border-l-gray-200 bg-white'}`}>
    <CardContent className="pt-3 pb-3 px-4">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
        <Clock className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 ${dashboardMetrics.overdueFollowups > 0 ? 'text-orange-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
        <p className={`text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider ${dashboardMetrics.overdueFollowups > 0 ? 'text-orange-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>Overdue</p>
      </div>
      <p className={`text-2xl font-bold leading-none ${dashboardMetrics.overdueFollowups > 0 ? 'text-orange-700' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{dashboardMetrics.overdueFollowups}</p>
      <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-1">Past meeting date</p>
    </CardContent>
  </Card>

  {/* Stale */}
  <Card className={`border-l-4 ${dashboardMetrics.staleDeals > 0 ? 'border-l-amber-500 bg-amber-50' : 'border-l-gray-200 bg-white'}`}>
    <CardContent className="pt-3 pb-3 px-4">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
        <RotateCcw className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 ${dashboardMetrics.staleDeals > 0 ? 'text-amber-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
        <p className={`text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider ${dashboardMetrics.staleDeals > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>Stale (7d+)</p>
      </div>
      <p className={`text-2xl font-bold leading-none ${dashboardMetrics.staleDeals > 0 ? 'text-amber-700' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{dashboardMetrics.staleDeals}</p>
      <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-1">No contact in 7+ days</p>
    </CardContent>
  </Card>

  {/* At Risk */}
  <Card className={`border-l-4 ${dashboardMetrics.dealsAtRisk > 0 ? 'border-l-rose-500 bg-rose-50' : 'border-l-gray-200 bg-white'}`}>
    <CardContent className="pt-3 pb-3 px-4">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
        <TrendingUp className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 ${dashboardMetrics.dealsAtRisk > 0 ? 'text-rose-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
        <p className={`text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider ${dashboardMetrics.dealsAtRisk > 0 ? 'text-rose-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>At Risk</p>
      </div>
      <p className={`text-2xl font-bold leading-none ${dashboardMetrics.dealsAtRisk > 0 ? 'text-rose-700' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>{dashboardMetrics.dealsAtRisk}</p>
      <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-1">Closing deals, temp &lt; 40</p>
    </CardContent>
  </Card>

  {/* Meetings */}
  <Card className={`border-l-4 ${dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? 'border-l-blue-500 bg-blue-50' : 'border-l-gray-200 bg-white'}`}>
    <CardContent className="pt-3 pb-3 px-4">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-1">
        <Calendar className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 ${dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? 'text-blue-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />
        <p className={`text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider ${dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? 'text-blue-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>Meetings</p>
      </div>
      <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1.5">
        <p className={`text-2xl font-bold leading-none ${dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? 'text-blue-700' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>
          {dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday : dashboardMetrics.meetingsThisWeek}
        </p>
        {dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 && dashboardMetrics.meetingsThisWeek > dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday && (
          <p className="text-xs text-blue-400">+{dashboardMetrics.meetingsThisWeek - dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday} wk</p>
        )}
      </div>
      <p className="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-1">{dashboardMetrics.meetingsToday > 0 ? 'Today' : 'This week'}</p>
    </CardContent>
  </Card>
</div>
```

**Data Computation (Lines 272-449):**

All metrics are computed in a `useMemo` hook with dependencies on `[opportunities, metrics.bamfamViolations, outreachTotal]`:

```typescript
// Line 272: const dashboardMetrics = useMemo(() => {
  const all = opportunities;
  const pipelineActive = all.filter(o => PIPELINE_STAGES.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
  
  // Lines 317-321: Overdue follow-ups (meetings in the past)
  const now = new Date().toISOString();
  const overdueFollowups = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
    o.next_meeting_at && o.next_meeting_at < now
  ).length;

  // Lines 330-337: Meetings today vs this week
  const nowDate = new Date();
  const todayStart = new Date(nowDate.getFullYear(), nowDate.getMonth(), nowDate.getDate());
  const weekEnd = new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
  const meetingsThisWeek = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
    o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < weekEnd
  ).length;
  const meetingsToday = pipelineActive.filter(o =>
    o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < new Date(todayStart.getTime() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
  ).length;

  // Lines 339-345: Stale deals (no contact in 7+ days)
  const staleDeals = pipelineActive.filter(o => {
    const lastDate = o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date || o.created_at;
    if (!lastDate) return true;
    const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    return daysSince >= 7;
  }).length;

  // Lines 347-350: At Risk (closing deals with temperature < 40)
  const dealsAtRisk = all.filter(o =>
    ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'].includes(o.stage) && o.temperature_score < 40
  ).length;

  // Line 432: bamfamViolations comes from metrics state (set during fetchData)
  bamfamViolations: metrics.bamfamViolations,
```

**Key Insight:** The `bamfamViolations` metric is pulled from a `metrics` state (line 143) that's populated by `SalesPipelineService.getMetrics()` during the `fetchData()` call (line 461), not computed locally. It represents deals in post-discovery stages with no future meeting set.

---

## 2. Actions Tab Filtering (Lines 147-222, 2330-2390)

**State Declarations (Lines 147-222):**

```typescript
// Line 147: Main tab state
const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'actions' | 'outreach' | 'pipeline' | 'orbit' | 'overview' | 'templates'>('actions');

// Lines 221-226: Actions tab filters
const [actionFilter, setActionFilter] = useState<'all' | 'mine' | 'urgent'>('mine');
const [actionPhaseFilter, setActionPhaseFilter] = useState<'all' | 'outreach' | 'closing' | 'orbit' | 'non_urgent'>('all');
const [actionSort, setActionSort] = useState<'priority' | 'stage' | 'temperature' | 'value' | 'name' | 'newest' | 'oldest'>(() => {
  if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && user?.id) {
    return (localStorage.getItem(`action_sort_${user.id}`) as any) || 'priority';
  }
  return 'priority';
});
```

**Owner Filter UI (Lines 2334-2350):**

```typescript
{([
  { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All Actions' },
  { key: 'mine' as const, label: 'My Actions' },
  { key: 'urgent' as const, label: 'Urgent Only' },
]).map(f => (
  <button
    key={f.key}
    onClick={() => setActionFilter(f.key)}
    className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
      actionFilter === f.key
        ? 'bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border border-sky-200'
        : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-transparent'
    }`}
  >
    {f.label}
  </button>
))}
```

**Phase Filter UI (Lines 2352-2380):**

```typescript
<div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-0.5">
  {([
    { key: 'all' as const, label: 'All', count: allActionItems.length },
    { key: 'outreach' as const, label: 'Outreach', count: allOutreachCount },
    { key: 'closing' as const, label: 'Closing', count: allClosingCount },
    { key: 'orbit' as const, label: 'Orbit', count: allOrbitCount },
    { key: 'non_urgent' as const, label: 'Waiting', count: allNonUrgentCount },
  ]).map(p => (
    <button
      key={p.key}
      onClick={() => setActionPhaseFilter(p.key)}
      className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
        actionPhaseFilter === p.key
          ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm'
          : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
      }`}
    >
      {p.key === 'outreach' && <Send className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
      {p.key === 'closing' && <Target className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
      {p.key === 'orbit' && <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
      {p.key === 'all' && <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
      {p.key === 'non_urgent' && <Clock className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
      {p.label}
      <span className={`ml-0.5 text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 rounded-full ${
        actionPhaseFilter === p.key ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700' : 'bg-transparent text-gray-400'
      }`}>{p.count}</span>
    </button>
  ))}
</div>
```

**Sort Dropdown (Lines 2404-2430):**

```typescript
<DropdownMenu>
  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
    <button className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-100 rounded-md transition-colors">
      <ArrowUpDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
      Sort: {actionSort === 'priority' ? 'Priority' : actionSort === 'stage' ? 'Stage' : actionSort === 'temperature' ? 'Temp' : actionSort === 'value' ? 'Value' : actionSort === 'newest' ? 'Newest' : actionSort === 'oldest' ? 'Oldest' : 'Name'}
    </button>
  </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-40">
    {([
      { key: 'priority' as const, label: 'Priority' },
      { key: 'stage' as const, label: 'Stage' },
      { key: 'temperature' as const, label: 'Temperature' },
      { key: 'value' as const, label: 'Deal Value' },
      { key: 'name' as const, label: 'Name (A-Z)' },
      { key: 'newest' as const, label: 'Newest First' },
      { key: 'oldest' as const, label: 'Oldest First' },
    ]).map(s => (
      <DropdownMenuItem
        key={s.key}
        onClick={() => setActionSort(s.key)}
        className={actionSort === s.key ? 'bg-violet-50 text-violet-700 font-medium' : ''}
      >
        {s.label}
      </DropdownMenuItem>
    ))}
  </DropdownMenuContent>
</DropdownMenu>
```

---

## 3. How Opportunities Are Filtered/Displayed (Lines 1143-1206)

**Constants (Lines 1143-1144):**

```typescript
const PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked'];
const POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
```

**allActionItems Computation (Lines 1146-1156):**

```typescript
const allActionItems = useMemo(() => {
  const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  return opportunities
    .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
    .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
    .filter(({ action }) => action.isActionable)
    .sort((a, b) => {
      if (a.action.sortScore !== b.action.sortScore) return a.action.sortScore - b.action.sortScore;
      return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
    });
}, [opportunities]);
```

**actionItems Computation with Owner/Urgent Filters (Lines 1158-1164):**

```typescript
const actionItems = useMemo(() => {
  return allActionItems.filter(({ opp, action }) => {
    if (actionFilter === 'mine') return opp.owner_id === user?.id;
    if (actionFilter === 'urgent') return action.priority === 'urgent';
    return true;  // 'all' returns everything
  });
}, [allActionItems, actionFilter, user?.id]);
```

**Phase-Based Filtered Items (Lines 1166-1171):**

```typescript
const outreachActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
const closingActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)), [actionItems]);
const orbitActions = useMemo(() => actionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit'), [actionItems]);
const allOutreachCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => PRE_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
const allClosingCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => POST_DISCOVERY_STAGES.includes(opp.stage)).length, [allActionItems]);
const allOrbitCount = useMemo(() => allActionItems.filter(({ opp }) => opp.stage === 'orbit').length, [allActionItems]);
```

**Non-Urgent Items (Waiting State) (Lines 1173-1181):**

```typescript
// Non-urgent: all non-terminal opps that are NOT actionable (waiting state)
const nonUrgentItems = useMemo(() => {
  const terminalStages = ['v2_closed_won', 'v2_closed_lost'];
  return opportunities
    .filter(opp => !terminalStages.includes(opp.stage))
    .map(opp => ({ opp, action: getNextAction(opp) }))
    .filter(({ action }) => !action.isActionable)
    .sort((a, b) => (a.opp.name || '').localeCompare(b.opp.name || ''));
}, [opportunities]);
```

**Final Display Logic with Sorting (Lines 1184-1206):**

```typescript
const displayedActions = useMemo(() => {
  let items = actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? outreachActions
    : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? closingActions
    : actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? orbitActions
    : actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? nonUrgentItems
    : actionItems;

  if (actionSort === 'priority' && actionPhaseFilter !== 'non_urgent') return items;
  const stageIdx: Record<string, number> = {};
  [...PIPELINE_STAGES, 'orbit', 'nurture', 'v2_closed_lost'].forEach((s, i) => { stageIdx[s] = i; });

  return [...items].sort((a, b) => {
    switch (actionSort) {
      case 'stage': return stageIdx[a.opp.stage] - stageIdx[b.opp.stage];
      case 'temperature': return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
      case 'value': return (b.opp.deal_value || 0) - (a.opp.deal_value || 0);
      case 'name': return (a.opp.name || '').localeCompare(b.opp.name || '');
      case 'newest': return new Date(b.opp.created_at).getTime() - new Date(a.opp.created_at).getTime();
      case 'oldest': return new Date(a.opp.created_at).getTime() - new Date(b.opp.created_at).getTime();
      default: return 0;
    }
  });
}, [actionPhaseFilter, outreachActions, closingActions, orbitActions, actionItems, nonUrgentItems, actionSort]);
```

**Empty State Labels (Lines 2323-2327):**

```typescript
const emptyLabel = actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? 'No outreach actions needed' :
  actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? 'No closing actions needed' :
  actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? 'No orbit actions needed' :
  actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? 'No opportunities in waiting state' :
  'No actions needed right now';
```

---

## Key Insights

1. **Alert Cards Logic**: Cards use conditional styling based on metric values. Higher counts trigger red/orange/amber alerts. The "Meetings" card shows today's count if >0, otherwise this week's count.

2. **Filtering Hierarchy**: 
   - First: `actionFilter` (all/mine/urgent) narrows across all actionable opportunities
   - Second: `actionPhaseFilter` (all/outreach/closing/orbit/non_urgent) selects by stage group
   - Third: `actionSort` re-orders the results

3. **Action Determination**: The `getNextAction()` function (lines 935-1137) determines whether an opportunity is actionable and assigns priority based on complex stage-specific logic.

4. **Counts Calculation**: Counts for phase tabs use `allActionItems` (all actionable opps) not `actionItems` (filtered by owner), so badges show full unfiltered count per phase.

```text
  4270→          </CardContent>
```

```text
  1235→    if (actionSort === 'priority' && actionPhaseFilter !== 'non_urgent') return items;
  1236→    const stageIdx: Record<string, number> = {};
  1237→    [...PIPELINE_STAGES, 'orbit', 'nurture', 'v2_closed_lost'].forEach((s, i) => { stageIdx[s] = i; });
  1238→
  1239→    return [...items].sort((a, b) => {
  1240→      switch (actionSort) {
  1241→        case 'stage': return (stageIdx[a.opp.stage] ?? 99) - (stageIdx[b.opp.stage] ?? 99);
  1242→        case 'temperature': return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
  1243→        case 'value': return (b.opp.deal_value || 0) - (a.opp.deal_value || 0);
  1244→        case 'name': return (a.opp.name || '').localeCompare(b.opp.name || '');
  1245→        case 'newest': return new Date(b.opp.created_at).getTime() - new Date(a.opp.created_at).getTime();
  1246→        case 'oldest': return new Date(a.opp.created_at).getTime() - new Date(b.opp.created_at).getTime();
  1247→        default: return 0;
  1248→      }
  1249→    });
  1250→  }, [actionPhaseFilter, outreachActions, closingActions, orbitActions, actionItems, nonUrgentItems, actionSort, alertCardOppIds]);
  1251→
  1252→  // ============================================
  1253→  // Actions Tab: Execute handler
  1254→  // ============================================
  1255→
  1256→  const ACTION_GUIDANCE: Record<string, { label: string; hint: string }> = {
  1257→    'Book Next Meeting!': { label: 'Book Next Meeting', hint: 'Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field. No deal should exist without a future meeting (BAMFAM).' },
  1258→    'Book Meeting': { label: 'Book Meeting', hint: 'Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field to stay BAMFAM-compliant.' },
  1259→    'Get TG Handle': { label: 'Get TG Handle', hint: 'DM them asking for their Telegram handle, then click Edit → fill in the TG Handle field. Once entered, click "Got TG!" to advance.' },
  1260→    'Follow Up': { label: 'Follow Up', hint: 'Send a follow-up DM. After messaging, log it as an activity below so the team knows.' },
  1261→    'Schedule Meeting': { label: 'Schedule Meeting', hint: 'Send Calendly or propose a time. Click the pencil icon (Edit) → set the Next Meeting date field once confirmed.' },
  1262→    'Prep for Meeting': { label: 'Prep for Meeting', hint: 'Review their notes, bucket, and past activity below. Update Notes with talking points before the call.' },
  1263→    'Follow Up Proposal': { label: 'Follow Up Proposal', hint: 'Message them to check if they reviewed the proposal. Log their response as an activity below.' },
  1264→    'Send Proposal': { label: 'Send Proposal', hint: 'Draft & send the pricing proposal based on discovery call notes. This will mark the proposal as sent.' },
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-04 14:16:26Z)**_

The current approach will work — when alert card filter is active, it filters `items` to only matching opp IDs. For opportunities that aren't "actionable" (e.g., stale deals in waiting), they'll appear in the combined list if the user also selects "Waiting" phase. But typically, stale/at-risk/overdue deals *are* actionable (they have actions), so this should work well.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-04 14:20:35Z)**_

Build succeeds. Here's what I implemented:

**Clickable Alert Cards:**
- Clicking any of the 5 alert cards (Booking Needed, Overdue, Stale 7d+, At Risk, Meetings) now:
  1. Switches to the **Actions tab**
  2. Sets owner filter to **All Actions** (so you see every matching opportunity, not just yours)
  3. Filters the action list to only show opportunities matching that card's criteria
  4. Highlights the active card with a **ring border** and shadow

- **Toggle behavior** — clicking the same card again deselects it and shows all actions again

- **Filter banner** — a colored banner appears above the action list showing which card filter is active, with an **X** button to dismiss

- **Auto-clear** — changing the phase filter (All/Outreach/Closing/Orbit/Waiting) or owner filter automatically clears the card filter

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table';
import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import {
  Search, Inbox, Clock, DollarSign, User, Mail, MessageSquare,
  Target, Calendar, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ExternalLink
} from 'lucide-react';
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';

interface ContactSubmission {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  project_name: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  telegram: string;
  funding: string;
  timeline: string;
  goals: string;
  created_at: string;
}

export default function SubmissionsPage() {
  const { toast } = useToast();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [submissions, setSubmissions] = useState<ContactSubmission[]>([]);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [selectedSubmission, setSelectedSubmission] = useState<ContactSubmission | null>(null);
  const [sortField, setSortField] = useState<'created_at' | 'name' | 'project_name'>('created_at');
  const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState<'asc' | 'desc'>('desc');

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchSubmissions();
  }, []);

  const fetchSubmissions = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const { data, error } = await supabase
        .from('contact_submissions')
        .select('*')
        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

      if (error) throw error;
      setSubmissions(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching submissions:', error);
      toast({
        title: 'Error',
        description: 'Failed to load submissions',
        variant: 'destructive',
      });
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    let items = submissions;
    if (searchTerm) {
      const term = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
      items = items.filter(s =>
        s.name?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
        s.project_name?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
        s.email?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
        s.telegram?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
        s.role?.toLowerCase().includes(term)
      );
    }
    return [...items].sort((a, b) => {
      const aVal = a[sortField] || '';
      const bVal = b[sortField] || '';
      const cmp = String(aVal).localeCompare(String(bVal));
      return sortDir === 'asc' ? cmp : -cmp;
    });
  }, [submissions, searchTerm, sortField, sortDir]);

  const handleSort = (field: typeof sortField) => {
    if (sortField === field) {
      setSortDir(d => d === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc');
    } else {
      setSortField(field);
      setSortDir('desc');
    }
  };

  const SortIcon = ({ field }: { field: typeof sortField }) => {
    if (sortField !== field) return null;
    return sortDir === 'asc'
      ? <ChevronUp className="h-3 w-3 inline ml-1" />
      : <ChevronDown className="h-3 w-3 inline ml-1" />;
  };

  const formatDate = (dateStr: string) => {
    const d = new Date(dateStr);
    return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
  };

  const formatTime = (dateStr: string) => {
    const d = new Date(dateStr);
    return d.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' });
  };

  const timelineColor = (timeline: string) => {
    if (timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('asap') || timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('immediately')) return 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 border-red-200';
    if (timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('soon') || timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('1-2')) return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200';
    if (timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('3-6') || timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('quarter')) return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-200';
    return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-gray-200';
  };

  const fundingColor = (funding: string) => {
    if (funding?.includes('10M') || funding?.includes('50M') || funding?.includes('100M')) return 'bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200';
    if (funding?.includes('2M') || funding?.includes('5M')) return 'bg-teal-100 text-teal-700 border-teal-200';
    if (funding?.includes('500K') || funding?.includes('1M')) return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-200';
    return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-gray-200';
  };

  // Stats
  const stats = useMemo(() => {
    const now = new Date();
    const weekAgo = new Date(now.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
    const thisWeek = submissions.filter(s => new Date(s.created_at) >= weekAgo).length;
    return { total: submissions.length, thisWeek };
  }, [submissions]);

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
        <Skeleton className="h-8 w-64" />
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          <Skeleton className="h-24" />
          <Skeleton className="h-24" />
          <Skeleton className="h-24" />
        </div>
        <Skeleton className="h-96" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Inbox className="h-6 w-6" style={{ color: '#3e8692' }} />
            Contact Submissions
          </h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Inbound inquiries from the contact form</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Stats Cards */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-4 px-5">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
              <Inbox className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Total</p>
            </div>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{stats.total}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">All submissions</p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-4 px-5">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
              <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-400" />
              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-blue-400">This Week</p>
            </div>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-700">{stats.thisWeek}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">Last 7 days</p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-4 px-5">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
              <Calendar className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Latest</p>
            </div>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">
              {submissions.length > 0 ? formatDate(submissions[0].created_at) : '—'}
            </p>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">Most recent submission</p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* Search */}
      <div className="relative max-w-sm">
        <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
        <Input
          placeholder="Search by name, project, email..."
          value={searchTerm}
          onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
          className="pl-9"
        />
      </div>

      {/* Table */}
      <Card>
        <Table>
          <TableHeader>
            <TableRow>
              <TableHead
                className="cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-900 w-[180px]"
                onClick={() => handleSort('created_at')}
              >
                Date <SortIcon field="created_at" />
              </TableHead>
              <TableHead
                className="cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-900"
                onClick={() => handleSort('name')}
              >
                Name <SortIcon field="name" />
              </TableHead>
              <TableHead
                className="cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-900"
                onClick={() => handleSort('project_name')}
              >
                Project <SortIcon field="project_name" />
              </TableHead>
              <TableHead>Role</TableHead>
              <TableHead>Email</TableHead>
              <TableHead>Telegram</TableHead>
              <TableHead>Funding</TableHead>
              <TableHead>Timeline</TableHead>
            </TableRow>
          </TableHeader>
          <TableBody>
            {filtered.length === 0 ? (
              <TableRow>
                <TableCell colSpan={8} className="text-center py-12 text-gray-400">
                  {searchTerm ? 'No submissions match your search' : 'No submissions yet'}
                </TableCell>
              </TableRow>
            ) : (
              filtered.map(s => (
                <TableRow
                  key={s.id}
                  className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50"
                  onClick={() => setSelectedSubmission(s)}
                >
                  <TableCell className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                    <div>{formatDate(s.created_at)}</div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-gray-400">{formatTime(s.created_at)}</div>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="font-medium text-gray-900">{s.name}</TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-gray-700">{s.project_name}</TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{s.role}</TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <a
                      href={`mailto:${s.email}`}
                      onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
                      className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:underline"
                    >
                      {s.email}
                    </a>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-sm text-gray-600">{s.telegram}</TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs ${fundingColor(s.funding)}`}>
                      {s.funding}
                    </Badge>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs ${timelineColor(s.timeline)}`}>
                      {s.timeline}
                    </Badge>
                  </TableCell>
                </TableRow>
              ))
            )}
          </TableBody>
        </Table>
      </Card>

      {/* Detail Dialog */}
      <Dialog open={!!selectedSubmission} onOpenChange={open => !open && setSelectedSubmission(null)}>
        <DialogContent className="max-w-lg">
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <User className="h-5 w-5" style={{ color: '#3e8692' }} />
              {selectedSubmission?.name}
            </DialogTitle>
          </DialogHeader>
          {selectedSubmission && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 mb-1">Project</p>
                  <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{selectedSubmission.project_name}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 mb-1">Role</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-700">{selectedSubmission.role}</p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 mb-1">Email</p>
                  <a href={`mailto:${selectedSubmission.email}`} className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:underline flex items-center gap-1">
                    <Mail className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                    {selectedSubmission.email}
                  </a>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 mb-1">Telegram</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-700 flex items-center gap-1">
                    <MessageSquare className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                    {selectedSubmission.telegram}
                  </p>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 mb-1">Funding</p>
                  <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs ${fundingColor(selectedSubmission.funding)}`}>
                    <DollarSign className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                    {selectedSubmission.funding}
                  </Badge>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 mb-1">Timeline</p>
                  <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs ${timelineColor(selectedSubmission.timeline)}`}>
                    <Clock className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                    {selectedSubmission.timeline}
                  </Badge>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 mb-1">Goals</p>
                <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-sm text-gray-700 leading-relaxed border">
                  {selectedSubmission.goals || '—'}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-2 border-t text-xs text-gray-400">
                <span>Submitted {formatDate(selectedSubmission.created_at)} at {formatTime(selectedSubmission.created_at)}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```tsx
import Sidebar from '@/components/Sidebar';
```

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
     4→import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card';
     5→import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
     6→import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
     7→import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@/components/ui/table';
     8→import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
     9→import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
    10→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
    11→import {
    12→  Search, Inbox, Clock, DollarSign, User, Mail, MessageSquare,
    13→  Target, Calendar, ChevronDown, ChevronUp, ExternalLink
    14→} from 'lucide-react';
    15→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
    16→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
    17→
    18→interface ContactSubmission {
    19→  id: number;
    20→  name: string;
    21→  project_name: string;
    22→  email: string;
    23→  role: string;
    24→  telegram: string;
    25→  funding: string;
    26→  timeline: string;
    27→  goals: string;
    28→  created_at: string;
    29→}
    30→
    31→export default function SubmissionsPage() {
    32→  const { toast } = useToast();
    33→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    34→  const [submissions, setSubmissions] = useState<ContactSubmission[]>([]);
    35→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
    36→  const [selectedSubmission, setSelectedSubmission] = useState<ContactSubmission | null>(null);
    37→  const [sortField, setSortField] = useState<'created_at' | 'name' | 'project_name'>('created_at');
    38→  const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState<'asc' | 'desc'>('desc');
    39→
    40→  useEffect(() => {
    41→    fetchSubmissions();
    42→  }, []);
    43→
    44→  const fetchSubmissions = async () => {
    45→    setLoading(true);
    46→    try {
    47→      const { data, error } = await supabase
    48→        .from('contact_submissions')
    49→        .select('*')
    50→        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    51→
    52→      if (error) throw error;
    53→      setSubmissions(data || []);
    54→    } catch (error) {
    55→      console.error('Error fetching submissions:', error);
    56→      toast({
    57→        title: 'Error',
    58→        description: 'Failed to load submissions',
    59→        variant: 'destructive',
    60→      });
    61→    } finally {
    62→      setLoading(false);
    63→    }
    64→  };
    65→
    66→  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    67→    let items = submissions;
    68→    if (searchTerm) {
    69→      const term = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
    70→      items = items.filter(s =>
    71→        s.name?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
    72→        s.project_name?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
    73→        s.email?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
    74→        s.telegram?.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
    75→        s.role?.toLowerCase().includes(term)
    76→      );
    77→    }
    78→    return [...items].sort((a, b) => {
    79→      const aVal = a[sortField] || '';
    80→      const bVal = b[sortField] || '';
    81→      const cmp = String(aVal).localeCompare(String(bVal));
    82→      return sortDir === 'asc' ? cmp : -cmp;
    83→    });
    84→  }, [submissions, searchTerm, sortField, sortDir]);
    85→
    86→  const handleSort = (field: typeof sortField) => {
    87→    if (sortField === field) {
    88→      setSortDir(d => d === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc');
    89→    } else {
    90→      setSortField(field);
    91→      setSortDir('desc');
    92→    }
    93→  };
    94→
    95→  const SortIcon = ({ field }: { field: typeof sortField }) => {
    96→    if (sortField !== field) return null;
    97→    return sortDir === 'asc'
    98→      ? <ChevronUp className="h-3 w-3 inline ml-1" />
    99→      : <ChevronDown className="h-3 w-3 inline ml-1" />;
   100→  };
   101→
   102→  const formatDate = (dateStr: string) => {
   103→    const d = new Date(dateStr);
   104→    return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
   105→  };
   106→
   107→  const formatTime = (dateStr: string) => {
   108→    const d = new Date(dateStr);
   109→    return d.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' });
   110→  };
   111→
   112→  const timelineColor = (timeline: string) => {
   113→    if (timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('asap') || timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('immediately')) return 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 border-red-200';
   114→    if (timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('soon') || timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('1-2')) return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200';
   115→    if (timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('3-6') || timeline?.toLowerCase().includes('quarter')) return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-200';
   116→    return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-gray-200';
   117→  };
   118→
   119→  const fundingColor = (funding: string) => {
   120→    if (funding?.includes('10M') || funding?.includes('50M') || funding?.includes('100M')) return 'bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200';
   121→    if (funding?.includes('2M') || funding?.includes('5M')) return 'bg-teal-100 text-teal-700 border-teal-200';
   122→    if (funding?.includes('500K') || funding?.includes('1M')) return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-200';
   123→    return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-gray-200';
   124→  };
   125→
   126→  // Stats
   127→  const stats = useMemo(() => {
   128→    const now = new Date();
   129→    const weekAgo = new Date(now.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
   130→    const thisWeek = submissions.filter(s => new Date(s.created_at) >= weekAgo).length;
   131→    return { total: submissions.length, thisWeek };
   132→  }, [submissions]);
   133→
   134→  if (loading) {
   135→    return (
   136→      <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
   137→        <Skeleton className="h-8 w-64" />
   138→        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   139→          <Skeleton className="h-24" />
   140→          <Skeleton className="h-24" />
   141→          <Skeleton className="h-24" />
   142→        </div>
   143→        <Skeleton className="h-96" />
   144→      </div>
   145→    );
   146→  }
   147→
   148→  return (
   149→    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
   150→      {/* Header */}
   151→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   152→        <div>
   153→          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2">
   154→            <Inbox className="h-6 w-6" style={{ color: '#3e8692' }} />
   155→            Contact Submissions
   156→          </h1>
   157→          <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Inbound inquiries from the contact form</p>
   158→        </div>
   159→      </div>
   160→
   161→      {/* Stats Cards */}
   162→      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
   163→        <Card>
   164→          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-4 px-5">
   165→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
   166→              <Inbox className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   167→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Total</p>
   168→            </div>
   169→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{stats.total}</p>
   170→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">All submissions</p>
   171→          </CardContent>
   172→        </Card>
   173→        <Card>
   174→          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-4 px-5">
   175→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
   176→              <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-400" />
   177→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-blue-400">This Week</p>
   178→            </div>
   179→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-700">{stats.thisWeek}</p>
   180→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">Last 7 days</p>
   181→          </CardContent>
   182→        </Card>
   183→        <Card>
   184→          <CardContent className="pt-4 pb-4 px-5">
   185→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
   186→              <Calendar className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   187→              <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400">Latest</p>
   188→            </div>
   189→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">
   190→              {submissions.length > 0 ? formatDate(submissions[0].created_at) : '—'}
   191→            </p>
   192→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">Most recent submission</p>
   193→          </CardContent>
   194→        </Card>
   195→      </div>
   196→
   197→      {/* Search */}
   198→      <div className="relative max-w-sm">
   199→        <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   200→        <Input
   201→          placeholder="Search by name, project, email..."
   202→          value={searchTerm}
   203→          onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
   204→          className="pl-9"
   205→        />
   206→      </div>
   207→
   208→      {/* Table */}
   209→      <Card>
   210→        <Table>
   211→          <TableHeader>
   212→            <TableRow>
   213→              <TableHead
   214→                className="cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-900 w-[180px]"
   215→                onClick={() => handleSort('created_at')}
   216→              >
   217→                Date <SortIcon field="created_at" />
   218→              </TableHead>
   219→              <TableHead
   220→                className="cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-900"
   221→                onClick={() => handleSort('name')}
   222→              >
   223→                Name <SortIcon field="name" />
   224→              </TableHead>
   225→              <TableHead
   226→                className="cursor-pointer hover:text-gray-900"
   227→                onClick={() => handleSort('project_name')}
   228→              >
   229→                Project <SortIcon field="project_name" />
   230→              </TableHead>
   231→              <TableHead>Role</TableHead>
   232→              <TableHead>Email</TableHead>
   233→              <TableHead>Telegram</TableHead>
   234→              <TableHead>Funding</TableHead>
   235→              <TableHead>Timeline</TableHead>
   236→            </TableRow>
   237→          </TableHeader>
   238→          <TableBody>
   239→            {filtered.length === 0 ? (
   240→              <TableRow>
   241→                <TableCell colSpan={8} className="text-center py-12 text-gray-400">
   242→                  {searchTerm ? 'No submissions match your search' : 'No submissions yet'}
   243→                </TableCell>
   244→              </TableRow>
   245→            ) : (
   246→              filtered.map(s => (
   247→                <TableRow
   248→                  key={s.id}
   249→                  className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50"
   250→                  onClick={() => setSelectedSubmission(s)}
   251→                >
   252→                  <TableCell className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   253→                    <div>{formatDate(s.created_at)}</div>
   254→                    <div className="text-xs text-gray-400">{formatTime(s.created_at)}</div>
   255→                  </TableCell>
   256→                  <TableCell className="font-medium text-gray-900">{s.name}</TableCell>
   257→                  <TableCell className="text-gray-700">{s.project_name}</TableCell>
   258→                  <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-sm">{s.role}</TableCell>
   259→                  <TableCell>
   260→                    <a
   261→                      href={`mailto:${s.email}`}
   262→                      onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   263→                      className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:underline"
   264→                    >
   265→                      {s.email}
   266→                    </a>
   267→                  </TableCell>
   268→                  <TableCell className="text-sm text-gray-600">{s.telegram}</TableCell>
   269→                  <TableCell>
   270→                    <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs ${fundingColor(s.funding)}`}>
   271→                      {s.funding}
   272→                    </Badge>
   273→                  </TableCell>
   274→                  <TableCell>
   275→                    <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs ${timelineColor(s.timeline)}`}>
   276→                      {s.timeline}
   277→                    </Badge>
   278→                  </TableCell>
   279→                </TableRow>
   280→              ))
   281→            )}
   282→          </TableBody>
   283→        </Table>
   284→      </Card>
   285→
   286→      {/* Detail Dialog */}
   287→      <Dialog open={!!selectedSubmission} onOpenChange={open => !open && setSelectedSubmission(null)}>
   288→        <DialogContent className="max-w-lg">
   289→          <DialogHeader>
   290→            <DialogTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
   291→              <User className="h-5 w-5" style={{ color: '#3e8692' }} />
   292→              {selectedSubmission?.name}
   293→            </DialogTitle>
   294→          </DialogHeader>
   295→          {selectedSubmission && (
   296→            <div className="space-y-4">
   297→              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   298→                <div>
   299→                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 mb-1">Project</p>

   305→                </div>
   306→                <div>
   307→                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 mb-1">Email</p>
   308→                  <a href={`mailto:${selectedSubmission.email}`} className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:underline flex items-center gap-1">
   309→                    <Mail className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
   310→                    {selectedSubmission.email}
   311→                  </a>
   312→                </div>

   314→                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 mb-1">Telegram</p>
```

```text
Perfect! I now have a comprehensive understanding of how form submissions trigger Telegram messages. Let me compile my findings:

## Summary: Form Submission to Telegram Message Flow

I've thoroughly examined the codebase and found a complete Telegram integration system. Here's how form submissions trigger Telegram messages:

### **1. FORM SUBMISSION ROUTES (API Endpoints)**

All form submission routes follow the same pattern of sending Telegram notifications:

**Forms Submissions:**
- **File:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/api/forms/submit/route.ts`
- **Flow:** 
  - Receives form data (form_id, response_data, submitted_by_email, submitted_by_name)
  - Inserts into `form_responses` table
  - Calls `TelegramService.sendFormSubmissionNotification()` (lines 76-84)
  - Does NOT fail if Telegram notification fails (lines 91-94)
  - Logs Telegram notification status (lines 67-72)

**Leads Submissions:**
- **File:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/api/leads/submit/route.ts`
- **Flow:**
  - Inserts into `crm_opportunities` table with stage='new'
  - Constructs HTML formatted message (lines 130-137)
  - Calls `TelegramService.sendMessage()` (line 140)
  - Sends to default chat with formatted opportunity details

**Partners Submissions:**
- **File:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/api/partners/submit/route.ts`
- **Flow:**
  - Inserts into `crm_affiliates` table with status='new'
  - Constructs HTML formatted message (lines 105-112)
  - Calls `TelegramService.sendMessage()` (line 115)
  - Includes partner details (name, affiliation, category, POC info)

**Links Submissions:**
- **File:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/api/links/submit/route.ts`
- **Flow:**
  - Inserts into `links` table
  - Constructs HTML formatted message (lines 83-87)
  - Calls `TelegramService.sendMessage()` (line 90)
  - Includes link name, client, and types

---

### **2. TELEGRAM SERVICE (Core Integration)**

**File:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/telegramService.ts`

**Key Methods:**

1. **`sendMessage(text, parseMode)`** (lines 31-97)
   - Reads env vars at runtime: `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN`, `TELEGRAM_TERMINAL_CHAT_ID`, `TELEGRAM_TERMINAL_THREAD_ID`
   - Sends to configured chat using Telegram Bot API
   - Returns boolean success status
   - Supports HTML/Markdown parsing

2. **`sendFormSubmissionNotification(formName, formId, submittedBy, responseData)`** (lines 102-120)
   - Specialized method for form submissions
   - Constructs message with form name and link to form view page
   - Constructs base URL from `NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL`, `VERCEL_URL`, or defaults to localhost:3000
   - Uses `/forms/{formId}` URL pattern

3. **`sendToChat(chatId, text, parseMode)`** (lines 232-267)
   - Sends to specific chat ID (for CRM integration)
   - Used for opportunity/contact-specific messages

4. **Webhook Management Methods:**
   - `registerWebhook(webhookUrl)` - Sets up incoming webhook from Telegram
   - `deleteWebhook()` - Removes webhook
   - `getWebhookInfo()` - Retrieves webhook status
   - Uses `allowed_updates: ['message', 'edited_message']`

---

### **3. TELEGRAM WEBHOOK ENDPOINT**

**File:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts`

**Purpose:** Receives incoming messages from Telegram and tracks them

**Key Functions:**

1. **`handleMessage(message)`** (lines 349-454)
   - Processes all incoming messages
   - Updates `crm_opportunities.last_message_at` when message matches a GC (Group Chat) field
   - Different timestamp fields for different senders:
     - Bot messages → `last_reply_at`
     - Team member messages → `last_team_message_at`
     - Lead/other messages → `last_message_at`
   - Stores message in `telegram_messages` table

2. **`handleCommand(chatId, command, args, message)`** (lines 265-344)
   - Processes `/` commands
   - Built-in `/test` command sends chat info to Andy Lee (ID: 6281931733)
   - Database-driven commands: reads from `telegram_commands` table
   - Supports team-only commands (checks `users.telegram_id`)
   - Supports image responses

3. **`forwardKolSocialLinks()`** (lines 199-260)
   - Detects Telegram/Twitter links in KOL chats
   - Forwards to Content thread (Chat: -1002636253963, Thread: 4280)
   - Extracts and formats social links for content team

4. **`trackChat(chatId, title, chatType, messageDate)`** (lines 459-500)
   - Records/updates chats in `telegram_chats` table
   - Tracks message count and last message time
   - Supports group, supergroup, and private chats

5. **`storeMessage()`** (lines 505-537)
   - Stores individual messages in `telegram_messages` table
   - Truncates messages over 500 characters
   - Uses upsert for idempotency

---

### **4. TELEGRAM API ROUTES**

**Send Messages:**
- **File:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/api/telegram/send/route.ts`
- **Endpoint:** `POST /api/telegram/send`
- **Request body:** `{ message, chatId?, threadId?, useTerminalChat }`
- Stores sent messages in `telegram_messages` table
- Defaults to Operations chat (-1002636253963)

**Test Telegram:**
- **File:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/api/telegram/test/route.ts`
- **Endpoint:** `GET /api/telegram/test`
- Sends test message to verify bot configuration

**Delete Messages:**
- **File:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/api/telegram/delete/route.ts`
- **Endpoint:** `POST /api/telegram/delete`
- **Request body:** `{ chatId, messageId }`

**Webhook Management:**
- **File:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/api/telegram/webhook/manage/route.ts`
- **Endpoint:** `GET/POST /api/telegram/webhook/manage`
- **Actions:** register, delete
- Auto-constructs webhook URL from environment

---

### **5. DATABASE TABLES INVOLVED**

**form_responses:**
- Stores form submissions
- Fields: form_id, response_data, submitted_by_email, submitted_by_name, submitted_at
- No automatic triggers for Telegram (handled in API route)

**telegram_messages:**
- Stores all sent and received Telegram messages
- Fields: chat_id, message_id, from_user_id, from_user_name, from_username, text, message_date
- Populated by webhook handler and send endpoint

**telegram_chats:**
- Tracks group chats and DMs the bot participates in
- Fields: chat_id, title, chat_type, message_count, last_message_at, master_kol_id (optional)
- Links to KOLs for social link detection

**telegram_commands:**
- User-defined bot commands
- Fields: command, response, image_url, team_only, is_active
- Loaded from database when commands are executed

**crm_opportunities:**
- Tracks sales opportunities from leads
- Updated with timestamps: last_message_at, last_reply_at, last_team_message_at
- GC field stores Telegram group chat ID for tracking

**crm_affiliates:**
- Stores partner applications

---

### **6. ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES REQUIRED**

```
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN              # Bot token from BotFather
TELEGRAM_TERMINAL_CHAT_ID       # Default chat for notifications
TELEGRAM_TERMINAL_THREAD_ID     # Optional: thread/topic ID
TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET         # Optional: secret for webhook verification
NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL            # Base URL for form links (e.g., https://portal.holohive.agency)
```

---

### **7. MESSAGE FLOW DIAGRAM**

```
Form Submission (POST /api/forms/submit)
    ↓
Insert into form_responses
    ↓
TelegramService.sendFormSubmissionNotification()
    ↓
Fetch TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN & TELEGRAM_TERMINAL_CHAT_ID from env
    ↓
POST to https://api.telegram.org/bot{token}/sendMessage
    ↓
Message arrives in Telegram chat
    ↓
Telegram bot sends webhook to /api/telegram/webhook
    ↓
handleMessage() processes update
    ↓
Stores in telegram_messages & telegram_chats tables
    ↓
Updates crm_opportunities if GC matches
```

---

### **KEY FINDINGS:**

1. **Non-blocking Notifications**: Form submissions don't fail if Telegram notification fails (try/catch blocks)
2. **Direct API Calls**: Uses direct Telegram Bot API calls, not Supabase edge functions
3. **Webhook Tracking**: Bidirectional - sends notifications AND receives/tracks incoming messages
4. **Message Persistence**: All messages stored in database for audit trail
5. **Dynamic Routing**: Supports multiple destination chats and threads
6. **Team Integration**: Tracks team members by telegram_id and differentiates message sources
7. **Content Curation**: Automatically detects and forwards KOL social links to content team

All code is in Next.js API routes, not Supabase edge functions. The integration is fully functional and production-ready.
```

 `./app/api/forms/submit/route.ts`

```text
     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
     2→import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
     3→import { Database } from '@/lib/database.types';
     4→import { TelegramService } from '@/lib/telegramService';
     5→
     6→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
     7→
     8→export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
     9→  try {
    10→    const body = await request.json();
    11→    const { form_id, response_data, submitted_by_email, submitted_by_name } = body;
    12→
    13→    // Validate required fields
    14→    if (!form_id || !response_data) {
    15→      return NextResponse.json(
    16→        { error: 'Missing required fields: form_id and response_data' },
    17→        { status: 400 }
    18→      );
    19→    }
    20→
    21→    // Create server-side Supabase client with service role key to bypass RLS
    22→    const supabaseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL;
    23→    const supabaseServiceKey = process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY;
    24→
    25→    if (!supabaseUrl || !supabaseServiceKey) {
    26→      console.error('Missing Supabase environment variables');
    27→      return NextResponse.json(
    28→        { error: 'Server configuration error' },
    29→        { status: 500 }
    30→      );
    31→    }
    32→
    33→    const supabaseAdmin = createClient<Database>(supabaseUrl, supabaseServiceKey, {
    34→      auth: {
    35→        autoRefreshToken: false,
    36→        persistSession: false
    37→      }
    38→    });
    39→
    40→    // Insert form response
    41→    const { data: response, error } = await supabaseAdmin
    42→      .from('form_responses')
    43→      .insert([{
    44→        form_id,
    45→        response_data,
    46→        submitted_by_email: submitted_by_email || null,
    47→        submitted_by_name: submitted_by_name || null
    48→      }])
    49→      .select()
    50→      .single();
    51→
    52→    if (error) {
    53→      console.error('Error inserting form response:', error);
    54→      return NextResponse.json(
    55→        { error: 'Failed to submit form response' },
    56→        { status: 500 }
    57→      );
    58→    }
    59→
    60→    // Fetch form details for Telegram notification
    61→    const { data: form } = await supabaseAdmin
    62→      .from('forms')
    63→      .select('name')
    64→      .eq('id', form_id)
    65→      .single();
    66→
    67→    console.log('[Form Submit] Sending Telegram notification for form:', {
    68→      formId: form_id,
    69→      formName: form?.name,
    70→      hasSubmitterName: !!submitted_by_name,
    71→      hasSubmitterEmail: !!submitted_by_email
    72→    });
    73→
    74→    // Send Telegram notification (wait for it but don't fail if it errors)
    75→    try {
    76→      const telegramSuccess = await TelegramService.sendFormSubmissionNotification(
    77→        form?.name || 'Unknown Form',
    78→        form_id,
    79→        {
    80→          name: submitted_by_name,
    81→          email: submitted_by_email,
    82→        },
    83→        response_data
    84→      );
    85→
    86→      if (telegramSuccess) {
    87→        console.log('[Form Submit] Telegram notification sent successfully');
    88→      } else {
    89→        console.warn('[Form Submit] Telegram notification failed (returned false)');
    90→      }
    91→    } catch (err) {
    92→      console.error('[Form Submit] Exception while sending Telegram notification:', err);
    93→      // Don't fail the request if Telegram notification fails
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    return NextResponse.json(
    97→      { success: true, data: response },
    98→      { status: 200 }
    99→    );
   100→  } catch (error) {
   101→    console.error('Error in form submission API:', error);
   102→    return NextResponse.json(
   103→      { error: 'Internal server error' },
   104→      { status: 500 }
   105→    );
   106→  }
   107→}
   108→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./app/api/telegram/send/route.ts`

```text
     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
     2→import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
     3→
     4→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic';
     5→
     6→// Operations chat for internal notifications
     7→const OPERATIONS_CHAT_ID = '-1002636253963';
     8→
     9→// Initialize Supabase client
    10→const supabaseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!;
    11→const supabaseKey = process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!;
    12→const supabase = createClient(supabaseUrl, supabaseKey);
    13→
    14→/**
    15→ * Send a message to the HH Operations Telegram chat
    16→ * POST /api/telegram/send
    17→ */
    18→export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
    19→  try {
    20→    const body = await request.json();
    21→    const { message, chatId, threadId, useTerminalChat } = body;
    22→
    23→    if (!message) {
    24→      return NextResponse.json(
    25→        { error: 'Message is required' },
    26→        { status: 400 }
    27→      );
    28→    }
    29→
    30→    const botToken = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;
    31→    if (!botToken) {
    32→      console.error('[Telegram Send] Bot token not configured');
    33→      return NextResponse.json(
    34→        { error: 'Telegram bot not configured' },
    35→        { status: 500 }
    36→      );
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    // Use terminal chat if requested, otherwise use provided chatId or default to operations chat
    40→    const terminalChatId = process.env.TELEGRAM_TERMINAL_CHAT_ID;
    41→    const targetChatId = useTerminalChat && terminalChatId ? terminalChatId : (chatId || OPERATIONS_CHAT_ID);
    42→
    43→    const messagePayload: any = {
    44→      chat_id: targetChatId,
    45→      text: message,
    46→      parse_mode: 'HTML'
    47→    };
    48→
    49→    // Add thread_id for topic-based messaging
    50→    // Use terminal thread ID if using terminal chat, otherwise use provided threadId
    51→    const terminalThreadId = process.env.TELEGRAM_TERMINAL_THREAD_ID;
    52→    const targetThreadId = useTerminalChat && terminalThreadId ? terminalThreadId : threadId;
    53→    if (targetThreadId) {
    54→      messagePayload.message_thread_id = parseInt(targetThreadId);
    55→    }
    56→
    57→    const response = await fetch(
    58→      `https://api.telegram.org/bot${botToken}/sendMessage`,
    59→      {
    60→        method: 'POST',
    61→        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    62→        body: JSON.stringify(messagePayload)
    63→      }
    64→    );
    65→
    66→    if (!response.ok) {
    67→      const error = await response.json();
    68→      console.error('[Telegram Send] Error:', error);
    69→      return NextResponse.json(
    70→        { error: 'Failed to send message', details: error },
    71→        { status: 500 }
    72→      );
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    const result = await response.json();
    76→    console.log('[Telegram Send] Message sent to chat:', targetChatId);
    77→
    78→    // Store the sent message in the database
    79→    try {
    80→      const botInfo = result.result?.from;
    81→      await supabase.from('telegram_messages').insert({
    82→        chat_id: targetChatId,
    83→        message_id: String(result.result?.message_id),
    84→        from_user_id: botInfo?.id ? String(botInfo.id) : null,
    85→        from_user_name: botInfo?.first_name || 'Bot',
    86→        from_username: botInfo?.username || null,
    87→        text: message,
    88→        message_date: new Date().toISOString()
    89→      });
    90→      console.log('[Telegram Send] Message stored in database');
    91→    } catch (dbError) {
    92→      // Log but don't fail the request if storage fails
    93→      console.error('[Telegram Send] Failed to store message:', dbError);
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    return NextResponse.json({
    97→      success: true,
    98→      message_id: result.result?.message_id
    99→    });
   100→  } catch (error) {
   101→    console.error('[Telegram Send] Error:', error);
   102→    return NextResponse.json(
   103→      { error: 'Internal server error' },
   104→      { status: 500 }
   105→    );
   106→  }
   107→}
   108→
```
